enemies.en: The principal potential enemy was the Delhi Sultanate; there were also periodic conflicts and tensions with neighboring Deccan and South Indian polities over borders, suzerainty, and commercial influence.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交政策以维护东海岸安全、控制沿海商路、巩固附庸体系和阻止北方强权南下为核心。王室通过婚姻、赐封、朝贡、宗教声望和军事示威共同维持地区影响力。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy focused on securing the eastern seaboard, controlling coastal trade routes, consolidating the tributary-feudatory order, and preventing northern great powers from advancing southward. The crown sustained regional influence through marriage ties, grants, tribute relations, religious prestige, and military display.

era.zh: 中世纪后期南亚石造建筑与区域海贸时代
era.en: Late medieval South Asian age of stone temple architecture and regional maritime trade

keyInnovations.zh: 关键技术与能力体现在精湛的石造寺庙工程、复杂雕刻工艺、水利与稻作管理、沿海航运、盐田生产及成熟的铭文和土地授予行政实践，而非突破性的火器或机械革命。
keyInnovations.en: Key advances lay in sophisticated stone-temple engineering, complex sculptural craftsmanship, irrigation and rice management, coastal navigation, salt-pan production, and mature inscriptional and land-grant administration rather than in transformative gunpowder or mechanical revolutions.

strengths.zh: 王朝合法性强，宗教与建筑成就卓著；沿海农业和港口贸易带来稳固财源；地方治理兼具直接统治与附庸整合能力；国库健康，社会整体稳定。
strengths.en: The dynasty possessed strong legitimacy and outstanding religious-architectural prestige; coastal agriculture and port trade provided reliable revenue; local administration combined direct rule with effective feudatory integration; the treasury was healthy and the realm broadly stable.

weaknesses.zh: 对农业收成和季风条件依赖较大；骑兵质量受限于优良马匹供应；地方封臣与寺庙土地免税削弱中央财政穿透力；面对北方更军事化的突厥-阿富汗政权时，战略压力上升。
weaknesses.en: The kingdom depended heavily on harvests and monsoon conditions; cavalry quality was constrained by the supply of high-grade horses; tax exemptions on feudatory and temple lands reduced central fiscal penetration; and strategic pressure increased when facing more militarized Turko-Afghan powers from the north.

outlook.zh: 1280年前后王国处于稳固期，仍是东印度的重要强权。若能维持财政、控制附庸并巩固海岸防御，短期前景良好；但长期必须应对德里苏丹国扩张、区域权力竞争和内部地方化趋势。
outlook.en: Around 1280 the kingdom was in a stable phase and remained a major power in eastern India. Its short-term outlook was favorable if it preserved revenue, controlled feudatories, and secured the coast; in the longer term it would have to confront Delhi Sultanate expansion, regional power competition, and internal tendencies toward localization.

description.zh: 统治奥里萨海岸的印度教王朝，以科纳拉克等巨型寺庙工程闻名。
description.en: A Hindu dynasty ruling the Odisha coast, famed for monumental temple construction such as Konark.

governmentForm.zh: 以上座部佛教君主制為核心的王朝王國，依賴宮廷、地方總督與寺院網絡共同統治
governmentForm.en: A dynastic kingdom centered on Theravada Buddhist monarchy, governed through the court, provincial governors, and monastic networks

socialStructure.zh: 社會由王室與高級貴族、地方首長、佛教僧團、自由農民、工匠商人以及各類依附勞動人口構成；1280年前後因大量土地捐入寺院，世俗稅役基礎被侵蝕，地方豪強勢力增強
socialStructure.en: Society was composed of the royal family and high nobility, local chiefs, the Buddhist sangha, free cultivators, artisans and merchants, and various dependent labor groups; by around 1280, extensive land donations to monasteries had weakened the secular tax base and strengthened local magnates

rulingClass.zh: 王室、宮廷貴族、軍事與行省總督、與王權合作的大寺院高僧
rulingClass.en: The royal house, court aristocracy, military and provincial governors, and senior abbots of major monasteries aligned with the crown

succession.zh: 原則上由王族內繼承並經宮廷與地方權勢者承認，實際上常受宮廷鬥爭、諸王子競逐與地方軍事實力左右
succession.en: In principle succession remained within the royal house and required recognition by the court and regional powerholders, but in practice it was often shaped by palace struggles, rival princes, and provincial military strength

structure.zh: 中央政權以國王與宮廷為核心，下轄王都官署、行省總督與受冊封的地方首長；政令透過王室使臣、書記與地方官執行，但1280年時中央控制已明顯鬆動，邊疆與附庸區域自治增強
structure.en: The central state was organized around the king and royal court, with the capital's offices overseeing provincial governors and subordinated local chiefs; orders were carried out by royal envoys, scribes, and local officials, but by 1280 central control had clearly loosened and autonomy had grown in frontier and tributary regions

function.zh: 管理王命、覲見、宮廷儀式、王室財產與內廷人員
function.en: Managed royal commands, audiences, court ceremony, royal estates, and palace personnel

function.zh: 記錄田地、征收穀稅與勞役、核定王田與應稅村落
function.en: Recorded lands, collected grain tax and labor obligations, and assessed royal lands and taxable villages

function.zh: 聯繫各地總督、土司與附庸首長，辦理任命、朝貢與地方糾紛
function.en: Liaised with provincial governors, local chiefs, and tributary rulers, handling appointments, tribute, and regional disputes

function.zh: 管理王室近衛、徵兵、軍糧、象隊與邊防調度
function.en: Managed the royal guard, levies, military provisions, elephant corps, and frontier deployments

function.zh: 審理土地、債務、繼承與地方訴訟，保管誓約與判決文書
function.en: Handled land, debt, inheritance, and local litigation, and preserved records of oaths and judgments

function.zh: 登記寺院受贈土地、協調僧團關係、監督部分宗教財產與供養
function.en: Registered monastic endowments, coordinated relations with the sangha, and supervised certain religious estates and offerings

function.zh: 掌管伊洛瓦底江運輸、糧倉、渡口與部分市場供應
function.en: Oversaw Irrawaddy transport, granaries, ferries, and part of market provisioning

localAdmin.zh: 地方由行省總督、城鎮官、村社首領與受封土著酋長共同管理。上緬甸核心區行政較密集，外圍地區則更多依賴朝貢與間接統治。1280年時，多數地方權力日益落入世襲豪族與寺院地主手中
localAdmin.en: Local administration was shared by provincial governors, town officers, village headmen, and invested indigenous chiefs. The Upper Burma core was administered more densely, while peripheral regions relied more on tribute and indirect rule. By 1280, much local authority was increasingly in the hands of hereditary magnates and monastic landlords

legalSystem.zh: 法律以王令、習慣法、土地銘文、宗教規範與地方仲裁為基礎。佛教倫理影響司法，但實際裁判多涉及土地、稅役、捐獻、婚姻與債務等事務，並常由地方權威與僧侶參與調解
legalSystem.en: Law was based on royal edicts, customary norms, land inscriptions, religious standards, and local arbitration. Buddhist ethics shaped justice, but actual judgments commonly concerned land, taxation, donations, marriage, and debt, often mediated by local authorities and monks

taxationSystem.zh: 國家收入主要來自稻穀稅、勞役、王田產出、附庸朝貢、關津與市場徵收。由於長期向寺院與僧團捐贈免役土地，1280年時可直接徵稅的世俗田地縮減，財政壓力加劇
taxationSystem.en: State revenue came chiefly from rice tax, labor dues, output from crown lands, tributary payments, tolls, and market levies. Because tax-exempt lands had long been donated to monasteries and the sangha, the amount of directly taxable secular land had shrunk by 1280, intensifying fiscal strain

religion.zh: 以上座部佛教為主體，並融合納特神信仰、地方精靈崇拜與部分婆羅門宮廷儀式。國王透過建塔、施捨與護持僧團來表現正統與功德
religion.en: Theravada Buddhism was dominant, blended with nat spirit worship, local cults, and some Brahmanical court ritual. The king expressed legitimacy and merit through temple building, almsgiving, and patronage of the sangha

philosophy.zh: 思想核心為佛教功德、業報、護法王權與僧俗秩序；宮廷文化也重視王者布施、宇宙秩序與碑銘中記錄功德的觀念
philosophy.en: The philosophical core lay in Buddhist merit, karma, righteous kingship, and the ordered relationship between monks and laity; court culture also valued royal generosity, cosmic order, and the inscriptional recording of meritorious deeds

writingSystem.zh: 主要使用緬文書寫，源於南印度系文字傳統並已成熟；巴利文廣泛用於宗教，孟文亦在部分銘文與佛教文化中具有重要地位
writingSystem.en: Burmese script was the principal writing system, derived from South Indian traditions and already mature; Pali was widely used in religion, and Mon also retained importance in some inscriptions and Buddhist culture

culturalAchievements.zh: 蒲甘平原的大量佛塔、寺院、壁畫與碑銘構成東南亞中世紀最輝煌的佛教文化景觀之一。阿難陀寺、達賓紐寺與眾多磚造佛塔展現高度成熟的建築、雕塑與宗教藝術傳統
culturalAchievements.en: The vast concentration of stupas, temples, murals, and inscriptions on the Pagan plain formed one of the greatest Buddhist cultural landscapes of medieval Southeast Asia. Monuments such as Ananda Temple, Thatbyinnyu, and numerous brick stupas displayed a highly developed tradition of architecture, sculpture, and religious art

languageFamily.zh: 主要語言屬漢藏語系藏緬語族；宗教與學術語言則重度使用巴利文，並受孟語文化影響
languageFamily.en: The main language belonged to the Tibeto-Burman branch of the Sino-Tibetan family; religious and scholarly culture made heavy use of Pali and was influenced by Mon traditions

gdpDescription.zh: 蒲甘經濟以灌溉農業為基礎，核心產區集中於上緬甸乾帶與伊洛瓦底江流域。其總體規模在東南亞屬於重要王國，但1280年已因寺院土地免稅化、地方割據與戰爭威脅而轉入衰退
gdpDescription.en: Pagan's economy rested on irrigated agriculture, with core production concentrated in the Upper Burma dry zone and the Irrawaddy basin. Its overall scale made it a major Southeast Asian kingdom, but by 1280 it was in decline due to monastic tax exemption, regional fragmentation, and the threat of war

mainIndustries.zh: 稻作農業、芝麻與豆類種植、灌溉工程、磚石建築、木材、漆器、金屬工藝、陶器、江河運輸與宗教建築相關手工業
mainIndustries.en: Rice agriculture, sesame and pulse cultivation, irrigation works, brick and stone construction, timber, lacquerware, metalworking, ceramics, river transport, and crafts tied to religious building

tradeGoods.zh: 出口或交換品包括稻米、木材、漆器、寶石、象牙、鹽、油料作物與手工藝品；輸入品包括高級紡織品、金屬、馬匹、奢侈品與部分海上轉口貨
tradeGoods.en: Exports or exchange goods included rice, timber, lacquerware, gemstones, ivory, salt, oilseeds, and handicrafts; imports included fine textiles, metals, horses, luxury goods, and some maritime entrepôt merchandise

name.zh: 貴金屬稱量與實物並用

householdWealth.zh: 普通農戶財富主要體現在耕地使用權、牲畜、農具、穀物存量與家族勞力；城市商工家庭持有更多金屬器、進口布匹與流通財貨。整體而言，財富分布因寺院大地主與地方豪強而愈加不均
householdWealth.en: Ordinary household wealth was held mainly in cultivation rights, livestock, tools, grain stores, and family labor; urban artisan and merchant households possessed more metal goods, imported cloth, and movable wealth. Overall distribution was becoming more unequal because of monastic landed wealth and local magnates

economicSystem.zh: 以農業剩餘、王田、勞役與朝貢為核心的再分配型王國經濟，輔以河運市場與區域貿易。國家對經濟有強烈徵發能力，但到1280年已被寺院免稅地擴張與地方勢力分裂所削弱
economicSystem.en: A redistributive royal economy centered on agricultural surplus, crown lands, labor dues, and tribute, supplemented by riverine markets and regional trade. The state retained strong extractive powers, but by 1280 these had been weakened by the expansion of tax-exempt monastic estates and political fragmentation

source.en: Agricultural taxes and crown land income
Tribute from dependencies and frontier regions

source.zh: 市場稅、關津與河運徵收
source.en: Market taxes, tolls, and river transport levies
Royal workshops, fines, and miscellaneous income

treasuryDescription.zh: 國庫以糧食、貴金屬、牲畜、倉儲物資與可徵發勞力共同構成，而非純粹現金。1280年時其帳面仍可維持宮廷與防務，但財源正在被寺院免稅田與地方離心力量持續侵蝕
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury consisted of grain, bullion, livestock, stored goods, and callable labor rather than cash alone. In 1280 it could still sustain the court and defense on paper, but its fiscal foundations were being steadily eroded by tax-exempt monastic lands and centrifugal provincial forces

fiscalPolicy.zh: 王權嘗試透過強化徵發、維持王田與控制地方貢納來支撐政局，但未能根本扭轉宗教捐地過多與地方豪強坐大所造成的結構性赤字
fiscalPolicy.en: The crown tried to preserve stability by intensifying requisitioning, maintaining crown lands, and tightening control over regional tribute, but it failed to reverse the structural deficit caused by excessive religious land grants and the rise of local magnates

description.zh: 軍隊主體，由近衛、都城駐軍與地方步兵徵發組成，使用矛、刀、弓與盾，適合守城與平原作戰
description.en: The main body of the army, composed of guards, capital garrisons, and provincial levies, armed with spears, swords, bows, and shields, suited to fortification defense and plain warfare

description.zh: 象隊具有衝擊與統帥象徵功能，常搭配精銳護衛使用，但面對機動性更高的蒙古騎兵效果受限
description.en: Elephants served both shock and command-symbolic roles and were often paired with elite escorts, but they were limited against the superior mobility of Mongol cavalry

description.zh: 規模不大，主要來自王室與部分邊地武裝，馬匹品質與補充能力弱於北方草原強權
description.en: Modest in scale, drawn mainly from the royal establishment and some frontier forces, with horse quality and replenishment inferior to northern steppe powers

description.zh: 由各地總督、土司與附庸首長提供，戰力差異極大，忠誠度依地方政治局勢而變化
description.en: Supplied by governors, local chiefs, and tributary rulers; their quality varied greatly, and loyalty shifted with regional politics

technology.zh: 軍事技術以傳統東南亞陸戰體系為主，包括弓箭、長矛、刀劍、木土工事、戰象與河運後勤。對蒙古式機動騎射與北方戰法缺乏有效應對，亦未形成足以對抗元朝的火器或重騎兵體系
technology.en: Military technology was based on the traditional Southeast Asian land warfare system of bows, spears, swords, earthen and wooden fortifications, war elephants, and river logistics. It lacked effective answers to Mongol-style mobile horse archery and did not possess a firearms or heavy cavalry system capable of matching the Yuan

threats.zh: 最大威脅來自元朝自雲南方向施加的外交與軍事壓力，其次是邊地叛離、地方總督坐大、撣族勢力擴張，以及王國內部因財政惡化導致的軍事動員失靈
threats.en: The principal threat came from Yuan diplomatic and military pressure advancing from Yunnan, followed by frontier secession, the growth of provincial warlords, the expansion of Shan power, and the breakdown of mobilization caused by fiscal deterioration

description.zh: 初步正规化，有季节性操练
description.en: Semi-professional, seasonal drills

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: 骑士标准双刃直剑，十字形护手
description.en: Knight's standard double-edged straight sword with cruciform guard

description.zh: 伊斯兰世界弯刀，轻便利于骑战劈斩
description.en: Islamic curved sword, light and ideal for mounted slashing

description.zh: 英格兰长弓手主力弓，射程可达300步
description.en: English longbow, effective range up to 300 paces

populationDescription.zh: 人口主要集中於伊洛瓦底江中上游農業區、灌溉帶與河港城鎮。蒲甘王國統轄多族群人口，包括緬人、孟人、撣族及多種山地與邊地社群；1280年前後，由於邊疆動盪與王權衰退，人口控制力比鼎盛期弱
populationDescription.en: The population was concentrated chiefly in the agricultural zones, irrigation belts, and river towns of the middle and upper Irrawaddy. Pagan ruled a multiethnic population including Burmans, Mons, Shans, and various upland and frontier communities; by around 1280, political control over this population was weaker than at the kingdom's height

name.en: Southern river ports of Upper Burma

socialClasses.zh: 上層為國王、王族與貴族，其次為地方首長、官吏與軍事階層；僧團在社會與經濟上具有特殊地位。中下層由農民、工匠、商人、漁民與運輸者構成，另有依附勞動人口、戰俘與受役群體。寺院土地擴張使部分農民轉入宗教莊園體系
socialClasses.en: At the top stood the king, royal kin, and nobility, followed by local chiefs, officials, and military strata; the sangha held a special social and economic status. The middle and lower orders consisted of cultivators, artisans, merchants, fishers, and transport workers, along with dependent laborers, captives, and service groups. The expansion of monastic estates drew some peasants into religious landlord systems

allies.zh: 1280年缺乏可靠強盟，主要依靠對周邊附庸、邊地首長與部分南方港市的傳統宗主權關係維持影響
allies.en: By 1280 Pagan lacked dependable great-power allies and relied mainly on traditional overlordship ties over neighboring dependencies, frontier chiefs, and some southern port polities

enemies.zh: 主要對手為元朝及其在雲南的軍政力量；同時亦面對撣族勢力崛起、部分附庸離心以及與鄰近泰人政權的潛在競爭
enemies.en: Its main adversary was the Yuan dynasty and its military-administrative power in Yunnan; Pagan also faced the rise of Shan forces, the drift of some dependencies, and latent competition with nearby Tai polities

foreignPolicy.zh: 對外政策以維持傳統宗主秩序、保住上緬甸核心、並在對元問題上於拒抗與妥協間搖擺為特徵。那羅梯訶波帝在外交處置上被後世視為失當，既未能穩定對元關係，也未能有效整合國內邊疆力量
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy aimed to preserve the traditional tributary order, hold the Upper Burma core, and oscillate between resistance and accommodation toward the Yuan. Later tradition judged Narathihapate's diplomacy harshly, as he neither stabilized relations with the Yuan nor effectively consolidated domestic frontier forces

era.zh: 中世紀後期東南亞灌溉王國時代，處於蒙古帝國擴張壓力之下
era.en: Late medieval Southeast Asian irrigated-kingdom era under the pressure of Mongol imperial expansion

keyInnovations.zh: 成熟的磚造宗教建築技術、拱頂與灰泥裝飾、灌溉池塘與堤渠管理、碑銘行政記錄、緬文書寫發展，以及依託伊洛瓦底江的河運組織能力
keyInnovations.en: Mature brick religious construction, vaulted forms and stucco decoration, management of tanks and canal irrigation, inscription-based administration, development of Burmese writing, and organized river transport along the Irrawaddy

strengths.zh: 蒲甘仍控制上緬甸核心農業區與伊洛瓦底江幹線，擁有深厚的佛教文化正統、可觀的人口與悠久的王朝威望；其寺院網絡、灌溉農業與王都建築資源，使其在名義上仍是區域強國
strengths.en: Pagan still held the Upper Burma agricultural core and the main Irrawaddy artery, and possessed deep Buddhist legitimacy, substantial population, and long dynastic prestige; its monastic network, irrigated agriculture, and monumental capital still made it a regional great power in name

weaknesses.zh: 王權衰落、寺院免稅地過度擴張、財政赤字、地方豪強坐大、軍隊分散且機動性不足，對蒙古—雲南方向威脅缺乏有效戰略回應。中央命令的執行力已大不如前
weaknesses.en: Royal authority was declining; tax-exempt monastic lands had expanded too far; the treasury ran deficits; local magnates had grown stronger; and the army was dispersed and insufficiently mobile. Pagan lacked an effective strategic response to the Mongol-Yunnan threat, and central orders no longer carried their former force

outlook.zh: 若1280年的趨勢持續，蒲甘王國將難以在元朝壓力與內部分裂之間維持完整統治，極可能在未來數年內失去邊疆與附庸，並引發王朝崩解與地區政權重組
outlook.en: If the trends of 1280 continued, the Kingdom of Pagan would struggle to preserve integrated rule under combined Yuan pressure and internal fragmentation; it was highly likely within a few years to lose frontier and tributary regions, triggering dynastic collapse and regional political reorganization

description.zh: 缅甸平原大国，正遭受蒙古压力与内部离心化冲击。
description.en: The great kingdom of the Burmese plain, under growing Mongol pressure and internal fragmentation.

governmentForm.zh: 以神王观念、宫廷宗教与地方封臣网络为基础的君主制帝国
governmentForm.en: A monarchic empire based on the devaraja concept, court religion, and a network of provincial vassals

socialStructure.zh: 社会等级分明，以王室与贵族为顶层，其下为婆罗门、寺庙人员、军官、地方首领、自由农民、工匠、商人以及被征发劳役与奴婢人口。寺庙与水利工程组织社会生活，地方社群通过贡赋与徭役联系到中央。
socialStructure.en: Society was strongly stratified, with the royal house and nobility at the top, followed by Brahmins, temple personnel, military officers, provincial chiefs, free peasants, artisans, merchants, and labor-bound dependents and slaves. Temples and hydraulic works organized social life, while local communities were tied to the center through tribute and corvée.

rulingClass.zh: 高棉王室、宫廷贵族、地方总督、掌握祭祀与文书权威的婆罗门集团
rulingClass.en: The Khmer royal family, court nobility, provincial governors, and Brahmin elites who held ritual and scribal authority

succession.zh: 以王族内部继承为主，重视王室血统、武力控制与宫廷支持，并不完全遵循严格长子继承制
succession.en: Succession was primarily within the royal family, emphasizing dynastic bloodline, military control, and court backing rather than a strict rule of primogeniture

structure.zh: 1280年的吴哥政权由国王主导，中央宫廷通过王室亲信、婆罗门祭司、文书官员和地方长官治理国家。帝国依靠都城周边的核心区直接控制，以及对外围地区实施较松散的朝贡与属邦管理。
structure.en: In 1280, Angkor was ruled by a king-centered court that governed through royal confidants, Brahmin ritual specialists, scribal officials, and provincial administrators. The empire relied on direct control of the core around the capital and looser tributary and vassal management in peripheral regions.

function.zh: 管理宫廷、王室财产、礼仪、供给与都城核心事务
function.en: Managed the court, royal estates, ceremony, provisioning, and the core affairs of the capital

function.zh: 主持国家祭祀、监督寺庙地产、宗教供奉与相关劳役安排
function.en: Oversaw state rituals, temple lands, religious endowments, and associated labor obligations

function.zh: 征收稻米、林产、手工业贡品，管理仓储、运输与地方贡赋登记
function.en: Collected rice, forest products, and artisanal tribute, and managed storage, transport, and provincial tribute records

function.zh: 维护水库、运河、堤道、桥梁与大型寺庙工程
function.en: Maintained reservoirs, canals, causeways, bridges, and major temple works

function.zh: 负责征调部队、象军、地方守备与边疆军务协调
function.en: Handled troop levies, elephant corps, local garrisons, and frontier military coordination

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政由王族、贵族及受封地方首领主持，核心地区控制较强，外围地区多通过纳贡、婚姻联盟和军事威慑维系。各地村社承担赋税、劳役与水利维护义务。
localAdmin.en: Local administration was led by royal relatives, nobles, and appointed local chiefs. Control was stronger in the core regions and more indirect in peripheral areas, where tribute, marriage alliances, and military pressure sustained authority. Village communities bore tax, labor, and hydraulic maintenance duties.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系以王命、习惯法、寺庙碑铭规定及地方裁断为主。财产、土地、劳役和宗教供奉关系常以碑文记录，司法实践重视等级、身份与王权仲裁。
legalSystem.en: The legal system was based on royal commands, customary law, temple inscriptional regulations, and local adjudication. Property, land, labor, and religious endowment arrangements were often recorded in inscriptions, while judicial practice emphasized status, rank, and royal arbitration.

taxationSystem.zh: 税制以实物税和劳役为主，包括稻米、鱼产、盐、林木、蜂蜡、象牙、织物及地方特产；另有大规模徭役用于修筑寺庙、水利和道路。边缘属地则以贡赋和定期朝觐形式体现臣属关系。
taxationSystem.en: Taxation relied mainly on payments in kind and labor service, including rice, fish products, salt, timber, wax, ivory, textiles, and local specialties; large-scale corvée supported temple, hydraulic, and road construction. Peripheral dependencies expressed subordination through tribute and periodic attendance at court.

religion.zh: 1280年吴哥的官方倾向为湿婆派印度教，阇耶跋摩八世以反对前代佛教王权著称，但民间与地方仍广泛存在大乘佛教、印度教混合信仰及祖灵崇拜。
religion.en: In 1280 Angkor's official orientation was Shaivite Hinduism, as Jayavarman VIII was known for opposing the Buddhist royal cult of earlier reigns, though Mahayana Buddhism, Hindu syncretism, and ancestor worship remained widespread among local communities.

philosophy.zh: 政治思想以神王观念、婆罗门礼制、功德观念与王权宇宙秩序为核心，同时吸收佛教慈悲与地方祖先祭祀传统。
philosophy.en: Political thought centered on the devaraja concept, Brahmanical ritual order, merit, and the cosmic role of kingship, while also absorbing Buddhist ethical ideas and local ancestral traditions.

writingSystem.zh: 主要使用古高棉文字，并在宗教与正式铭文中使用梵语；碑铭文化发达，行政和奉献记录常刻于石碑。
writingSystem.en: Old Khmer script was the main writing system, with Sanskrit used in religious and formal inscriptions; inscriptional culture was highly developed, and administrative and donation records were often carved in stone.

culturalAchievements.zh: 吴哥以宏大的寺庙建筑、精密的浮雕艺术、庞大的水利城市景观和高水平石工闻名。至1280年，虽已过吴哥窟与巴戎寺的巅峰建设时期，但帝国仍保有深厚的建筑、雕刻、宗教仪式和宫廷艺术传统。
culturalAchievements.en: Angkor was renowned for monumental temple architecture, refined bas-relief art, vast hydraulic urban landscapes, and advanced stone craftsmanship. By 1280, although the peak building age of Angkor Wat and Bayon had passed, the empire still retained a deep tradition of architecture, sculpture, ritual, and court arts.

languageFamily.zh: 南亚语系孟高棉语族，以古高棉语为国家核心语言之一
languageFamily.en: Austroasiatic, Mon-Khmer branch, with Old Khmer as one of the principal state languages

gdpDescription.zh: 吴哥经济以高产稻作、水利农业和国家动员能力为基础，整体财富主要体现为粮食盈余、劳动力组织、寺庙地产和地区性贡赋，而非高度货币化市场。其经济规模在东南亚内陆极为可观，但人均财富受制于以农业和徭役为核心的体制。
gdpDescription.en: Angkor's economy rested on productive wet-rice agriculture, hydraulic farming, and strong state mobilization. Wealth was expressed chiefly in grain surplus, organized labor, temple estates, and regional tribute rather than in a highly monetized market economy. Its aggregate scale was impressive for inland Southeast Asia, though per-capita prosperity was constrained by an agrarian, labor-service-based system.

mainIndustries.zh: 稻作农业、渔业、林产采集、象役与畜养、石材与建筑、青铜与铁器手工业、织造、制盐、寺庙经济
mainIndustries.en: Wet-rice agriculture, fishing, forest extraction, elephant handling and animal husbandry, stone construction, bronze and iron crafts, weaving, salt production, and temple-based economic activity

tradeGoods.zh: 稻米、鱼干、盐、蜂蜡、漆料、木材、象牙、犀角、豆蔻与香料转运品、布匹、金属器、陶器
tradeGoods.en: Rice, dried fish, salt, beeswax, lacquer, timber, ivory, rhinoceros horn, cardamom and re-exported aromatics, textiles, metalware, and ceramics

householdWealth.zh: 普通家庭财富主要体现在稻田使用权、家畜、渔具、织物、储粮和参与地方网络的能力。核心区农户若水利条件良好可较为稳定，但在赋役繁重时储蓄有限。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was mainly embodied in access to rice land, livestock, fishing gear, textiles, grain stores, and the ability to participate in local networks. Peasant families in the core could be relatively secure under good hydraulic conditions, but heavy labor and tax demands limited savings.

economicSystem.zh: 以王权再分配、寺庙地产、地方贡赋和村社农业为核心的混合经济；市场存在但并非经济组织的唯一中心，国家更多依靠实物征收和劳役调配资源。
economicSystem.en: A mixed economy centered on royal redistribution, temple estates, provincial tribute, and village agriculture; markets existed but were not the sole organizing force, as the state relied primarily on in-kind extraction and labor mobilization.

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库并非完全以金属现钱形式保存，而是由稻米储备、王室仓储、寺庙宝藏、贵金属器物和可动员劳力共同构成。吴哥真正的财政力量来自对人力、土地和水利体系的控制。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was not held solely as coined metal, but as a combination of rice reserves, royal storehouses, temple treasure, precious metal objects, and mobilizable labor. Angkor's true fiscal strength lay in its control over people, land, and hydraulic systems.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策重在维持都城、寺庙、水利与军队所需的实物供给，通过稳定征收、调配劳役和对属地施加贡赋来保持帝国秩序；在局势稳定时倾向维持适度盈余以应对歉收与战争。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy focused on maintaining the in-kind supplies needed for the capital, temples, hydraulic systems, and army, preserving imperial order through regular extraction, labor mobilization, and tribute from dependencies; in stable times the court aimed to preserve a modest surplus against bad harvests and war.

description.zh: 驻守都城与王宫，负责君主安全、仪仗与关键地区镇守，为常备军核心。
description.en: Stationed in the capital and palace, responsible for royal security, ceremonial display, and defense of key zones; the core of the standing army.

description.zh: 由地方征调农民与附庸兵构成，是数量最大的兵种，使用长矛、刀、弓和盾牌。
description.en: Made up of levied peasants and vassal contingents, this was the largest arm, using spears, blades, bows, and shields.

description.zh: 象军兼具冲击、指挥平台与威慑作用，在东南亚战争中具有重要象征与实战价值。
description.en: The elephant corps served as a shock arm, command platform, and instrument of intimidation, with major symbolic and battlefield value in Southeast Asian warfare.

description.zh: 高棉骑兵规模有限，多用于侦察、传令和追击，不如草原国家发达。
description.en: Khmer cavalry was limited in scale and used mainly for scouting, communication, and pursuit, being far less developed than that of steppe states.

description.zh: 在湄公河、洞里萨湖及运河体系活动，负责运输、巡逻、补给和两栖作战支援。
description.en: Operating on the Mekong, Tonle Sap, and canal networks, these forces handled transport, patrol, supply, and support for amphibious operations.

technology.zh: 吴哥军队使用铁制兵器、复合弓或木弓、长矛、盾牌、攻城器材和战象。其优势在于内河机动、象军与大规模人力征发，但在骑射、火药和远程攻城技术方面不及同时期东亚先进政权。
technology.en: Angkor's military used iron weapons, bows, spears, shields, siege equipment, and war elephants. Its strengths lay in river mobility, elephant warfare, and large-scale manpower levies, but it lagged behind the most advanced East Asian states in cavalry archery, gunpowder, and long-range siege technology.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自东方的大越、南方和东南方向的占城与海上势力、泰人政权如素可泰的崛起，以及西部与西北边疆的离心倾向。1283年前后元朝使节与蒙古压力开始影响区域外交，但尚未转化为对吴哥本土的全面征服战争。
threats.en: Main threats came from Đại Việt to the east, Champa and maritime powers to the south and southeast, the rise of Tai polities such as Sukhothai, and centrifugal tendencies on the western and northwestern frontiers. Around 1283, Yuan envoys and Mongol pressure began to affect regional diplomacy, but this had not yet become a full-scale conquest war against Angkor itself.

description.zh: 常规训练体系，兵种有基本配合
description.en: Regular training regimen with basic unit coordination

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: 铁环编织甲衣，灵活且防护可靠
description.en: Iron ring-linked armor, flexible and reliably protective

description.zh: 拜占庭海战秘密武器，水上不灭之火
description.en: Byzantine naval secret weapon, inextinguishable fire on water

description.zh: 绞盘上弦重弩，可破重甲
description.en: Windlass-drawn heavy crossbow capable of piercing heavy armor

populationDescription.zh: 1280年的吴哥帝国人口约三百万，主体为高棉人，另包括孟人、占族、山地族群及附庸地区多样居民。人口主要集中于吴哥核心平原、洞里萨湖流域与湄公河农业区。
populationDescription.en: The Angkor Empire in 1280 had roughly 3 million people, predominantly Khmer, along with Mon, Cham, upland groups, and diverse inhabitants of dependent regions. Population was concentrated in the Angkorian core plain, the Tonle Sap basin, and Mekong agricultural zones.

description.zh: 高棉帝国首都，世界最大前工业城市
description.en: Khmer capital, world's largest pre-industrial city

name.zh: 洛韦克前身区域性中心
洞里萨湖南岸港埠聚落

socialClasses.zh: 王室与贵族、婆罗门与寺庙祭司、军政官员、地方首领、工匠与商人、自由农民、依附劳役人口与奴婢构成主要社会层次。社会流动有限，但因王室任命、军功、宗教捐献与地方整合而存在上升渠道。
socialClasses.en: The main social strata comprised the royal family and nobility, Brahmins and temple clergy, military and civil officials, local chiefs, artisans and merchants, free peasants, and labor-bound dependents and slaves. Social mobility was limited, though royal appointment, military service, religious donation, and local integration offered paths of advancement.

allies.zh: 吴哥并无近代意义上的固定盟国，其外交更依赖对周边首领、附庸与缓冲地区的宗主关系、婚姻联盟和临时合作。与部分泰人或边疆首领存在阶段性合作可能。
allies.en: Angkor had no permanent allies in the modern sense; its diplomacy relied more on suzerainty over neighboring chiefs, buffer regions, marriage alliances, and temporary cooperation. Periodic collaboration with certain Tai or frontier leaders was possible.

enemies.zh: 主要竞争与敌对对象为大越、占城诸政权，以及逐渐兴起并侵蚀吴哥西北势力范围的泰人国家，尤其是素可泰。某些边疆属地在中央控制减弱时也会转为叛离。
enemies.en: Its principal rivals and enemies were Đại Việt, the Cham polities, and the rising Tai states—especially Sukhothai—that were increasingly encroaching on Angkor's northwestern sphere. Some frontier dependencies also shifted into rebellion when central control weakened.

foreignPolicy.zh: 吴哥奉行以内陆霸权、控制交通节点、水利核心区和属邦网络为目标的外交政策。面对元朝扩张，可能采取谨慎观望、遣使和象征性承认宗主的务实策略，以避免直接军事冲突并保留地区主导地位。
foreignPolicy.en: Angkor pursued a foreign policy aimed at inland hegemony, control of transport nodes and hydraulic core zones, and maintenance of a network of dependencies. In the face of Yuan expansion, it likely favored cautious observation, embassies, and pragmatic symbolic submission in order to avoid direct war while preserving regional predominance.

era.zh: 中世纪盛期东南亚水利—寺庙国家时代
era.en: High medieval Southeast Asian hydraulic-temple state era

keyInnovations.zh: 大型蓄水池与运河工程、堤道和石桥建设、精细石雕与寺庙建筑技术、稻作水利管理、内河运输组织、战象军事运用
keyInnovations.en: Large reservoir and canal engineering, causeway and stone bridge construction, refined stone carving and temple architecture, wet-rice hydraulic management, organized inland water transport, and military use of war elephants

strengths.zh: 吴哥在1280年仍具有人口规模大、农业基础雄厚、水利系统成熟、都城威望极高和对湄公河内陆网络的深厚控制力。其政治文化传统强大，足以支撑区域霸权。
strengths.en: In 1280 Angkor still possessed great demographic weight, a strong agricultural base, mature hydraulic systems, a highly prestigious capital, and deep control over inland Mekong networks. Its political and cultural traditions were powerful enough to sustain regional hegemony.

weaknesses.zh: 帝国对劳役、水利维护和地方忠诚的依赖极高，一旦王权衰弱、气候波动或边疆离心加剧，整体控制力便容易下降。阇耶跋摩八世的宗教政策也可能削弱前代佛教网络所形成的整合力。
weaknesses.en: The empire depended heavily on labor service, hydraulic upkeep, and local loyalty; if royal authority weakened, climate variability intensified, or frontier centrifugalism grew, overall control could decline rapidly. Jayavarman VIII's religious policy may also have weakened integrative networks associated with earlier Buddhist patronage.

outlook.zh: 短期内吴哥仍属稳定强国，但中长期将面临泰人势力扩张、沿海贸易重心转移、宗教转型与边疆治理困难等挑战。若无法调整统治方式并维持水利与属邦体系，区域优势将逐步受到侵蚀。
outlook.en: In the short term Angkor remained a stable great power, but in the medium and long term it faced challenges from expanding Tai polities, shifts in maritime trade, religious transformation, and difficulties of frontier governance. Unless it adapted its ruling system and maintained its hydraulic and dependency networks, its regional advantage would gradually erode.

description.zh: 中南半岛内陆核心强国，仍控制湄公河流域广大地区。
description.en: The major inland power of mainland Southeast Asia, still controlling broad parts of the Mekong basin.

governmentForm.zh: 以东爪哇王权为核心的印度化君主制，国王通过宫廷、宗教授封网络与地方贵族维系统治，并以朝贡与属邦体系向外扩张影响力。
governmentForm.en: An Indianized monarchy centered on East Javanese kingship, in which the king ruled through the court, networks of religious grants, and regional aristocrats, while projecting influence outward through tribute and subordinate polities.

socialStructure.zh: 社会由王室与高等贵族、地方领主与官员、祭司与宗教阶层、商人、自由农民、工匠及附属劳役人口构成；虽然受印度教与佛教观念影响，但实际社会组织更依赖地方亲族、村社与宫廷庇护关系。
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of the royal house and high nobility, regional lords and officials, priests and religious communities, merchants, free peasants, artisans, and dependent laborers; while shaped by Hindu-Buddhist ideas, actual social organization relied more on local kinship, village communities, and court patronage.

rulingClass.zh: 拉惹萨王族、东爪哇宫廷贵族、受封地方领主以及与宫廷密切联系的婆罗门和高阶僧侣。
rulingClass.en: The Rajasa royal family, the East Javanese court nobility, enfeoffed regional lords, and Brahmins and senior clerics closely tied to the court.

succession.zh: 王位继承以王族血统与宫廷认可为基础，通常由君主指定继承人，但在贵族联盟、婚姻关系与军事支持的影响下，继承并非绝对固定。
succession.en: Succession was based on royal bloodline and court recognition, often with a designated heir, but it was not absolutely fixed and depended heavily on noble coalitions, marriage ties, and military support.

structure.zh: 中央政权围绕国王、王室宗庙、内廷官员与地方行政网络运作。核心地区由宫廷直接控制，外缘地区则通过臣属统治者、贡赋安排和远征压力维持服从。1280年前后，信诃沙里正积极将其权威投射到巴厘、巽他海峡与马来世界部分港口。
structure.en: The central state operated around the king, royal temple institutions, palace officials, and a regional administrative network. The core lands were directly controlled by the court, while peripheral zones were held through subordinate rulers, tribute arrangements, and expeditionary pressure. Around 1280, Singhasari was actively projecting authority toward Bali, the Sunda Strait, and parts of the Malay maritime world.

function.zh: 管理宫廷礼仪、王室地产、宴飨、宗庙事务与君主近侍。
function.en: Managed court ceremony, royal estates, feasting, dynastic shrines, and the king's immediate attendants.

function.zh: 征收稻米、劳役、地方贡品、港口税与手工业供纳，并统筹仓储与再分配。
function.en: Collected rice, labor dues, regional tribute, port taxes, and craft obligations, and supervised storage and redistribution.

function.zh: 联络地方领主、监督附庸、协调册封与朝贡关系，并处理叛乱或不服从问题。
function.en: Liaised with regional lords, supervised dependencies, coordinated investiture and tribute relations, and handled rebellion or non-compliance.

function.zh: 发布王命、确认地权、审理重大纠纷，并保存铭文与法律文书。
function.en: Issued royal commands, confirmed land rights, adjudicated major disputes, and preserved inscriptions and legal documents.

function.zh: 管理王室祭祀、寺院赐地、婆罗门与佛教僧团关系，并为王权提供宗教合法性。
function.en: Managed royal rites, temple land grants, relations with Brahmins and Buddhist clergy, and provided religious legitimacy to kingship.

function.zh: 监督沿海贸易点、征收关税、接待外来商人，并组织向群岛与马来地区的外交和商贸行动。
function.en: Supervised coastal trading points, collected customs duties, received foreign merchants, and organized diplomatic and commercial initiatives toward the archipelago and the Malay region.

function.zh: 征调宫廷卫队、地方武装、河海船队与远征兵力，维护核心地区安全。
function.en: Mobilized palace guards, regional levies, riverine and maritime forces, and expeditionary troops, and maintained security in the core territories.

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政依赖村社首领、地区贵族与受王命授权的官员共同运作。王室通过确认土地权利、赐地寺院、征发劳役与要求贡赋来维持控制；在较远地区则更多依靠附庸王公和海上盟友。
localAdmin.en: Local administration relied on village headmen, regional nobles, and royal appointees acting together. The crown maintained control by confirming land rights, granting estates to temples, mobilizing corvée labor, and demanding tribute; in more distant areas it depended more heavily on tributary princes and maritime allies.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系结合习惯法、王室敕令与印度化法理传统。土地边界、灌溉、水利、赋役、继承和地方秩序是主要裁判领域；重大案件由宫廷或高级贵族裁断，宗教机构也在某些地产纠纷中发挥作用。
legalSystem.en: The legal system combined customary law, royal edicts, and Indianized legal traditions. Land boundaries, irrigation, labor obligations, inheritance, and local order were the main domains of judgment; major cases were decided by the court or senior nobles, while religious institutions also played a role in some property disputes.

taxationSystem.zh: 财政来源以稻作地区的实物征收、劳役、地方贡赋、贸易税和市场收费为主。核心农业区按田地与产出承担供纳，港口和商道则提供关税与货物抽分。
taxationSystem.en: Fiscal income came chiefly from payments in kind from rice-growing regions, corvée labor, local tribute, trade duties, and market fees. Core agricultural lands supplied produce according to fields and output, while ports and trade routes yielded customs and shares of goods.

religion.zh: 国教与宫廷信仰呈湿婆教、佛教与本地祖灵崇拜并存的融合形态。克塔纳伽罗尤其以推动湿婆—佛教合一著称，借此强化王权神圣性并整合不同宗教群体。
religion.en: State and court religion took a syncretic form combining Shaivism, Buddhism, and local ancestral cults. Kertanegara was especially known for promoting a Shiva-Buddha synthesis, using it to strengthen the sacral prestige of kingship and integrate different religious communities.

philosophy.zh: 思想核心强调宇宙秩序、王权神圣、功德积累、轮回观念与政治统一。爪哇宫廷文化重视和谐、等级、仪式与神秘修行，并将君主视作维系天下秩序的中心。
philosophy.en: The intellectual core emphasized cosmic order, sacred kingship, merit, rebirth, and political unity. Javanese court culture valued harmony, hierarchy, ritual, and esoteric practice, viewing the monarch as the center sustaining worldly order.

writingSystem.zh: 主要使用古爪哇文与梵文书写传统，铭文常见于石刻与铜板文书，宫廷文学与宗教文献则采用古爪哇语和梵语词汇混合表达。
writingSystem.en: The kingdom primarily used Old Javanese writing alongside Sanskrit traditions. Inscriptions commonly appeared on stone and copperplate charters, while court literature and religious texts employed Old Javanese enriched with Sanskrit vocabulary.

culturalAchievements.zh: 东爪哇时期在宗教建筑、雕刻、铭文、王室祭祀艺术和文学传统方面成就显著。信诃沙里时代的寺庙建筑、湿婆佛合一观念以及后来的宫廷文学记忆，都体现了这一时期的文化创造力与政治雄心。
culturalAchievements.en: The East Javanese period achieved notable distinction in religious architecture, sculpture, inscriptions, royal ritual arts, and literary tradition. The temple culture of the Singhasari age, its Shiva-Buddha syncretism, and its later memorialization in court literature all reflect the era's cultural creativity and political ambition.

languageFamily.zh: 南岛语系，主要行政与日常语言为古爪哇语，宗教与高雅书写深受梵语影响。
languageFamily.en: Austronesian language family; Old Javanese was the principal administrative and everyday language, while religious and high literary expression was strongly influenced by Sanskrit.

unit.en: taels of silver equivalent per person

gdpDescription.zh: 信诃沙里的经济基础是东爪哇高产稻作、村社灌溉体系、手工业与海上贸易中转。其财富并非来自高度货币化的统一市场，而是来自农业剩余、港口抽税、属邦贡纳与对香料航线的影响力。
gdpDescription.en: Singhasari's economy rested on productive East Javanese rice agriculture, village irrigation systems, crafts, and maritime entrepôt trade. Its wealth did not derive from a fully monetized unified market, but from agrarian surplus, port taxation, tributary flows, and influence over the spice routes.

mainIndustries.zh: 稻米种植、椰子与棕榈产品、渔业、制盐、纺织、金属工艺、木作、造船、寺庙建筑、港口贸易与香料转运。
mainIndustries.en: Rice cultivation, coconut and palm products, fishing, salt production, textiles, metalworking, woodworking, shipbuilding, temple construction, port trade, and the transshipment of spices.

tradeGoods.zh: 出口或转运稻米、木材、盐、纺织品、爪哇工艺品，以及来自群岛东部的丁香、肉豆蔻等香料；输入印度纺织品、金属器、珠宝、陶瓷、奢侈品与宗教用品。
tradeGoods.en: It exported or re-exported rice, timber, salt, textiles, Javanese manufactures, and spices such as cloves and nutmeg from the eastern archipelago; it imported Indian textiles, metal goods, jewelry, ceramics, luxury items, and religious materials.

name.zh: 金银块、布匹与杂用货币并行
name.en: Mixed bullion, cloth, and transactional media

unitName.en: kati and local units of account

householdWealth.zh: 普通农村家庭的财富主要体现为稻田使用权、家屋、牲畜、工具、果树与亲族网络；富裕家庭和贵族则拥有灌溉良田、奴仆劳力、金饰和贸易联系。
householdWealth.en: For ordinary rural households, wealth mainly took the form of rights to rice fields, houses, livestock, tools, fruit trees, and kinship ties; wealthy families and nobles held irrigated land, dependent labor, gold ornaments, and trade connections.

unit.en: taels of silver equivalent per year

economicSystem.zh: 以农业剩余为基础、由宫廷再分配与地区贡赋支撑的混合经济，同时与印度洋—东南亚海上贸易网络紧密相连。政治控制和贸易控制彼此交织，远征往往兼具外交、征贡与商业目的。
economicSystem.en: A mixed economy based on agrarian surplus and supported by court redistribution and regional tribute, while closely tied to the Indian Ocean–Southeast Asian maritime trade network. Political control and trade control were intertwined, and expeditions often served diplomatic, tributary, and commercial purposes simultaneously.

source.zh: 农业实物征收与劳役折值
source.en: Agrarian dues in kind and labor commutation

source.zh: 属邦贡纳与海外附庸输送
source.en: Tribute from dependencies and overseas subordinates

source.zh: 王室地产、工坊与其他收入
source.en: Royal estates, workshops, and miscellaneous income

category.zh: 宗教建筑、寺院与赐地维护
category.en: Religious building, temples, and maintenance of grants

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库由金饰、银块、珠宝、贡物、储粮与可动员的王室物资共同构成，并不完全以铸币形式存在。由于财政高度依赖实物征收与再分配，仓储能力和地方忠诚与贵金属储备同样重要。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury consisted of gold ornaments, silver bullion, jewels, tribute goods, stored grain, and mobilizable royal supplies rather than existing wholly in coined form. Because finance depended heavily on collection in kind and redistribution, storage capacity and local loyalty mattered as much as precious-metal reserves.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策重在维持宫廷威望、奖赏忠诚贵族、支持宗教建筑并资助海上与外向扩张。克塔纳伽罗时期的国策倾向积极投入海外行动，以贸易与威望换取更大贡赋与战略纵深。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy prioritized maintaining court prestige, rewarding loyal nobles, supporting religious foundations, and financing maritime and outward expansion. Under Kertanegara, the state favored active investment in overseas ventures in order to secure larger tributary returns and strategic depth through trade and prestige.

unit.en: kati and local units of account

description.zh: 由宫廷直接供养的核心兵力，负责保卫都城、王室仪仗与重大军事行动中的中军。
description.en: The core force directly maintained by the court, responsible for defending the capital, serving in royal ceremony, and forming the central body in major campaigns.

description.zh: 由地方领主和臣属率领的征召部队，是战争时的主要兵源，战斗力因地区忠诚和装备水平而差异很大。
description.en: Levied troops led by regional lords and subordinates, forming the main wartime manpower pool, with effectiveness varying greatly by local loyalty and equipment.

description.zh: 爪哇骑兵规模有限，但贵族随从与精锐武士在突击、指挥和身份展示中具有重要作用。
description.en: Javanese cavalry was limited in scale, but noble retainers and elite warriors played an important role in shock action, command, and elite display.

description.zh: 用于沿岸航行、登陆作战、护送商旅和向群岛投送兵力，是信诃沙里扩张海上影响力的关键工具。
description.en: Used for coastal sailing, amphibious action, convoy protection, and projecting troops across the archipelago, this force was central to Singhasari's maritime expansion.

commanderInChief.zh: 克塔纳伽罗国王亲自统帅，日常由马哈帕提与高级贵族将领分掌军务
commanderInChief.en: King Kertanegara as supreme commander, with day-to-day military affairs handled by the mahapati and senior noble commanders

technology.zh: 军备以长矛、刀剑、弓、盾、甲衣和战舟为主，善于热带岛屿环境下的机动、河海联合作战和短期远征。火药武器尚未成为本地常备装备，但通过海贸网络对外来军事技术并非全无接触。
technology.en: Armament centered on spears, blades, bows, shields, armor, and war vessels, with strengths in mobility, river-sea coordination, and short expeditionary campaigns in tropical island environments. Gunpowder weapons were not yet standard local equipment, though maritime contacts exposed the kingdom to foreign military technologies.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自海上竞争者、附庸离心、爪哇内部贵族叛乱风险，以及北方蒙古帝国势力未来可能经由使节冲突或贸易政治介入南海—爪哇海区域。1280年时，最现实的挑战仍是维持对外扩张与本土稳定的平衡。
threats.en: The main threats came from maritime rivals, centrifugal tendencies among dependencies, the risk of noble rebellion within Java, and the future possibility of intervention by the Mongol imperial sphere through diplomatic conflict or trade politics in the South China Sea–Java Sea region. In 1280, the most immediate challenge was balancing outward expansion with stability at home.

description.zh: 常规训练体系，兵种有基本配合
description.en: Regular training regimen with basic unit coordination

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: 骑士标准双刃直剑，十字形护手
description.en: Knight's standard double-edged straight sword with cruciform guard

description.zh: 骑兵冲锋长矛，骑士战核心武器
description.en: Cavalry charge lance, core weapon of knightly warfare

description.zh: 全身钢板铠甲（晚期），防护力顶级
description.en: Full plate steel armor (late period), top-tier protection

populationDescription.zh: 人口主要集中于东爪哇稻作平原、河谷与灌溉区，山区和外岛控制区人口较稀疏。信诃沙里的实际统治力在核心农业区最强，对外围岛屿和海外据点则更依赖朝贡与影响力而非直接定居统治。
populationDescription.en: Population was concentrated in the rice plains, river valleys, and irrigated districts of East Java, while uplands and outlying controlled zones were more thinly settled. Singhasari's effective rule was strongest in the agrarian core; over peripheral islands and overseas points it relied more on tribute and influence than on direct settled administration.

name.zh: 苏拉巴亚港区前身聚落

socialClasses.zh: 上层为王族、贵族、祭司和高级官员；中层包括地方首领、商人、富农、工匠和军士；下层为普通农民、佃作者、依附劳役人口、奴婢及战俘。村社在经济与社会生活中极为重要，个人身份常与土地、宗庙和主从关系相连。
socialClasses.en: The upper strata consisted of the royal family, nobles, priests, and senior officials; the middle strata included local headmen, merchants, prosperous farmers, artisans, and soldiers; the lower strata comprised ordinary peasants, tenants, dependent laborers, slaves, and captives. The village community was central to economic and social life, and personal status was often tied to land, temples, and patron-client relations.

allies.zh: 主要通过附庸关系、婚姻网络和朝贡安排维系与巴厘、马都拉及群岛若干港口势力的合作，并试图拉拢马来半岛和苏门答腊部分政治体进入其影响圈。
allies.en: It maintained cooperation chiefly through tributary relations, marriage networks, and political arrangements with Bali, Madura, and several archipelagic port powers, while seeking to draw parts of the Malay Peninsula and Sumatra into its sphere.

enemies.zh: 并无与欧亚诸强的直接战争，但与爪哇内部反对贵族、独立倾向的外围势力以及海上竞争港口存在持续紧张。对昔日三佛齐势力范围的介入也造成潜在敌对关系。
enemies.en: It was not in direct war with the major Eurasian powers, but faced ongoing tensions with oppositional nobles within Java, autonomy-seeking peripheral powers, and competing maritime ports. Its interventions in former Srivijayan zones also created potential hostility.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交政策以“群岛外向扩张”为核心，追求控制海峡、港口和贸易节点，而非大规模直接吞并。克塔纳伽罗倾向通过远征、朝贡、象征臣服与宗教政治威望，将信诃沙里塑造成群岛霸主，并在更广阔的蒙古时代世界秩序中争取自主地位。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy centered on outward archipelagic expansion, aiming to control straits, ports, and trade nodes rather than to annex vast territories directly. Kertanegara sought through expeditions, tribute, symbolic submission, and religio-political prestige to cast Singhasari as a hegemon of the archipelago and to secure autonomous standing within the wider Mongol-era world order.

era.zh: 13世纪后期东南亚印度化海陆复合王国时代，处于蒙古帝国全球交流网络扩张背景之下
era.en: Late 13th-century Southeast Asian age of Indianized land-sea composite kingdoms, set against the expanding global exchange networks of the Mongol Empire

keyInnovations.zh: 先进稻作灌溉、热带海航经验、区域性造船、石雕与砖石宗教建筑、铜板文书管理，以及将宗教融合理念用于国家整合。虽然并非技术革命型国家，但其在农业组织和海上动员上的能力极具区域竞争力。
keyInnovations.en: Key strengths included advanced irrigated rice cultivation, tropical seafaring knowledge, regional shipbuilding, stone carving and brick religious architecture, copperplate charter administration, and the use of religious syncretism for state integration. Though not a state of technological revolution, it was highly competitive regionally in agricultural organization and maritime mobilization.

strengths.zh: 东爪哇农业稳固、宫廷文化高度整合、宗教合法性强，并能动员海上力量干预群岛贸易。克塔纳伽罗在位时，国家兼具军事活力、仪式威望与对外战略视野。
strengths.en: East Javanese agriculture was strong, court culture highly integrated, religious legitimacy powerful, and maritime forces capable of intervening in archipelagic trade. Under Kertanegara, the state combined military energy, ritual prestige, and strategic outward vision.

weaknesses.zh: 统治结构对贵族忠诚和地方合作依赖很深，直接行政覆盖有限；海外影响多为松散霸权，容易因远征成本、宫廷斗争或附庸反复而削弱。若中央过度外向扩张，内部安全可能出现裂缝。
weaknesses.en: The ruling structure depended heavily on noble loyalty and local cooperation, with limited direct administrative reach; overseas influence was often a loose hegemony vulnerable to expeditionary costs, court conflict, and wavering subordinates. If the center overextended abroad, internal security could weaken.

outlook.zh: 1280年的信诃沙里正处于权势高峰前夕，若能继续压制内部反对派并稳住海上属邦，其有望进一步主导爪哇与马来群岛贸易。但其激进扩张和高度个人化的王权也埋下危机，一旦宫廷政变或外部强权介入，局势将迅速逆转。
outlook.en: In 1280, Singhasari stood near the height of its power. If it could continue suppressing internal opposition and stabilize its maritime dependencies, it had the potential to dominate Javanese and Malay archipelagic trade more fully. Yet its aggressive expansion and highly personalized kingship also carried seeds of crisis: a court coup or intervention by an external great power could rapidly reverse its fortunes.

description.zh: 爪哇东部强国，正积极扩展对群岛海贸网络的影响。
description.en: The leading East Javanese kingdom, actively extending influence over archipelagic trade networks.

governmentForm.zh: 以曼陀罗体系运作的台族君主制，依靠宗主城邦、附庸首领与王室亲族共同统治
governmentForm.en: A Tai mandala-style monarchy, ruled through a core royal city, tributary chiefs, and members of the royal kin group

socialStructure.zh: 社会以王室与地方勐侯为上层，僧团与祭司居于精神权威位置，自由农民构成主体，并有工匠、商人、山地部族与战俘奴婢等阶层
socialStructure.en: Society was headed by the royal house and local mueang lords, with monks and ritual specialists holding spiritual authority; free cultivators formed the majority, alongside artisans, merchants, upland tribes, and war captives or dependents

rulingClass.zh: 孟莱王族、台族贵族勐侯、核心城邦首领与高级僧侣
rulingClass.en: The Mangrai royal lineage, Tai noble mueang lords, chiefs of core towns, and senior monks

succession.zh: 以王族世袭为原则，但常由国王在诸王子与宗亲中选择最有实力者，需获得贵族与地方首领承认
succession.en: Hereditary within the royal house in principle, but in practice the king selected among sons and close kinsmen, with succession requiring acceptance by nobles and local chiefs

structure.zh: 1280年的兰纳仍处于扩张整合阶段，中央机构较简约。国王驻于清莱，依赖宫廷亲信、王族、书记官、税吏与各勐领主治理诸谷地。政治重心在于征服、迁徙安置、修筑城寨、分封宗亲与整合附属首领。
structure.en: In 1280 Lan Na was still in an expansion and consolidation phase, so central institutions remained relatively compact. The king ruled from Chiang Rai through trusted courtiers, royal kinsmen, scribes, tax collectors, and the lords of individual mueang. Government centered on conquest, resettlement, fortification, the enfeoffment of royal relatives, and the incorporation of subordinate chiefs.

function.zh: 管理宫廷、王室土地、使者接待、礼仪与王命传达
function.en: Managed the court, royal lands, reception of envoys, court ritual, and transmission of royal orders

function.zh: 征收稻米、林产、布匹、劳役与贡赋，保管王仓与战时储备
function.en: Collected rice, forest products, textiles, labor dues, and tribute, and maintained royal granaries and reserves

function.zh: 组织亲军、征发附庸兵、管理象队、守城与边境行动
function.en: Organized the royal guard, levied tributary troops, managed elephant units, and oversaw defense and frontier operations

function.zh: 联络附属勐、确认首领效忠、处理婚盟、贡礼与争端调解
function.en: Maintained relations with subordinate mueang, confirmed chiefs in loyalty, and handled marriage alliances, tribute, and dispute mediation

function.zh: 负责文书记录、地契、口头判决的书面确认以及习惯法裁断
function.en: Handled records, land charters, written confirmation of oral judgments, and adjudication according to customary law

localAdmin.zh: 地方以“勐”为基本单位，由城主、王族亲属或归附旧首领治理。下辖村社负责灌溉、稻作、徭役与治安。中央对核心谷地控制较强，对边远山地多采取朝贡与羁縻方式。
localAdmin.en: The basic local unit was the mueang, ruled by town lords, royal relatives, or incorporated former chiefs. Villages beneath them handled irrigation, rice cultivation, labor obligations, and local order. The center exercised stronger control over core valleys, while more distant uplands were governed through tribute and loose overlordship.

legalSystem.zh: 法律以台族习惯法、王令、赔偿制度与宗教誓约为基础。案件多由地方首领、长老与僧侣参与调解，重视和解、罚物、人口转移与忠诚宣誓，重大案件由国王裁决。
legalSystem.en: Law rested on Tai customary practice, royal commands, compensation, and religious oaths. Many cases were mediated by local chiefs, elders, and monks, emphasizing settlement, fines in goods, population transfer, and oaths of loyalty, while major matters were judged by the king.

taxationSystem.zh: 财政主要来自稻米实物税、林产贡赋、手工业供纳、附属勐进贡与徭役。税收并非完全统一，常依谷地生产力、首领忠诚度与战争需要而调整。
taxationSystem.en: Fiscal income came chiefly from rice taxes in kind, tribute in forest goods, artisanal deliveries, contributions from subordinate mueang, and labor service. Taxation was not fully standardized and often varied by valley productivity, the loyalty of chiefs, and wartime needs.

religion.zh: 上座部佛教正在传播并与本地祖灵、城隍神、纳迦崇拜和巫仪传统并存，尚未形成后世那样完全制度化的僧团秩序
religion.en: Theravada Buddhism was spreading and coexisted with local ancestor cults, tutelary spirits, naga worship, and ritual traditions; the monastic order had not yet become as fully institutionalized as in later centuries

philosophy.zh: 政治理念强调王者护持佛法、积德建功与以仁威并用统一诸勐，同时保留台族重血缘、盟誓与地方自主的观念
philosophy.en: Political thought emphasized the ruler as protector of the faith, accruing merit through righteous rule and conquest, while preserving Tai ideas of kinship, oath-bonding, and local autonomy

writingSystem.zh: 1280年前后的兰纳文书文化仍有限，行政与外交可借用孟文、高棉文或口头传统；独立成熟的泰阮文字体系尚在形成之前
writingSystem.en: Around 1280 written culture in Lan Na remained limited; administration and diplomacy could draw on Mon, Khmer, or oral traditions, while the later fully developed Tai Tham script had not yet emerged

culturalAchievements.zh: 建城与筑壕技术、灌溉谷地开发、佛寺与圣地营造、台族口述史诗与谱系记忆、通过迁民与联盟形成多族群整合，是这一时期最显著的文化成就
culturalAchievements.en: The most notable cultural achievements of the period were urban foundation and moat construction, irrigated valley development, the establishment of monasteries and sacred sites, Tai oral epics and genealogical memory, and multiethnic integration through resettlement and alliance

languageFamily.zh: 主要语言属于侗台语系西南台语支，并与孟语、克木语、掸语及其他山地语言长期接触
languageFamily.en: The main language belonged to the Southwestern Tai branch of the Kra-Dai family and existed in sustained contact with Mon, Khmuic, Shan, and other upland languages

gdpDescription.zh: 兰纳经济在区域层面相当兴盛，但仍以农业实物产出为主。若折算为银，其总量在中等规模东南亚内陆王国中颇具竞争力，财富集中于稻谷盈余、人口控制、林产与区域贸易节点，而非高度货币化市场。
gdpDescription.en: Lan Na's economy was thriving on a regional scale but remained based chiefly on agricultural output in kind. When expressed in silver value, its total product was competitive for a medium-sized inland Southeast Asian kingdom, with wealth concentrated in rice surpluses, control of manpower, forest goods, and regional trade nodes rather than in a highly monetized market.

mainIndustries.zh: 水稻农业、灌溉工程、林产采集、象与马等役畜经营、织布、木工、冶铁、陶器与区域转运贸易
mainIndustries.en: Wet-rice agriculture, irrigation works, forest extraction, management of elephants and horses, weaving, carpentry, ironworking, pottery, and regional transit trade

tradeGoods.zh: 稻米、食盐、漆、蜂蜡、木材、象牙、犀角、药材、棉布、铁器、铜器、牲畜以及来自外部的珠饰与奢侈品
tradeGoods.en: Rice, salt, lacquer, beeswax, timber, ivory, rhinoceros horn, medicinal products, cotton cloth, iron tools, copperware, livestock, and imported beads and luxury goods

name.en: Bullion silver and barter in parallel use

householdWealth.zh: 普通家庭的财富主要体现在稻田、灌溉份额、水牛、房屋、织机、储粮与亲族劳动力。贵族和城主则控制更多人口、田地、林地、战利品和贡赋网络。
householdWealth.en: For ordinary households, wealth lay mainly in paddy land, irrigation shares, buffaloes, houses, looms, stored grain, and kin labor. Nobles and town lords controlled larger populations, fields, woodland, war booty, and tribute networks.

economicSystem.zh: 以王权支配人口和谷地资源的农业贡赋经济，辅以城邦间交换、长途商旅与战利品再分配。市场存在，但主要经济关系仍通过徭役、附庸义务和宗族网络组织。
economicSystem.en: An agrarian tribute economy in which royal power rested on the control of manpower and valley resources, supplemented by inter-mueang exchange, long-distance merchants, and redistribution of war gains. Markets existed, but most economic relations were still organized through labor service, vassal obligations, and kin networks.

source.en: Agricultural taxes in kind and land dues
Commuted labor obligations and service deliveries

category.en: Army, elephant corps, and frontier defense

category.zh: 地方安抚、附庸赏赐与婚盟
category.en: Provincial pacification, vassal gifts, and marriage alliances

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库并非纯粹以银储存，而是由银锭、铜器、珠宝、粮仓储备、布匹、武器、役象以及可随时征调的人力共同构成。按银值折算，其储备足以支持数次中等规模远征或连续歉年救济。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was not held purely in silver; it consisted of bullion, copper goods, ornaments, granary stocks, textiles, weapons, elephants, and manpower that could be mobilized when needed. In silver-equivalent terms, reserves were sufficient to support several medium-scale campaigns or relief over successive poor harvests.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策偏向扩张型与整合型：通过征服新谷地、迁民屯垦、强化贡赋关系和修建基础设施来扩大税基，同时维持适度结余以应对战争与歉收。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy was expansionary and integrative: the court sought to widen its tax base through conquest of new valleys, resettlement, stronger tribute relations, and investment in infrastructure, while preserving a modest surplus against war and bad harvests.

description.zh: 由国王直属的核心步兵组成，驻守都城与主要城寨，装备长矛、刀剑、盾牌与弓弩
description.en: The king's directly controlled core infantry, stationed in the capital and main forts, equipped with spears, swords, shields, and bows or crossbows

description.zh: 战时由各地首领率领前来效命，是兰纳军力主体，人数波动大，训练程度不一
description.en: The main body of Lan Na's field force, brought by local chiefs in wartime; numbers fluctuated and quality varied considerably

description.zh: 主要用于冲击、指挥平台、威慑和运输，在山谷战争中具有重要政治与战术象征
description.en: Used chiefly for shock action, command platforms, intimidation, and transport, with strong political and tactical significance in valley warfare

description.zh: 数量有限，多承担传令、侦察、突袭和追击任务，马匹来源不稳定
description.en: Limited in number, they mainly handled dispatch carrying, reconnaissance, raiding, and pursuit, with horse supply not always reliable

description.zh: 由城镇居民和平时不脱产农民构成，负责守门、修壕、运粮与地方防御
description.en: Composed of townsmen and part-time cultivators, responsible for gates, moat repair, grain transport, and local defense

commanderInChief.en: King Mangrai in person as commander-in-chief

technology.zh: 军备以冷兵器时代技术为主，善于城寨构筑、竹木工事、弓弩、长矛、刀剑与战象运用；尚未形成火药武器体系。后勤依托谷地仓储、河谷道路与民夫运输。
technology.en: Military technology was that of a late pre-gunpowder age, with strengths in fortification, bamboo-and-timber fieldworks, bows and crossbows, spears, swords, and war elephants; no gunpowder weapon system yet existed. Logistics relied on valley granaries, river routes, and porter labor.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自与素可泰在泰北谷地的竞争、与蒲甘势力及掸地诸首领的边境摩擦，以及扩张过快导致附属勐离心。来自元朝的威胁更多是间接的区域压力，而非直接入侵兰纳腹地。
threats.en: The main threats came from rivalry with Sukhothai over northern Tai valleys, frontier friction with Pagan's sphere and Shan chiefs, and the centrifugal tendencies of rapidly acquired subordinate mueang. Pressure from the Yuan was more an indirect regional factor than an immediate invasion threat to Lan Na's heartland.

description.zh: 初步正规化，有季节性操练
description.en: Semi-professional, seasonal drills

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: 骑士标准双刃直剑，十字形护手
description.en: Knight's standard double-edged straight sword with cruciform guard

description.zh: 伊斯兰世界弯刀，轻便利于骑战劈斩
description.en: Islamic curved sword, light and ideal for mounted slashing

description.zh: 英格兰长弓手主力弓，射程可达300步
description.en: English longbow, effective range up to 300 paces

populationDescription.zh: 人口主要集中于清莱周边及诸河谷盆地，稻作区人口密度较高，山地则分布较稀疏的部族聚落。国家正在通过战争与迁徙吸纳新的居民与劳动力。
populationDescription.en: Population was concentrated above all in the valleys around Chiang Rai and other river basins, with relatively dense settlement in paddy zones and sparser tribal communities in the uplands. The kingdom was actively absorbing new inhabitants and labor through warfare and resettlement.

socialClasses.zh: 王族与勐侯、僧侣与宗教人士、自由农民、工匠与商人、附庸山地部族、战俘与依附人口构成主要阶层。身份并非绝对僵化，但政治与军事服役义务差异明显。
socialClasses.en: The main social strata were the royal family and mueang lords, monks and religious specialists, free cultivators, artisans and merchants, tributary upland tribes, and war captives or dependent populations. Status was not absolutely rigid, but political and military obligations varied greatly.

allies.zh: 兰纳的盟友关系多属流动性质，通常依靠婚盟、共同敌人和临时结盟维系；与部分台族城邦及若干地方首领保持友好或臣属关系
allies.en: Lan Na's alliances were fluid, usually maintained through marriage, common enemies, and temporary coalitions; it enjoyed friendly or subordinate relations with some Tai towns and various local chiefs

enemies.zh: 最主要的竞争对手是素可泰，其次是在西部与西北方向有影响力的蒲甘残余势力、掸地诸侯以及不稳定的边境首领
enemies.en: Its chief rival was Sukhothai, followed by remnants of Pagan influence to the west and northwest, Shan lords, and unstable frontier chiefs

foreignPolicy.zh: 对外政策以扩张北泰谷地控制、争取贸易通道、吸纳附庸首领和避免被更大强权直接吞并为核心。兰纳倾向于在强邻之间保持弹性，通过贡礼、婚盟与军事行动交替使用来扩大影响。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy focused on extending control over northern Tai valleys, securing trade routes, absorbing tributary chiefs, and avoiding direct subordination to larger powers. Lan Na sought flexibility among stronger neighbors, alternating tribute, marriage alliances, and military action to expand its influence.

era.zh: 十三世纪东南亚内陆铁器与灌溉扩张时代
era.en: 13th-century mainland Southeast Asian iron-age and irrigation expansion era

keyInnovations.zh: 谷地水利系统扩展、城寨壕沟建设、铁制农具与兵器普及、战象军事组织、跨山地交通与多族群人口迁置技术，是兰纳崛起的关键条件
keyInnovations.en: The extension of valley irrigation systems, moated fortification building, wider use of iron agricultural tools and weapons, military organization around elephants, and practical methods of upland communication and multiethnic resettlement were the key conditions behind Lan Na's rise

strengths.zh: 兰纳在1280年最大的优势是充满活力的开国统治者、持续扩张的谷地农业、灵活的曼陀罗政治结构以及整合多族群边地的能力。其地理位置使其能连接掸地、上缅甸与中南半岛北部贸易网络。
strengths.en: Lan Na's greatest strengths in 1280 were its energetic founding ruler, expanding valley agriculture, flexible mandala political structure, and ability to integrate a multiethnic frontier. Its location allowed it to connect trade networks linking Shan regions, Upper Burma, and northern mainland Southeast Asia.

weaknesses.zh: 其弱点在于中央制度尚不成熟、对地方首领依赖较深、文字行政和税制标准化不足、军事动员受季节与地形限制，且新征服地区可能迅速反叛。
weaknesses.en: Its weaknesses lay in still immature central institutions, deep dependence on local chiefs, limited written administration and tax standardization, military mobilization constrained by season and terrain, and the possibility of rapid revolt in newly conquered areas.

outlook.zh: 若孟莱能够继续击败竞争性台族政权、稳住西方边境并推动宗教与行政整合，兰纳有望在未来数十年成长为北方强国；但若继承发生争斗或附庸离散，其扩张成果也可能很快瓦解。
outlook.en: If Mangrai could continue defeating rival Tai powers, stabilize the western frontier, and deepen religious and administrative integration, Lan Na could grow into a major northern power over the coming decades; yet succession conflict or vassal fragmentation could quickly undo these gains.

description.zh: 泰北新兴政权，整合山间谷地并与缅甸、素可泰竞争。
description.en: A rising northern Tai polity integrating upland valleys while competing with Burma and Sukhothai.

governmentForm.zh: 以王权为核心、带有父王式统治色彩的上座部佛教君主制，依靠宗主—附庸关系统辖周边城邦
governmentForm.en: A Theravada Buddhist monarchy centered on royal authority, marked by a paternal style of rule and sustained through suzerain-vassal ties over surrounding mueang city-states

socialStructure.zh: 社会以国王与王族为顶层，其下为地方统治者、僧团、自由农民、工匠、商人及战俘与依附人口；各地以“勐”或城邦为基本组织单位，地方首领向素可泰纳贡并保持一定自治。
socialStructure.en: Society was headed by the king and royal kin, followed by local rulers, the Buddhist sangha, free peasantry, artisans, merchants, and war captives or dependent populations; the basic unit was the mueang city-state, whose chiefs paid tribute to Sukhothai while retaining limited autonomy.

rulingClass.zh: 帕銮王族、王室姻亲、受封地方领主以及与宫廷关系密切的高级僧侣
rulingClass.en: The Phra Ruang royal house, royal in-laws, enfeoffed local lords, and senior monks closely connected to the court

succession.zh: 王位继承以王族内部推举与长幼、威望、军事能力相结合，并非绝对固定的长子继承制
succession.en: Succession combined dynastic selection within the royal house with considerations of seniority, prestige, and military capacity, rather than following a strictly fixed primogeniture system

structure.zh: 素可泰政体尚未形成高度文官化中央官僚，而是由国王直接统摄王都、宗室成员分掌要地、地方城主作为附庸治理各勐；行政、财政、司法与军事职能彼此重叠，宫廷与宗教机构在治理中作用显著。
structure.en: The Sukhothai polity had not yet developed a heavily bureaucratized central civil administration; instead, the king directly controlled the capital, royal kinsmen managed major centers, and local city lords governed subordinate mueang as vassals. Administrative, fiscal, judicial, and military functions overlapped, while court and religious institutions played major roles in governance.

function.zh: 管理宫廷、王室财产、礼仪、使节接待与御用仓储
function.en: Managed the court, royal estates, ceremonies, reception of envoys, and royal storehouses

function.zh: 征收田赋、劳役、森林与矿产收入，并登记附庸城邦贡品
function.en: Collected land tax, labor obligations, revenue from forests and minerals, and recorded tribute from subordinate city-states

function.zh: 协调各附庸城邦、任命或确认地方首领、处理边地纠纷与忠诚关系
function.en: Coordinated subordinate city-states, appointed or confirmed local chiefs, and handled frontier disputes and loyalty relations

function.zh: 负责征发兵员、整备武器、组织象队与边境防务
function.en: Oversaw troop levies, weapon preparation, organization of elephant corps, and frontier defense

function.zh: 审理重大案件、接受民众申诉，并依习惯法、王命与佛教伦理裁断争端
function.en: Heard major cases, received popular petitions, and judged disputes according to customary law, royal command, and Buddhist moral principles

function.zh: 维护堤坝、水池、渠道与稻田开发，保障农业生产
function.en: Maintained embankments, reservoirs, canals, and paddy expansion to support agricultural production

function.zh: 资助寺院、管理施舍土地、主持佛教法会并刻立王室铭文
function.en: Supported monasteries, managed donated lands, organized Buddhist ceremonies, and commissioned royal inscriptions

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政采取分层城邦体系：核心区域由王室直接控制，近附庸由亲王或忠诚领主镇守，远方城邦则通过纳贡、婚姻、交换人质和军事威慑维持臣属关系。地方首领负责治安、征税、征发劳役与兵员。
localAdmin.en: Local administration followed a tiered city-state system: the core zone was directly ruled by the crown, nearer dependencies were governed by princes or loyal lords, and more distant mueang were kept subordinate through tribute, marriage ties, hostage exchange, and military pressure. Local rulers handled order, taxation, labor levies, and troop mobilization.

legalSystem.zh: 法律主要建立在泰人习惯法、王命裁决、地方惯例与佛教伦理之上，尚未形成后世那样系统成文法。国王被视为最高裁判者，重大纠纷可直接上达王廷。
legalSystem.en: Law rested mainly on Tai customary practice, royal judgments, local precedent, and Buddhist ethics, and had not yet become a fully systematized written code of the later type. The king was regarded as the supreme judge, and important disputes could be appealed directly to the royal court.

taxationSystem.zh: 财政收入来自稻田赋税、森林产出、矿产、手工业贡纳、市场关税以及附庸城邦的贡品；税收往往以实物、劳役和地方性贡输形式征收，而非完全货币化。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came from paddy taxes, forest produce, minerals, craft tribute, market dues, and tribute from subordinate mueang; taxation was often collected in kind, labor service, and localized tribute rather than in fully monetized form.

religion.zh: 以上座部佛教为主，并融合地方万物有灵信仰、祖先崇拜与婆罗门礼仪；1280年前后素可泰正积极接受来自斯里兰卡与孟人地区的佛教影响。
religion.en: Theravada Buddhism predominated, blended with local animist beliefs, ancestor veneration, and Brahmanical court ritual; around 1280 Sukhothai was actively absorbing Buddhist influences from Sri Lanka and Mon cultural zones.

philosophy.zh: 政治与伦理观念强调佛教功德、仁王理想、布施与公正统治，同时保留泰人“父王爱民”的统治观。
philosophy.en: Political and ethical thought emphasized Buddhist merit, the ideal of the righteous king, generosity, and just rule, while preserving the Tai notion of a paternal ruler caring for his people.

writingSystem.zh: 素可泰时期与兰甘亨相关的泰文字传统正在形成，以古高棉文字与孟文书写传统为基础发展出早期泰文书写体系。
writingSystem.en: An early Thai writing tradition associated with the Sukhothai age and Ram Khamhaeng was taking shape, developing from Old Khmer and Mon scribal models into an early Thai script system.

culturalAchievements.zh: 素可泰文化成就包括早期泰文铭文传统、佛寺建筑、佛像铸造、以水利与城市规划结合的都城建设，以及将泰语王权表达与佛教宇宙观结合起来的政治文化。此期也为后世泰国艺术风格奠定基础。
culturalAchievements.en: Sukhothai’s cultural achievements included the early Thai inscriptional tradition, temple construction, bronze Buddha casting, urban planning integrated with water management, and a political culture that fused Thai-language kingship with Buddhist cosmology. The period also laid foundations for later Thai artistic styles.

languageFamily.zh: 台语族（侗台语系），同时宫廷与宗教场域受高棉语、孟语与巴利语影响
languageFamily.en: Tai languages of the Kra-Dai family, with Khmer, Mon, and Pali exerting influence in courtly and religious contexts

gdpDescription.zh: 素可泰经济以稻作农业为核心，配合林产、象役、陶器、金属加工和区域贸易。以13世纪东南亚标准看，其经济处于上升阶段，核心平原和贸易节点表现活跃，但整体仍以农业与实物征收为主，货币流通有限。
gdpDescription.en: The Sukhothai economy was centered on wet-rice agriculture, supplemented by forest products, elephant labor, ceramics, metalworking, and regional trade. By 13th-century Southeast Asian standards it was in a rising phase, with active core plains and trade nodes, though the broader economy remained primarily agrarian and based on in-kind extraction with limited monetization.

mainIndustries.zh: 水稻种植、灌溉农业、森林采集、象役与畜养、陶瓷烧造、青铜与铁器加工、木材贸易、地方纺织与盐产
mainIndustries.en: Rice cultivation, irrigated agriculture, forest extraction, elephant keeping and labor, ceramic production, bronze and iron working, timber trade, local textiles, and salt production

tradeGoods.zh: 稻米、盐、木材、漆、蜂蜡、象、象牙、犀角、鹿皮、陶器、金属器、棉布，以及从外部输入的珠宝、精细织物与宗教用品
tradeGoods.en: Rice, salt, timber, lacquer, beeswax, elephants, ivory, rhinoceros horn, deer hides, ceramics, metal goods, cotton cloth, and imported luxuries such as jewels, fine textiles, and religious items

name.en: Silver baht equivalent with in-kind tribute

householdWealth.zh: 普通农户的财富主要体现在稻田使用权、水牛、工具、粮食储备与家族劳力；地方首领和寺院掌握较多土地、劳役与奢侈品。
householdWealth.en: Ordinary household wealth was mainly embodied in access to paddy land, buffaloes, tools, stored grain, and family labor; local lords and monasteries controlled larger shares of land, service obligations, and luxury goods.

unit.en: Sukhothai silver baht equivalent per year

economicSystem.zh: 以王权监督下的农业贡纳经济为主体，结合地方市场交换、附庸进贡和区域性长途贸易；寺院、地方领主与王室共同参与资源再分配。
economicSystem.en: An agrarian tribute economy under royal supervision, combined with local market exchange, vassal tribute, and regional long-distance trade; monasteries, local lords, and the crown all participated in resource redistribution.

source.en: Land tax and commuted labor obligations
Forest, mineral, and royal estate income

category.en: Court, royal household, and patronage to local lords

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库以银、金饰、粮仓储备、象匹、武器和贡品存货共同构成，纯粹铸币或金属现金储备有限，但王室掌握可迅速动员的实物资源。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury consisted of silver, gold ornaments, granary reserves, elephants, weapons, and stored tribute goods; purely monetized bullion reserves were limited, but the crown controlled substantial in-kind resources that could be mobilized quickly.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策总体偏向宽缓征收与王室恩惠分配，以维持地方忠诚和鼓励垦殖；在扩张时期则通过附庸贡纳和边地整合增加收入，而非建立沉重统一税制。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy generally favored relatively light extraction and royal redistribution to preserve local loyalty and encourage cultivation; in times of expansion, the kingdom increased revenue through tributary inflows and frontier integration rather than through a heavy uniform tax regime.

description.zh: 驻守都城与核心地区，负责王宫护卫、快速出征和镇压叛乱，以长矛、刀剑、弓弩为主。
description.en: Stationed in the capital and core region, this force protected the palace, served in rapid campaigns, and suppressed rebellions, using spears, swords, and bows or crossbows.

description.zh: 由附庸城邦和地方首领在战时提供，数量大于训练水平，适合守城、运输与区域作战。
description.en: Raised by subordinate mueang and local chiefs in wartime, these forces were larger than their training quality and were suited to garrison duty, transport, and regional warfare.

description.zh: 作为王权象征与战场冲击力量，用于指挥、突破和威慑，常由精锐卫士伴随。
description.en: Serving as both a symbol of kingship and a battlefield shock arm, war elephants were used for command, breakthrough operations, and intimidation, often escorted by elite guards.

description.zh: 规模不大，主要承担侦察、传令、追击和联络，受地形与马匹供给限制。
description.en: Small in scale, these forces mainly carried out reconnaissance, messaging, pursuit, and communications, limited by terrain and horse supply.

description.zh: 负责沿河运输、物资补给、渡口控制和在低地水网中的机动作战。
description.en: Responsible for river transport, supply movement, ferry control, and maneuver operations in lowland water networks.

technology.zh: 军备以铁制刀矛、弓箭、盾牌、皮甲与战象运用为主，攻城器械较简，尚未见火药兵器成体系使用；军事优势更多来自机动征召、地形熟悉和城邦网络。
technology.en: Armament centered on iron swords and spears, bows, shields, leather armor, and the use of war elephants; siege equipment was relatively simple, and gunpowder weapons were not yet employed systematically. Military advantages rested more on flexible levies, knowledge of terrain, and the city-state network.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自与高棉吴哥势力的竞争、缅甸蒲甘衰落后留下的权力真空、北方兰纳等泰人政权的潜在角逐，以及附庸城邦忠诚不稳所导致的内部离心。
threats.en: Major threats came from rivalry with the Khmer power at Angkor, the power vacuum left by Pagan’s decline, potential competition from northern Tai polities such as Lan Na, and internal centrifugal tendencies caused by uncertain loyalty among subordinate mueang.

description.zh: 常规训练体系，兵种有基本配合
description.en: Regular training regimen with basic unit coordination

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: 全身钢板铠甲（晚期），防护力顶级
description.en: Full plate steel armor (late period), top-tier protection

description.zh: 拜占庭海战秘密武器，水上不灭之火
description.en: Byzantine naval secret weapon, inextinguishable fire on water

description.zh: 英格兰长弓手主力弓，射程可达300步
description.en: English longbow, effective range up to 300 paces

populationDescription.zh: 人口主要集中在素可泰核心平原、灌溉稻作区和附庸城邦周边。族群以泰人群体为主，并包含孟人、高棉人、山地部族和被纳入统治的边地居民。人口增长受益于农业扩展与区域政治整合。
populationDescription.en: The population was concentrated in the Sukhothai core plains, irrigated rice zones, and the areas surrounding subordinate mueang. The population was predominantly Tai, but also included Mon, Khmer, upland groups, and frontier peoples incorporated into the kingdom. Growth was supported by agricultural expansion and regional political consolidation.

socialClasses.zh: 社会阶层可概括为王族与贵族、地方城主、僧侣、自由农民、工匠与商人、依附劳役人口及战俘。与后世更严密的等级制相比，此时社会仍保有较强地方流动性，但政治权力和资源明显集中于王室、领主与寺院。
socialClasses.en: Social classes may be summarized as royalty and nobles, local city lords, monks, free peasants, artisans and merchants, dependent laborers, and war captives. Compared with later more rigid hierarchies, society still retained significant local fluidity, but political power and resources were clearly concentrated in the crown, the lords, and the monasteries.

allies.zh: 素可泰通过宗主关系、婚姻联结和共同对抗吴哥影响，与若干泰人及上湄南河城邦保持合作；同时可能寻求与元朝建立朝贡性接触以提升合法性和贸易机会。
allies.en: Through suzerain ties, marriage connections, and common opposition to Angkorian influence, Sukhothai maintained cooperation with several Tai and upper Chao Phraya city-states; it also likely sought tributary-style contact with the Yuan to enhance legitimacy and trade opportunity.

enemies.zh: 主要对手是吴哥帝国在中南半岛西部与湄南河流域的残余影响力，此外还包括不稳定或反复脱离的附庸城邦，以及在北方可能与其争夺势力范围的兰纳政权。
enemies.en: Its principal rival was the residual influence of the Angkorian Empire in western mainland Southeast Asia and the Chao Phraya basin, along with unstable or rebellious subordinate mueang and the northern Lan Na polity as a possible competitor for regional influence.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交方针以区域扩张、吸纳附庸、保持贸易通道和借助佛教文化提升王权合法性为核心；其政策务实灵活，既使用武力，也依赖朝贡、赐予、联姻与宗教赞助。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy centered on regional expansion, incorporation of tributaries, preservation of trade routes, and the enhancement of royal legitimacy through Buddhist culture; it was pragmatic and flexible, using force when needed but also relying on tribute, gifts, marriage alliances, and religious patronage.

era.zh: 13世纪晚期东南亚中世纪王国时代
era.en: Late 13th-century medieval mainland Southeast Asian kingdom era

keyInnovations.zh: 关键技术与制度进展包括灌溉与蓄水工程、早期泰文字形成、青铜佛像铸造、陶瓷生产提升、城市与寺院规划，以及更成熟的区域交通与贡纳整合机制。
keyInnovations.en: Key technological and institutional advances included irrigation and reservoir works, the emergence of early Thai script, bronze Buddha casting, improved ceramic production, urban and temple planning, and more mature systems of regional transport and tributary integration.

strengths.zh: 素可泰在1280年前后最显著的优势是政治上升势头强、王权个人魅力突出、农业基础稳固、附庸网络扩展迅速，并能将佛教文化、城市建设与军事扩张结合起来。其统治方式较为灵活，适合整合新征服地区。
strengths.en: Sukhothai’s greatest strengths around 1280 were its strong political momentum, the personal authority of the king, a solid agrarian base, a rapidly expanding tributary network, and the ability to combine Buddhist culture, urban development, and military expansion. Its style of rule was flexible and well suited to integrating newly subordinated territories.

weaknesses.zh: 其弱点在于中央官僚制度尚不发达，对地方忠诚高度依赖个人关系；疆域扩张越快，附庸离心风险越大。经济虽繁荣上升，但货币化程度和远程贸易控制力仍有限，难以长期支撑高度集权国家机器。
weaknesses.en: Its weaknesses lay in an underdeveloped central bureaucracy and a heavy dependence on personal relationships for local loyalty; the faster the realm expanded, the greater the centrifugal risk among tributaries. Though prosperous and rising, the economy remained only partly monetized and had limited control over long-distance trade, making it difficult to sustain a highly centralized state apparatus over the long term.

outlook.zh: 短期前景乐观：在兰甘亨统治下，素可泰很可能继续扩大在上湄南河与邻近泰人城邦中的影响力，并强化文化声望。长期来看，其命运将取决于王位继承是否稳定、能否把个人统治转化为持久制度，以及如何应对吴哥、兰纳和后来更强大泰人政权的竞争。
outlook.en: The short-term outlook was favorable: under Ram Khamhaeng, Sukhothai was likely to continue expanding its influence in the upper Chao Phraya region and among neighboring Tai polities while strengthening its cultural prestige. In the longer term, its fate would depend on stable succession, the conversion of personal kingship into durable institutions, and its response to competition from Angkor, Lan Na, and later stronger Tai states.

description.zh: 新兴泰族王国，正迅速扩展其在上湄南河地区的影响。
description.en: A rising Tai kingdom rapidly expanding its influence in the upper Chao Phraya region.

governmentForm.zh: 以皇帝为核心的儒家官僚君主制，兼具宗室军事贵族色彩
governmentForm.en: A Confucian bureaucratic monarchy centered on the emperor, with strong royal-clan military aristocratic features

socialStructure.zh: 社会由皇族与宗室贵族、文武官僚、地方豪族、僧侣、农民、工匠、商人及少量奴婢构成。红河平原的村社是基层社会核心，国家通过宗室、官僚与乡社共同治理。
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of the royal house and princely aristocracy, civil and military officials, local notable families, monks, peasants, artisans, merchants, and a smaller servile population. Village communities in the Red River plain formed the basic social unit, and the state governed through a combination of royal kin, officials, and local communes.

rulingClass.zh: 陈氏皇族、受封王侯、中央高级文武官员与依附朝廷的地方豪族
rulingClass.en: The Trần imperial clan, enfeoffed princes and marquises, senior central civil and military officials, and local notable lineages tied to the court

succession.zh: 名义上为皇室世袭，通常由皇帝在宗室内指定继承人；陈朝常实行皇帝提前禅位于太子、太上皇继续掌政与辅政的制度。1280年实际为圣宗太上皇与仁宗皇帝并存。
succession.en: Formally hereditary within the royal house, with the emperor typically designating an heir from the dynasty. The Trần commonly practiced early abdication to the crown prince, after which the retired emperor continued to wield major authority. In 1280, real power was shared by Retired Emperor Thánh Tông and Emperor Nhân Tông.

structure.zh: 中央政府以皇帝与太上皇为最高权威，下设中书、尚书、御史等机构，并由六部性质的行政体系、国子监、翰林与军事统帅机关协同运作。地方分路、府、州、县，由朝廷任命或认可的官员与土豪共同管理。
structure.en: The central government was headed by the emperor and retired emperor as supreme authorities, beneath whom operated secretariat, executive, and censorial organs, alongside ministries, the National Academy, Hanlin-style scholarly offices, and military command institutions. Locally, the realm was divided into circuits, prefectures, provinces, and districts administered by court-appointed or court-recognized officials in cooperation with local notable families.

function.zh: 起草诏令、协调朝政、承接皇帝与太上皇意旨
function.en: Drafted edicts, coordinated state affairs, and transmitted the will of the emperor and retired emperor

function.zh: 统辖政务执行、户籍、赋税、工程、军需与官员任用的日常行政
function.en: Oversaw routine administration including registration, taxation, works, military supply, and implementation of appointments

function.zh: 监察官员、纠举贪渎、审议重大政令执行情况
function.en: Supervised officials, investigated corruption, and reviewed implementation of major policies

function.zh: 培养官员后备、教授经学与礼制、主持高等教育
function.en: Trained future officials, taught the classics and ritual, and served as the leading institution of higher learning

function.zh: 负责诏诰文书、史书编修、礼仪与学术咨询
function.en: Handled court documents, historical compilation, ritual matters, and scholarly consultation

function.zh: 掌军事调度、边防部署、水陆军征发与战备
function.en: Managed military mobilization, frontier deployments, naval and land forces, and war preparedness

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政依红河核心区与外缘山区而有差异。核心稻作地区由朝廷任命知府、知州、县令等官治理；边缘地区则依赖羁縻安排、土官与地方首领。村社拥有较强自治能力，负责赋役分摊、堤坝维护与治安协作。
localAdmin.en: Local administration varied between the Red River core and upland frontier zones.
