taels of silver equivalent per year
taels of silver equivalent per year

treasuryDescription.zh: 王室财富多以贡粮、细席、树皮布、贝饰、鲸齿与大型独木舟等形式储存，而非铸币金库。
treasuryDescription.en: Royal wealth was stored chiefly in tribute foods, fine mats, barkcloth, shell valuables, whale teeth, and large canoes rather than in a coined treasury.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策强调通过贡赋汇集资源，再以礼仪和馈赠维系统治合法性与岛屿忠诚。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy emphasized assembling resources through tribute and redistributing them through ceremony and gifts to sustain legitimacy and island loyalty.

description.zh: 保卫图伊汤加与穆阿核心区域，由王室直接召集的精锐战士组成。
description.en: Protected the Tu'i Tonga and the Mu'a core area, consisting of elite warriors directly mustered by the royal house.

description.zh: 由地方酋长按义务提供，适于陆上冲突与岛际远征。
description.en: Supplied by local chiefs under obligation, suitable for land conflict and inter-island expeditions.

description.zh: 负责运兵、护航与跨岛打击，依托大型双体或远航独木舟。
description.en: Handled transport, escort, and inter-island strike operations using large double-hulled or seagoing canoes.

commanderInChief.zh: 图伊汤加及其任命的高级贵族统帅
commanderInChief.en: The Tu'i Tonga and appointed high nobles

technology.zh: 军事技术建立在高水平航海、独木舟制造、木制兵器和严密动员能力之上。武器以棍棒、矛、投掷器具与防护编织物为主，海上运输能力是其核心优势。
technology.en: Military technology rested on advanced navigation, canoe construction, wooden weaponry, and strong mobilization capacity. Weapons included clubs, spears, throwing arms, and woven protective gear, while maritime transport was the key strategic advantage.

unit.en: taels of silver equivalent per year

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自外岛离心、海上 rival 酋邦竞争、风暴破坏船队，以及远距离统治所带来的后勤困难。
threats.en: Major threats came from outer-island separatism, rival maritime chiefdoms, storms damaging fleets, and the logistical burdens of long-distance rule.

description.zh: 基础训练，民兵水平
description.en: Basic training, militia level

description.zh: 士气极低，厌战情绪蔓延
description.en: Very low morale, widespread war-weariness

description.zh: 骑士标准双刃直剑，十字形护手
description.en: Knight's standard double-edged straight sword with cruciform guard

description.zh: 骑兵冲锋长矛，骑士战核心武器
description.en: Cavalry charge lance, core weapon of knightly warfare

populationDescription.zh: 人口主要分布于汤加塔布、瓦瓦乌与哈派等群岛，沿海村落密集于可耕地与潟湖附近。穆阿作为王都兼礼仪中心，聚集了最多贵族与工匠人口。
populationDescription.en: Population was concentrated in island groups such as Tongatapu, Vava'u, and Ha'apai, with coastal villages clustered near arable land and lagoons. Mu'a, as royal and ritual capital, contained the largest concentration of nobles and specialized craftsmen.

socialClasses.zh: 王族、高级贵族与酋长、自由民、工匠与航海者、依附劳作者。
socialClasses.en: Royal family, high nobles and chiefs, commoners, craftsmen and navigators, and dependent laborers.

allies.zh: 与萨摩亚、斐济部分酋邦及附属外岛维持婚盟、礼物和航海联系。
allies.en: Maintained marriage, gift, and navigational ties with Samoa, some Fijian chiefdoms, and dependent outer islands.

enemies.zh: 无单一固定宿敌，但与不愿纳贡的外岛首领及区域海洋竞争者存在紧张关系。
enemies.en: There was no single permanent archenemy, but tensions existed with outer-island chiefs unwilling to render tribute and with regional maritime rivals.

foreignPolicy.zh: 对外政策以维持海上声望网络、巩固朝贡圈和通过婚姻控制关键航线节点为主。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy focused on maintaining a prestige network at sea, consolidating the tribute sphere, and using marriage ties to influence key maritime nodes.

era.zh: 波利尼西亚晚期酋邦—早期海洋王国阶段
era.en: Late Polynesian chiefdom to early maritime kingdom stage

keyInnovations.zh: 远洋导航、双体/大型独木舟建造、石构王陵、细席与树皮布精工、跨岛贡赋组织。
keyInnovations.en: Blue-water navigation, double-hulled and large seagoing canoe construction, stone royal tombs, fine mat and barkcloth craftsmanship, and organized inter-island tribute systems.

strengths.zh: 海上机动能力强、等级秩序稳固、王室礼仪权威高，能够整合多岛资源。
strengths.en: Strong maritime mobility, stable hierarchy, and high royal ritual prestige enabled the integration of multi-island resources.

weaknesses.zh: 缺乏文字官僚与金属武备，远距离控制依赖个人忠诚和航海条件，易受风暴与离心影响。
weaknesses.en: The kingdom lacked written bureaucracy and metal armament; long-distance control depended on personal loyalty and seafaring conditions, making it vulnerable to storms and centrifugal tendencies.

outlook.zh: 在1280年前后仍具扩张与整合能力，但若王权分支化或外岛酋长坐大，中央威望将面临挑战。
outlook.en: Around 1280 it still retained substantial capacity for expansion and integration, but royal fragmentation or the rise of outer-island chiefs could challenge central prestige.

description.zh: 一个以神圣王权、远洋航海与跨岛朝贡网络为支柱的波利尼西亚海洋王国。
description.en: A Polynesian maritime kingdom built on sacred kingship, oceanic navigation, and an inter-island tribute network.

dynasty.zh: 马拉王朝早期（加德满都谷地诸王并立）
dynasty.en: Early Malla period (with multiple kings in the Kathmandu Valley)

governmentForm.zh: 以谷地王城为核心的印度教君主制，国王依靠宫廷贵族、地方领主与寺庙网络进行统治。
governmentForm.en: A Hindu monarchy centered on valley cities, where the king ruled through court nobles, local landed elites, and temple networks.

socialStructure.zh: 社会以印度教种姓秩序与本地纽瓦尔城市社群相结合，上层由王族、婆罗门、刹帝利贵族和富商构成。农民、工匠与搬运商人构成人口主体，佛教僧侣与印度教祭司在城市生活中都具有重要影响。山地外围地区则由较为松散的部族与地方头人控制。
socialStructure.en: Society combined Hindu caste hierarchy with the urban communal structure of the Newars. The upper layers consisted of the royal house, Brahmins, Kshatriya nobles, and wealthy merchants, while peasants, artisans, and caravan-associated traders formed the majority. Buddhist monastics and Hindu priests both held major influence in urban life, whereas outer hill regions were more loosely controlled by tribal groups and local chiefs.

rulingClass.zh: 统治阶层主要由王室、宫廷贵族、婆罗门祭司集团以及控制土地与商路的纽瓦尔精英组成。王权虽具宗教合法性，但需与地方贵族和寺庙势力妥协。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class was made up chiefly of the royal family, court nobles, Brahmin priestly elites, and Newar elites who controlled land and trade routes. Royal authority possessed religious legitimacy but had to negotiate constantly with local nobles and temple interests.

succession.zh: 王位原则上实行父系世袭，但宫廷派系、支系王族与地方豪族常影响继承结果。谷地内部多中心政治使继承争议较易出现。
succession.en: Succession was in principle patrilineal and hereditary, but court factions, collateral royal lines, and local elites often shaped the outcome. The valley’s multi-centered politics made disputes over succession relatively common.

structure.zh: 政权以王宫为核心，辅以掌管田赋、司法、宗教捐献与城镇事务的官员。加德满都谷地各城具有较强地方自治传统，王权更多通过土地授予、宗教赞助和征税来体现。
structure.en: Government was centered on the royal court and supported by officials handling land revenue, justice, religious endowments, and urban administration. The cities of the Kathmandu Valley retained strong traditions of local autonomy, so royal authority was often exercised through land grants, temple patronage, and taxation.

function.zh: 管理王宫、诏令、朝觐礼仪与王室地产。
function.en: Managed the palace, royal decrees, court ceremony, and crown lands.

function.zh: 负责地税征收、谷物储备、银币与实物财政收支。
function.en: Oversaw land-tax collection, grain stores, and fiscal receipts in silver and kind.

function.zh: 管理宗教捐献、寺庙土地、祭祀支出与僧侣特许。
function.en: Handled religious donations, temple lands, ritual expenses, and clerical privileges.

function.zh: 管理市集、桥梁、道路关卡及商队税。
function.en: Administered markets, bridges, road toll points, and caravan duties.

localAdmin.zh: 地方治理依赖城镇长者、行会领袖、寺庙管理者与乡村头人。谷地核心地区控制较稳，外围山地则更多通过朝贡和间接统治维系。
localAdmin.en: Local administration relied on urban elders, guild leaders, temple managers, and village headmen. Control was firmer in the valley core, while outer hill zones were maintained more through tribute and indirect rule.

legalSystem.zh: 法律以习惯法、王命与婆罗门法理传统并行，宗教规范深刻影响婚姻、继承与土地事务。城市商业纠纷常由地方社群或行会先行调解。
legalSystem.en: The legal system combined customary law, royal command, and Brahmanical jurisprudential traditions, with religion strongly shaping marriage, inheritance, and land matters. Urban commercial disputes were often first mediated by local communities or guilds.

taxationSystem.zh: 财政以田赋为主，并征收市税、商路关税、劳役和节庆捐输。偏远地区部分税负以实物、牲畜或服役形式缴纳。
taxationSystem.en: Taxation was based primarily on land revenue, supplemented by market dues, transit tolls, labor obligations, and ceremonial contributions. In remote areas, obligations were often paid in kind, livestock, or service.

religion.zh: 印度教

culturalAchievements.zh: 加德满都谷地在寺庙建筑、金铜造像、木雕与城市节庆方面已形成鲜明传统。宫廷与寺庙赞助促进了梵文铭文、宗教艺术和手工业的发展。
culturalAchievements.en: The Kathmandu Valley had already developed distinctive traditions in temple architecture, gilt-bronze sculpture, wood carving, and urban festivals. Court and temple patronage supported Sanskrit inscriptions, religious art, and refined crafts.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系（梵语、尼瓦尔文受汉藏语环境影响）
languageFamily.en: Indo-European family (with Sanskrit and Newar operating in a Tibeto-Burman contact environment)

philosophy.zh: 印度教王权观、密教佛教传统与纽瓦尔城市宗教文化并存。
philosophy.en: Hindu kingship ideology coexisted with tantric Buddhist traditions and Newar urban religious culture.

writingSystem.zh: 主要使用梵文与尼瓦尔文书写，文字体系属婆罗米系衍生文字。
writingSystem.en: Sanskrit and early Newar were used for writing, in scripts derived from the Brahmi family.

unit.en: silver dinar equivalent per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以稻作农业、山地畜牧和谷地手工业为基础，并从喜马拉雅山南北商路中获利。整体规模不大，但城市工艺和转口贸易使人均产出高于一般山地王国。
gdpDescription.en: The economy rested on rice agriculture, hill pastoralism, and valley crafts, while also profiting from trans-Himalayan trade routes. Though modest in total scale, urban craftsmanship and entrepôt trade lifted per-capita output above that of many mountain kingdoms.

mainIndustries.zh: 农业、金属工艺、木雕、纺织、商队贸易
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture, metalworking, wood carving, textiles, and caravan trade

tradeGoods.zh: 稻米、酥油、盐、羊毛、铜器、宗教金属器、布匹
tradeGoods.en: Rice, ghee, salt, wool, copperware, religious metal objects, and cloth

name.zh: 混合银币与实物财政体系
name.en: Mixed silver coin and in-kind fiscal system

householdWealth.zh: 谷地城市商人工匠家庭财富较高，乡村家庭则主要以土地、牲畜和粮储衡量。财富分布受寺庙地产和贵族授田影响明显。
householdWealth.en: Urban merchant and artisan households in the valley were relatively prosperous, while rural wealth was measured mainly in land, livestock, and grain stores. Distribution of wealth was strongly shaped by temple estates and noble land grants.

unit.en: silver dinar equivalent per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 以王室、寺庙和地方领主控制土地的农业经济为主体，辅以城市行会与山地转运贸易。
economicSystem.en: A predominantly agrarian economy based on lands controlled by the crown, temples, and local elites, supplemented by urban guilds and mountain transit trade.

source.zh: 王室地产与寺庙关联收入

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库存量不算庞大，但谷地粮仓、寺庙储藏与金属器积累可在危机时提供缓冲。财政韧性较依赖丰年和商路畅通。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was not large, but valley granaries, temple stores, and accumulated metal wealth provided a buffer in crisis. Fiscal resilience depended heavily on good harvests and open trade routes.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策偏谨慎，重视稳定田赋和维持宗教—城市赞助网络，不倾向大规模常备军开支。遇到修庙、婚礼或战争时则可能临时加征。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy was generally cautious, emphasizing steady land revenue and the maintenance of religious-urban patronage networks rather than an oversized standing army. Temporary extractions were more likely during temple building, royal ceremonies, or war.

description.zh: 以持矛、盾、弓的步兵为主，负责守城与谷地作战。
description.en: Primarily spear-, shield-, and bow-armed infantry used for garrison duty and warfare within the valley.

description.zh: 由地方领主和山地社群在战时征集，适合山路警戒与伏击。
description.en: Raised in wartime by local chiefs and hill communities, suitable for mountain route security and ambush warfare.

description.zh: 数量较少，主要承担王室护卫、传令与追击任务。
description.en: Small in number, mainly serving as royal guards, messengers, and pursuit forces.

technology.zh: 军备以传统弓箭、长矛、刀剑、皮甲和少量锁甲为主，擅长山地防御但缺乏重骑兵和攻城器械。城防依托谷地聚落、宫殿和寺庙复合建筑。
technology.en: Military technology relied on traditional bows, spears, swords, leather armor, and limited mail. The army was suited to mountain defense but lacked strong heavy cavalry and advanced siege capability. Defensive strength rested on valley settlements and palace-temple complexes.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自谷地内部王权竞争、山地边缘势力叛离，以及北向商路中断导致的财政压力。大规模外来征服风险较低，但长期分裂削弱防御能力。
threats.en: Main threats came from internal dynastic competition in the valley, defections of hill-edge powers, and fiscal strain from disruption of northern trade routes. Large-scale foreign conquest was relatively unlikely, but chronic fragmentation weakened defense.

description.zh: 初步正规化，有季节性操练
description.en: Semi-professional, seasonal drills

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: 伊斯兰世界弯刀，轻便利于骑战劈斩
description.en: Islamic curved sword, light and ideal for mounted slashing

description.zh: 英格兰长弓手主力弓，射程可达300步
description.en: English longbow, effective range up to 300 paces

description.zh: 铁环编织甲衣，灵活且防护可靠
description.en: Iron ring-linked armor, flexible and reliably protective

populationDescription.zh: 人口集中于加德满都谷地及周边可耕盆地，农村人口远多于城市人口。纽瓦尔人构成城市核心，外围山地则语言和族群更为多样。
populationDescription.en: Population was concentrated in the Kathmandu Valley and nearby cultivable basins, with rural inhabitants greatly outnumbering urban ones. Newars formed the urban core, while outer hill regions were more linguistically and ethnically diverse.

socialClasses.zh: 王族与贵族、婆罗门与宗教精英、商人与行会工匠、农民、山地部族与服役人口。
socialClasses.en: Royal and noble elites, Brahmins and religious elites, merchants and guild artisans, peasants, hill tribes, and service populations.

allies.zh: 与北印度山前地带和西藏方向商路节点保持务实往来，联盟多为临时性和贸易导向。
allies.en: It maintained pragmatic ties with Himalayan foothill polities and trade nodes toward Tibet, with alliances generally temporary and commerce-oriented.

enemies.zh: 无长期统一外敌，但周边山地领主、谷地竞争王系和断续南方势力介入均构成潜在对手。
enemies.en: There was no single enduring external enemy, but neighboring hill chiefs, rival valley royal lines, and intermittent southern intervention all posed potential challenges.

foreignPolicy.zh: 对外政策以保障商路、平衡周边山地势力和维护宗教声望为主，倾向避免远征。外交常通过婚姻、贡礼和寺庙赞助来达成。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy focused on protecting trade routes, balancing surrounding hill powers, and preserving religious prestige, with little appetite for distant conquest. Diplomacy often operated through marriage, gifts, and temple patronage.

era.zh: 中世纪喜马拉雅王国技术阶段
era.en: Medieval Himalayan kingdom technological stage

keyInnovations.zh: 山地梯田灌溉、精细金铜铸造、木构与砖木混合寺庙建筑、谷地城市手工业组织。
keyInnovations.en: Terraced irrigation, fine gilt-bronze casting, mixed brick-and-timber temple architecture, and organized valley urban crafts.

strengths.zh: 谷地农业稳固、工艺高度发达、宗教与商路地位重要，具备较强区域文化凝聚力。
strengths.en: It possessed solid valley agriculture, highly developed craftsmanship, important religious and trade-route status, and strong regional cultural cohesion.

weaknesses.zh: 政权碎片化、外围控制有限、财政规模偏小，难以支撑持久扩张或大型战争。
weaknesses.en: Political fragmentation, limited control over outer regions, and a modest fiscal base made sustained expansion or large wars difficult.

outlook.zh: 若谷地内部维持平衡并持续掌握跨山贸易，王国可保持稳定繁荣；若继承纷争加剧，则易转入分裂竞争。
outlook.en: If internal balance in the valley held and trans-Himalayan trade remained active, the kingdom could stay stable and prosperous; if succession struggles intensified, it would likely slip into renewed fragmentation.

description.zh: 1280年前后的尼泊尔是一个以加德满都谷地城市、寺庙经济和跨喜马拉雅贸易为支柱的山地王国。
description.en: Around 1280, Nepal was a mountain kingdom sustained by Kathmandu Valley cities, temple-centered economy, and trans-Himalayan trade.

governmentForm.zh: 由修会骑士团统治的军事神权国家，大团长与修会会议共同主导政治与战争。
governmentForm.en: A militarized theocratic state governed by a religious military order, with the Grand Master and chapter leadership directing politics and war.

socialStructure.zh: 社会上层为德意志修会骑士、神职人员与受封城镇精英，中层包括自由农、商人和殖民移民。底层则有本地普鲁士居民、佃农与服役人口，族群与法律地位差异明显。城镇化和殖民开垦正在重塑社会结构。
socialStructure.en: The upper strata consisted of German order-brothers, clergy, and chartered urban elites, while the middle layers included free peasants, merchants, and settler colonists. Lower strata included native Prussian inhabitants, tenants, and service populations, with clear ethnic and legal distinctions. Urbanization and colonizing settlement were actively reshaping society.

rulingClass.zh: 统治阶层主要是修会骑士、高级司铎、行政总管和受团支持的德意志城市寡头。其权力基础在于军功、教皇合法性以及对城堡和土地授予的控制。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class was formed chiefly by order-brothers, senior clerics, administrative officers, and German urban oligarchies backed by the Order. Their power rested on military service, papal legitimacy, and control over castles and land grants.

succession.zh: 大团长并非世袭，而由修会内部选举产生，下级职位亦按修会规则任命。此制度增强组织纪律，但也会受到德意志诸侯与教廷影响。
succession.en: The Grand Master was not hereditary but elected within the Order, and lower offices were appointed according to monastic rule. This strengthened institutional discipline, though it also left the system open to influence from German princes and the papacy.

structure.zh: 政权以修会总会、地区总管区和城堡体系为骨架，军事、宗教和行政职能高度合一。重要据点由司令官管理，城镇则依据德意志城市法享有一定自治，但须服从骑士团总体战略。
structure.en: Government was structured around the Order’s chapter, regional commanderies, and a network of castles, with military, religious, and administrative functions closely fused. Key strongholds were governed by commanders, while towns enjoyed limited autonomy under German municipal law but remained subordinate to the Order’s overall strategy.

function.zh: 负责法令、外交、修会命令传达与中央协调。
function.en: Handled decrees, diplomacy, transmission of order directives, and central coordination.

function.zh: 管理驻军、城堡维护、边境防御与远征动员。
function.en: Managed garrisons, castle maintenance, frontier defense, and crusading mobilization.

function.zh: 管理庄园、税租、仓储、贸易收益与征发。
function.en: Administered estates, rents, storage, trade income, and requisitions.

function.zh: 负责教区整合、传教、教堂土地与宗教监督。
function.en: Oversaw diocesan integration, missionary work, church lands, and religious supervision.

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政以城堡司令、修会管区长和获得特许状的城镇议会为核心。乡村地区通过庄园主、村长与传教神职间接管理本地普鲁士人口。
localAdmin.en: Local administration centered on castle commanders, order officials, and chartered town councils. Rural districts were managed indirectly through estate holders, village heads, and missionary clergy overseeing native Prussian populations.

legalSystem.zh: 法律由教会法、修会规则与德意志城市法并行组成，不同族群和地区适用法律可能不同。对异教反抗、背叛与边境劫掠的处罚尤为严厉。
legalSystem.en: Law combined canon law, the Order’s internal rule, and German municipal law, with different communities often subject to different legal regimes. Punishments were especially severe for pagan resistance, treason, and frontier raiding.

taxationSystem.zh: 收入来自庄园地租、关税、渔盐林地收益、城镇税及战争征发。部分本地居民以劳役、实物或服役形式承担财政义务。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came from estate rents, tolls, fisheries, salt and woodland income, town taxes, and wartime levies. Some local populations met obligations through labor service, produce, or military duty.

religion.zh: 天主教

culturalAchievements.zh: 骑士团推动城堡、教堂与规划城镇的建设，并将德意志法律、文书制度和修会教育带入波罗的海边疆。其建筑与档案管理能力在同时代北欧边境地区颇为突出。
culturalAchievements.en: The Order promoted the construction of castles, churches, and planned towns, bringing German law, documentary practice, and monastic education into the Baltic frontier. Its building programs and archival administration were notably advanced for the northern borderlands of the time.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系（日耳曼语支与拉丁语书面传统）
languageFamily.en: Indo-European family (Germanic speech with Latin written tradition)

philosophy.zh: 拉丁基督教十字军思想、修会纪律与德意志殖民边疆文化。
philosophy.en: Latin Christian crusading ideology, monastic discipline, and German colonial frontier culture.

writingSystem.zh: 使用拉丁文与中世纪低地德语，书写体系为拉丁字母。
writingSystem.en: Latin and Middle Low German were used, written in the Latin alphabet.

unit.en: silver mark equivalent per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 经济建立在庄园农业、森林资源、琥珀和波罗的海贸易之上，并因殖民开垦和军事组织化而具有较高征收能力。虽然人口不多，但资源集中度和制度效率使其财政动员力显著强于一般地方领主政权。
gdpDescription.en: The economy rested on estate agriculture, forest resources, amber, and Baltic trade, with colonization and military organization giving it relatively high extractive capacity. Though not populous, its concentration of resources and institutional efficiency made fiscal mobilization much stronger than that of a typical feudal lordship.

mainIndustries.zh: 庄园农业、林业、琥珀采集、筑城、波罗的海贸易
mainIndustries.en: Estate agriculture, forestry, amber extraction, castle construction, and Baltic trade

tradeGoods.zh: 谷物、木材、蜂蜡、毛皮、琥珀、鱼类、盐
tradeGoods.en: Grain, timber, beeswax, furs, amber, fish, and salt

householdWealth.zh: 德意志定居者与城镇商人家庭财富普遍高于本地普鲁士农村人口。财富形式包括农地、牲畜、仓储谷物和贸易库存。
householdWealth.en: German settler and urban merchant households were generally wealthier than native Prussian rural populations. Wealth took the form of farmland, livestock, stored grain, and trade stock.

unit.en: silver mark equivalent per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 由修会庄园经济、受特许城镇和边疆贸易共同构成的准计划化军事殖民经济。
economicSystem.en: A semi-planned military-colonial economy combining Order estates, chartered towns, and frontier trade.

treasuryDescription.zh: 骑士团拥有较强实物储备和银银流通能力，城堡仓储体系增强了持续战争中的财政韧性。其国库还可借助德意志地区捐输与信用网络补充。
treasuryDescription.en: The Order maintained strong stores in kind and solid silver circulation, while its castle-granary network improved endurance in prolonged warfare. The treasury could also be reinforced through donations and credit connections in the German lands.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策偏进取，以高强度征收支持边疆扩张、筑城和传教，并尽量将军事成本制度化。贸易与庄园收益被优先投入长期安全建设。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy was assertive, using intensive extraction to support frontier expansion, castle building, and missionizing while institutionalizing military costs. Trade and estate revenues were preferentially directed into long-term security infrastructure.

description.zh: 由骑士团核心成员和侍从构成，是冲击与指挥中坚。
description.en: Composed of the Order’s core knights and retainers, serving as the main shock and command arm.

description.zh: 负责守城、巡逻、围攻和野战支援，包含雇佣兵与城镇兵。
description.en: Handled garrison duty, patrols, sieges, and field support, including mercenaries and town contingents.

description.zh: 由殖民者、本地附属兵和十字军访客组成，战时补充兵力。
description.en: Made up of settlers, native auxiliaries, and visiting crusaders, providing wartime reinforcement.

commanderInChief.zh: 大团长哈特曼·冯·赫尔德龙根

technology.zh: 条顿骑士团具备北欧一流的重骑兵、弩兵、石木混合城堡和攻城器械运用能力。其军事优势在于纪律、堡垒网络和后勤组织，而非单纯兵员数量。
technology.en: The Teutonic Knights possessed first-rate northern heavy cavalry, crossbow forces, mixed stone-and-timber castles, and practical siege capabilities. Their advantage lay in discipline, fortress networks, and logistics rather than sheer numbers.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自仍在抵抗的波罗的海异教部族、立陶宛势力扩张、波兰与地方主教关系摩擦，以及边疆过度扩张带来的补给压力。
threats.en: Main threats came from resisting Baltic pagan groups, the rise of Lithuanian power, frictions with Poland and local bishoprics, and the logistical strain of frontier overextension.

description.zh: 职业化训练，拥有成熟的操典
description.en: Professional training with established manuals

description.zh: 士气一般，作战意志不稳定
description.en: Mediocre morale, inconsistent fighting will

description.zh: 伊斯兰世界弯刀，轻便利于骑战劈斩
description.en: Islamic curved sword, light and ideal for mounted slashing

description.zh: 英格兰长弓手主力弓，射程可达300步
description.en: English longbow, effective range up to 300 paces

description.zh: 早期火铳与火箭（中国/伊斯兰世界传入）
description.en: Early firearms and rockets (introduced from China/Islamic world)

description.zh: 骑兵冲锋长矛，骑士战核心武器
description.en: Cavalry charge lance, core weapon of knightly warfare

populationDescription.zh: 人口密度较低，但因殖民移民和新城建立而稳步增长。城镇与城堡周边形成德意志化核心区，本地普鲁士人口在乡村和边缘地带仍占重要比例。
populationDescription.en: Population density was low but rising steadily through colonization and new town foundations. Germanized cores developed around towns and castles, while native Prussian populations remained important in rural and peripheral areas.

socialClasses.zh: 修会骑士与神职、德意志城镇精英、自由定居农、雇佣兵与工匠、本地普鲁士村民与服役人口。
socialClasses.en: Order knights and clergy, German urban elites, free settler peasants, mercenaries and artisans, and native Prussian villagers and service groups.

allies.zh: 与教廷、部分德意志诸侯、来访十字军骑士及若干波罗的海基督教势力保持合作。
allies.en: The Order cooperated with the papacy, certain German princes, visiting crusader knights, and some Christian Baltic powers.

enemies.zh: 主要敌人为立陶宛诸公国、反抗中的普鲁士与其他波罗的海异教势力，亦与部分波兰利益发生冲突。
enemies.en: Its principal enemies were Lithuanian polities, resisting Prussians and other Baltic pagan groups, and at times interests connected with Poland.

foreignPolicy.zh: 对外政策以十字军征服、殖民拓边、筑城固边和争取教皇支持为核心。骑士团同时积极嵌入汉萨和德意志贸易网络，以经济力量支撑战争。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy centered on crusading conquest, colonial expansion, frontier fortification, and the maintenance of papal support. The Order also sought deep integration into Hanseatic and German trade networks to sustain war economically.

era.zh: 中世纪晚期前夜的波罗的海军事殖民技术阶段
era.en: Baltic military-colonial technological stage on the eve of the later Middle Ages

keyInnovations.zh: 规划城镇、条顿式城堡网络、弩兵体系、军事修会行政文书化、边疆后勤仓储组织。
keyInnovations.en: Planned towns, Teutonic fortress networks, organized crossbow forces, documentary military-monastic administration, and frontier logistics storage.

strengths.zh: 组织纪律严密、财政征收效率高、筑城与后勤能力强，并拥有广泛的宗教合法性。
strengths.en: It had tight organizational discipline, high fiscal efficiency, strong fortification and logistics capacity, and broad religious legitimacy.

weaknesses.zh: 人口基础有限、统治族群分裂明显，且长期战争依赖外来支援与持续扩张。
weaknesses.en: Its population base was limited, ethnic divisions under rule were stark, and long wars depended on outside support and continued expansion.

outlook.zh: 若能继续整合殖民地与贸易节点，骑士团将维持上升势头；但若立陶宛和周边王权联合反制，其扩张将遭遇更大阻力。
outlook.en: If it continued integrating settlements and trade nodes, the Order could maintain upward momentum; but coordinated resistance from Lithuania and neighboring crowns would impose far greater constraints.

description.zh: 1280年前后的条顿骑士团是波罗的海边疆最具组织力的军事神权国家，以城堡、庄园和十字军战争推动扩张。
description.en: Around 1280, the Teutonic Knights were the most organized militarized theocracy on the Baltic frontier, expanding through castles, estates, and crusading warfare.

dynasty.zh: 香槟王朝治下的纳瓦拉
dynasty.en: Navarre under the House of Champagne

governmentForm.zh: 以国王和地方特权法为基础的封建君主国，王权需与贵族、教会和城市共同协商统治。
governmentForm.en: A feudal kingdom grounded in royal authority and local fueros, where the crown governed through negotiation with nobles, clergy, and towns.

socialStructure.zh: 社会由贵族、教士、自由民城市居民和农村农民构成，边境地带还保留较强的巴斯克地方共同体传统。城市与乡村的法律身份差异明显，特许状和地方习惯法在社会组织中作用很大。朝圣路线上的商人和手工业者也赋予王国较鲜明的跨境性格。
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of nobles, clergy, free urban residents, and rural peasants, while border zones preserved strong Basque communal traditions. Legal status differed significantly between town and countryside, with charters and customary fueros playing a major role in social organization. Merchants and artisans along pilgrimage routes also gave the kingdom a distinctly cross-border character.

rulingClass.zh: 统治阶层包括国王及其宫廷、世俗贵族、大主教和主教，以及掌握税收与自治权的城市精英。法国香槟联系使宫廷政治带有一定跨比利牛斯色彩。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class included the king and his court, secular nobles, archiepiscopal and episcopal elites, and urban oligarchies controlling taxation and self-government. Links to Champagne gave court politics a trans-Pyrenean dimension.

succession.zh: 王位实行世袭，但须得到王国内主要贵族和法权共同体的承认。由于王室常与法国王族联姻，继承问题容易受到外部政治影响。
succession.en: The throne was hereditary, but effective succession required recognition by the kingdom’s major nobles and legal communities. Because the royal house was tied by marriage to French royalty, succession questions were especially vulnerable to outside political pressure.

structure.zh: 纳瓦拉王权通过宫廷官员、财政人员和地方总管实施统治，但必须尊重各地特权法。边境王国的治理重点在于维持道路、堡垒、税关和贵族忠诚，以平衡法兰西、卡斯蒂利亚与阿拉贡的压力。
structure.en: Royal government operated through court officers, fiscal personnel, and local governors, but it had to respect regional fueros. As a border kingdom, administration focused on maintaining roads, fortresses, customs posts, and noble loyalty in order to balance pressure from France, Castile, and Aragon.

function.zh: 起草诏书、保存特许状并处理外交文书。
function.en: Drafted charters, preserved royal privileges, and handled diplomatic records.

function.zh: 负责地租、关税、王室收入和银币结算。
function.en: Managed rents, customs duties, royal revenues, and silver payments.

function.zh: 管理边境堡垒、封臣兵役与道路治安。
function.en: Oversaw frontier fortresses, feudal service, and security on the roads.

function.zh: 协调王室司法与地方习惯法之间的关系。
function.en: Coordinated relations between royal justice and local customary law.

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政由梅里诺等王室代表、城镇议会和地方贵族共同承担。山区与巴斯克社群的自治传统较强，中央需通过确认特权来维系统治。
localAdmin.en: Local administration was shared among royal representatives such as merinos, town councils, and local nobles. Mountain and Basque communities had strong traditions of autonomy, so the crown governed by reaffirming local privileges.

legalSystem.zh: 纳瓦拉法律体系以王室法、地方习惯法和城市特许状并行，具有明显的复合法传统。不同地区在土地、刑事和税务问题上可适用不同法权。
legalSystem.en: Navarre’s legal system combined royal law, regional custom, and urban charters in a markedly plural legal tradition. Different districts could apply different rights in matters of land, crime, and taxation.

taxationSystem.zh: 税收包括王室地产收入、关税、城市税、封臣义务与临时征税。由于王国规模有限，边境贸易和通行税对财政相当重要。
taxationSystem.en: Taxation included crown-land income, customs duties, urban taxes, feudal obligations, and extraordinary levies. Given the kingdom’s small size, border trade and transit tolls were especially important to finance.

religion.zh: 天主教

culturalAchievements.zh: 纳瓦拉受圣雅各之路影响，城市宗教建筑、旅舍网络和抄写文书传统较为发达。其文化兼具比利牛斯巴斯克地方特色与法国宫廷联系。
culturalAchievements.en: Influenced by the Camino de Santiago, Navarre developed notable religious architecture, hostel networks, and documentary writing traditions. Its culture combined Pyrenean Basque local character with links to French courtly society.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系（罗曼语）与巴斯克孤立语并存
languageFamily.en: Indo-European (Romance) languages coexisting with the Basque language isolate

philosophy.zh: 拉丁基督教世界观、封建法权观念与巴斯克地方共同体传统并存。
philosophy.en: Latin Christian worldview coexisted with feudal legal culture and Basque communal traditions.

writingSystem.zh: 主要使用拉丁文、纳瓦拉—阿拉贡罗曼语及部分奥克语，文字体系为拉丁字母。
writingSystem.en: Latin, Navarrese-Aragonese Romance, and some Occitan were used, all in the Latin alphabet.

unit.en: silver livre equivalent per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以山地与河谷农业、牧羊、葡萄种植和跨比利牛斯贸易为主，并受朝圣路线带动。虽为小国，但因边境关税和商旅流动，人均经济水平在伊比利亚北部并不低。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was based on mountain and river-valley agriculture, sheep raising, viticulture, and trans-Pyrenean trade, further stimulated by pilgrimage traffic. Though small, the kingdom’s customs income and merchant movement gave it a respectable per-capita economic level by northern Iberian standards.

mainIndustries.zh: 农业、牧羊、葡萄酒、皮革、边境贸易
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture, sheep raising, wine, leatherworking, and border trade

tradeGoods.zh: 羊毛、皮革、葡萄酒、谷物、盐、铁器、朝圣补给品
tradeGoods.en: Wool, leather, wine, grain, salt, iron goods, and pilgrimage supplies

householdWealth.zh: 城市商人和边境税务相关家庭较富裕，山区农户则多以土地、羊群和共同体使用权为财富基础。贵族财富主要来自领地、租佃和要塞控制。
householdWealth.en: Urban merchants and households tied to frontier customs were relatively prosperous, while mountain peasants depended on land, flocks, and communal use rights. Noble wealth derived mainly from lordships, rents, and fortress control.

unit.en: silver livre equivalent per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 兼具封建地产经济、自治城市商业和跨山关税贸易的混合型边境王国经济。
economicSystem.en: A mixed frontier-kingdom economy combining feudal landed production, self-governing urban commerce, and trans-mountain customs trade.

treasuryDescription.zh: 纳瓦拉国库规模有限，但因财政较谨慎且战争规模不大，短期偿付能力尚可。若遭邻国长期军事压力，储备将很快吃紧。
treasuryDescription.en: Navarre’s treasury was limited, but prudent finance and relatively modest wars preserved short-term solvency. Under sustained military pressure from neighboring powers, however, reserves would tighten quickly.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策偏保守，注重维持关税流与边堡支出之间的平衡，同时避免过度侵犯地方特权。王室常以协商方式争取临时税收。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy was generally conservative, aiming to balance customs income against frontier-defense costs while avoiding excessive violation of local privileges. The crown often sought extraordinary taxation through negotiation.

description.zh: 由贵族及其侍从组成，是王国机动和冲击主力。
description.en: Composed of nobles and their retainers, forming the kingdom’s main mobile striking arm.

description.zh: 来自城镇民兵和农村征召，负责守城、边防和支援作战。
description.en: Drawn from town militias and rural levies, they handled garrison, frontier defense, and battlefield support.

description.zh: 驻守要塞和山口，维持通道安全并监视邻国动向。
description.en: Stationed in fortresses and mountain passes to secure routes and monitor neighboring powers.

technology.zh: 纳瓦拉军备属西欧标准水平，拥有链甲骑士、弩兵、石堡和山区防御工事。其优势在于山地边境防守和道路控制，而非大规模会战能力。
technology.en: Navarrese military equipment was at a standard western European level, with mail-armored knights, crossbowmen, stone castles, and mountain defenses. Its strengths lay in border defense and route control rather than large-scale pitched warfare.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自法国王室影响扩大、卡斯蒂利亚与阿拉贡的边境压力，以及国内贵族借外援扩张自主权。小国地位使其很难长期独立对抗多方强邻。
threats.en: Main threats came from expanding French royal influence, border pressure from Castile and Aragon, and domestic nobles using outside support to enlarge their autonomy. As a small kingdom, it was ill-suited to prolonged independent resistance against multiple powerful neighbors.

description.zh: 初步正规化，有季节性操练
description.en: Semi-professional, seasonal drills

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: 伊斯兰世界弯刀，轻便利于骑战劈斩
description.en: Islamic curved sword, light and ideal for mounted slashing

description.zh: 骑兵冲锋长矛，骑士战核心武器
description.en: Cavalry charge lance, core weapon of knightly warfare

description.zh: 英格兰长弓手主力弓，射程可达300步
description.en: English longbow, effective range up to 300 paces

populationDescription.zh: 人口主要分布在潘普洛纳及其周边河谷、山麓村庄和朝圣路线沿线。整体人口不多，但流动商旅和朝圣者使部分城镇比常住人口所示更活跃。
populationDescription.en: Population was concentrated around Pamplona, nearby river valleys, piedmont villages, and the pilgrimage corridor. Total population was small, but merchant and pilgrim traffic made some towns more active than their resident numbers suggest.

socialClasses.zh: 王室与高贵族、教士、城市自由民与商人、农村自由农与佃农、边境巴斯克共同体居民。
socialClasses.en: Royal and high noble elites, clergy, urban freemen and merchants, rural free peasants and tenants, and inhabitants of frontier Basque communities.

allies.zh: 视局势与法国香槟联系、阿拉贡或地方比利牛斯领主保持阶段性合作。
allies.en: Depending on circumstances, Navarre maintained episodic cooperation through its Champagne-French ties, with Aragon, or with local Pyrenean lords.

enemies.zh: 无固定唯一宿敌，但法国、卡斯蒂利亚和阿拉贡均可能在继承或边界问题上成为威胁。
enemies.en: It had no single permanent enemy, but France, Castile, and Aragon could each become threats over succession or frontier issues.

foreignPolicy.zh: 纳瓦拉奉行平衡外交，试图在法兰西与伊比利亚诸强之间维持自主，并利用山口和朝圣路线提升谈判价值。其外交高度依赖婚姻、盟约和边境妥协。
foreignPolicy.en: Navarre pursued balancing diplomacy, seeking autonomy between France and the Iberian powers while leveraging mountain passes and pilgrimage routes to increase its bargaining value. Its foreign policy relied heavily on marriage, treaties, and frontier compromise.

era.zh: 13世纪晚期比利牛斯封建王国技术阶段
era.en: Late 13th-century Pyrenean feudal kingdom technological stage

keyInnovations.zh: 山口堡垒体系、弩兵运用、王室文书管理、朝圣交通基础设施、葡萄与畜牧混合经营。
keyInnovations.en: Mountain-pass fortification systems, use of crossbow troops, royal documentary administration, pilgrimage-route infrastructure, and mixed viticulture-pastoral management.

strengths.zh: 地处交通要冲、法律传统稳固、城市商业活跃，且具山地防御优势。
strengths.en: It benefited from a strategic transit position, durable legal traditions, active urban commerce, and strong mountain defenses.

weaknesses.zh: 人口和财力都偏小，王权受地方特权约束，易受周边大国干预。
weaknesses.en: Its population and finances were small, royal authority was constrained by local privileges, and it was vulnerable to intervention by stronger neighbors.

outlook.zh: 若能妥善处理继承与外交平衡，纳瓦拉可继续维持独立；若外部联姻和强邻压力叠加，王国主权将日益脆弱。
outlook.en: If it managed succession and diplomatic balance well, Navarre could preserve its independence; if dynastic entanglement and pressure from stronger neighbors intensified, its sovereignty would grow increasingly fragile.

description.zh: 1280年前后的纳瓦拉是一个夹处法兰西与伊比利亚诸强之间、依靠特权法与边境贸易维持独立的小型山地王国。
description.en: Around 1280, Navarre was a small mountain kingdom between France and the Iberian powers, sustaining its independence through legal privileges and frontier trade.

governmentForm.zh: 这是一个由法兰克贵族王室统治的封建君主制王国，王权建立在十字军传统、封臣义务与拉丁教会支持之上。
governmentForm.en: This was a feudal monarchy ruled by a Frankish royal house, with royal authority resting on crusader traditions, vassalic obligation, and support from the Latin Church.

socialStructure.zh: 塞浦路斯社会由拉丁裔王室与贵族居于上层，掌握土地、城堡与高级军政职位。希腊语东正教人口构成多数，从事农业、地方工商业与航运服务；此外还有叙利亚人、亚美尼亚人、马龙派与商人社群。城市中意大利商人和本地手工业者在港口经济中作用突出。
socialStructure.en: Cypriot society was headed by the Latin royal family and nobility, who controlled land, castles, and senior military-administrative offices. The majority Greek Orthodox population worked in agriculture, local crafts, and maritime services; there were also Syrian, Armenian, Maronite, and merchant communities. In the towns, Italian merchants and local artisans played an important role in the port economy.

rulingClass.zh: 统治阶层主要由法兰克贵族、王室近臣、拉丁主教团与少数受封骑士家族组成。他们通过封地、法庭与军役关系维持对乡村和城镇的控制。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class consisted mainly of Frankish nobles, royal courtiers, the Latin episcopate, and a smaller number of enfeoffed knightly families. They maintained control over countryside and towns through fiefs, courts, and military obligations.

succession.zh: 王位按吕西尼昂家族的世袭原则传承，通常遵循男性优先的封建继承习惯。贵族认可、教会祝圣与王室联姻对继承合法性同样重要。
succession.en: The throne passed hereditarily within the Lusignan house, generally following feudal customs favoring male succession. Noble recognition, ecclesiastical sanction, and dynastic marriage were also important to legitimacy.

structure.zh: 王国政府以国王及其宫廷为中心，辅以高级封臣会议、财政官与司法官。中央权力在尼科西亚与主要港口较强，但在乡村地区仍需依赖封建领主与教会机构执行命令。
structure.en: The kingdom’s government was centered on the king and his court, assisted by a council of major vassals, fiscal officers, and judicial officials. Central authority was stronger in Nicosia and the main ports, but in the countryside it still depended on feudal lords and church institutions to enforce orders.

function.zh: 征收王室地租、关税、港口税与封臣应缴款项，并管理金库。
function.en: Collected crown rents, customs, port dues, and feudal payments, and managed the treasury.

function.zh: 处理封臣争端、土地诉讼、王室司法与城市特许案件。
function.en: Handled vassalic disputes, land litigation, royal justice, and chartered urban cases.

function.zh: 管理法马古斯塔、利马索尔等港口贸易、关卡与航运事务。
function.en: Managed trade, customs barriers, and shipping affairs at ports such as Famagusta and Limassol.

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政由王室任命的总管、城堡长官与封建领主共同承担。希腊村社常保留部分传统自治形式，但须向拉丁统治层纳税并服劳役。
localAdmin.en: Local administration was shared by crown-appointed officials, castle governors, and feudal lords. Greek village communities often retained limited traditional forms of self-management, but they owed taxes and labor services to the Latin ruling elite.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系混合耶路撒冷王国传统封建法、王室敕令与教会法。拉丁贵族与希腊臣民在司法实践中常适用不同程序和习惯。
legalSystem.en: The legal system blended the feudal law traditions of the Kingdom of Jerusalem, royal ordinances, and canon law. In practice, Latin nobles and Greek subjects were often subject to different procedures and customary usages.

taxationSystem.zh: 税收主要来自王室庄园地租、港口关税、贸易课税与封建义务折银。农业人口还负担实物租、劳役和教会什一税。
taxationSystem.en: Taxation derived mainly from crown estate rents, port customs, trade levies, and commuted feudal obligations. The agrarian population also bore rents in kind, labor dues, and ecclesiastical tithes.

religion.zh: 天主教

culturalAchievements.zh: 塞浦路斯在十字军晚期成为拉丁、希腊和近东文化交流的重要节点。其宫廷礼仪、教会建筑与港口商业文书传统体现了东西方交汇的特色。
culturalAchievements.en: In the later crusading period, Cyprus became an important meeting point of Latin, Greek, and Near Eastern cultures. Its courtly ceremonial life, ecclesiastical architecture, and port-commercial documentary traditions reflected this east-west convergence.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系：古法语/法兰西语支、希腊语支；并有闪米特语族社群语言。
languageFamily.en: Indo-European: Old French/Romance and Greek branches; with Semitic community languages also present.

philosophy.zh: 以拉丁基督教王权观、经院神学与东地中海多元宗教传统并存为特征。
philosophy.en: It was characterized by Latin Christian kingship, scholastic theology, and the coexistence of diverse eastern Mediterranean religious traditions.

writingSystem.zh: 主要使用拉丁字母与希腊字母，行政文书常见法语、拉丁语和希腊语。
writingSystem.en: The main scripts were the Latin and Greek alphabets, with French, Latin, and Greek commonly used in administration.

gdpDescription.zh: 塞浦路斯经济以农业、制糖、葡萄酒和转口贸易为核心，在东地中海属于较富庶的中型王国。其港口位置使其在十字军余波与黎凡特贸易中受益。
gdpDescription.en: Cyprus had a relatively prosperous medium-sized eastern Mediterranean economy centered on agriculture, sugar, wine, and entrepôt trade. Its ports benefited from the aftereffects of the crusades and Levantine commerce.

mainIndustries.zh: 谷物种植、甘蔗制糖、葡萄酒、橄榄油、港口贸易、手工业
mainIndustries.en: grain cultivation, sugar production, wine, olive oil, port trade, handicrafts

tradeGoods.zh: 糖、葡萄酒、棉布、盐、橄榄油、木材、香料转口货
tradeGoods.en: sugar, wine, cotton cloth, salt, olive oil, timber, re-exported spices

name.zh: 拜占庭贝赞特与西方银币并用
name.en: Byzantine bezants and western silver coinage

householdWealth.zh: 城市商人和地主家庭财富较高，农村希腊农户多为小生产者或依附农，财富分化明显。
householdWealth.en: Urban merchants and landed households were relatively wealthy, while most rural Greek households were small producers or dependent cultivators, with marked inequality in wealth.

unit.zh: 银第纳尔等值/劳动者/年

economicSystem.zh: 以封建地产经济为基础、由港口商业和地中海贸易补充的混合型经济。
economicSystem.en: A mixed economy based on feudal landed production and supplemented by port commerce and Mediterranean trade.

treasuryDescription.zh: 王室金库规模中等，能够应付常规守备与宫廷开支，但面对大规模海上战争或外敌入侵时仍较脆弱。
treasuryDescription.en: The royal treasury was moderate in size, sufficient for routine garrisoning and court expenses, but still vulnerable in the face of major naval war or external invasion.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策偏重维持港口税收、稳定王室庄园收入并避免过度压榨贸易社群。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy emphasized preserving port revenues, stabilizing crown-estate income, and avoiding excessive pressure on commercial communities.

description.zh: 由王室直属骑士和贵族封臣提供，是野战中的核心冲击力量。
description.en: Provided by the crown and noble vassals, they formed the core shock force in field warfare.

description.zh: 包括雇佣步兵、本地征召兵和各城堡守备队，负责防御与治安。
description.en: Included hired infantry, locally levied troops, and castle garrisons responsible for defense and security.

description.zh: 规模有限，主要用于护航、港口防卫和短程海上巡逻。
description.en: Limited in size, they were used mainly for convoying, port defense, and short-range patrols.

commanderInChief.zh: 塞浦路斯国王亨利二世

technology.zh: 军事技术属于晚期十字军体系，依赖链甲骑士、石弩、攻城器械与地中海海运补给。
technology.en: Military technology belonged to the late crusader system, relying on mail-clad cavalry, crossbows, siege machinery, and Mediterranean sea-borne logistics.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自马穆鲁克苏丹国的海上与沿岸压力，以及东地中海贸易竞争与潜在的王朝纠纷。
threats.en: Major threats came from Mamluk naval and coastal pressure, competition in eastern Mediterranean trade, and potential dynastic disputes.

description.zh: 初步正规化，有季节性操练
description.en: Semi-professional, seasonal drills

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: 铁环编织甲衣，灵活且防护可靠
description.en: Iron ring-linked armor, flexible and reliably protective

description.zh: 英格兰长弓手主力弓，射程可达300步
description.en: English longbow, effective range up to 300 paces

description.zh: 骑士标准双刃直剑，十字形护手
description.en: Knight's standard double-edged straight sword with cruciform guard

populationDescription.zh: 人口以希腊语东正教农民为多数，拉丁贵族与教士构成少数统治层。港口城市还聚居叙利亚人、亚美尼亚人、犹太人与意大利商人。
populationDescription.en: The population was majority Greek-speaking Orthodox peasantry, with Latin nobles and clergy forming a minority ruling stratum. Port towns also hosted Syrians, Armenians, Jews, and Italian merchants.

socialClasses.zh: 王室与贵族、拉丁与希腊教士、城市商人和手工业者、自由农与依附农、少数奴仆。
socialClasses.en: Royalty and nobility, Latin and Greek clergy, urban merchants and artisans, free peasants and dependent cultivators, and a small servile population.

allies.zh: 与部分十字军残余势力、教廷及意大利海商共和国保持合作关系。
allies.en: It maintained cooperative ties with remnants of the crusader states, the papacy, and the Italian maritime republics.

enemies.zh: 主要敌手为马穆鲁克苏丹国；与周边拉丁和希腊政权亦存在商业与政治摩擦。
enemies.en: Its principal adversary was the Mamluk Sultanate; it also had commercial and political frictions with nearby Latin and Greek polities.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交上力求依靠海上贸易网络、教廷支持与王室婚姻来维持东地中海的生存空间。
foreignPolicy.en: Its foreign policy sought to preserve room for survival in the eastern Mediterranean through maritime networks, papal support, and dynastic marriages.

era.zh: 中世纪盛期后段的东地中海十字军时代
era.en: Later High Medieval eastern Mediterranean crusader era

keyInnovations.zh: 制糖工艺、港口商业记账、城堡防御工程、石弩与海运补给体系。
keyInnovations.en: Sugar-processing techniques, port commercial bookkeeping, castle defensive engineering, crossbows, and maritime supply systems.

strengths.zh: 海岛地理、港口贸易、较强财政汲取能力与多元商业社群是其主要优势。
strengths.en: Its chief strengths were insular geography, port commerce, relatively strong fiscal extraction, and diverse mercantile communities.

weaknesses.zh: 兵力有限，社会族群与教派分层明显，对外部海上力量和国际贸易环境依赖较深。
weaknesses.en: Its weaknesses were limited manpower, pronounced ethnic and confessional stratification, and deep dependence on external naval power and international trade conditions.

outlook.zh: 短期内王国仍可保持稳定，但若黎凡特局势恶化或贸易转移，其安全与财政都会迅速承压。
outlook.en: In the short term the kingdom could remain stable, but deterioration in Levantine politics or a shift in trade would quickly strain both its security and finances.

description.zh: 1280年前后的塞浦路斯是一个由吕西尼昂王朝统治、依托港口贸易和封建地产的东地中海拉丁王国。
description.en: Around 1280, Cyprus was an eastern Mediterranean Latin kingdom ruled by the Lusignan dynasty and sustained by port commerce and feudal landed wealth.

dynasty.zh: 德勒王朝（布列塔尼支系）

governmentForm.zh: 这是一个在法国王权宗主框架下拥有较强地方自主性的封建公国式王国政体。
governmentForm.en: This was a feudal princely polity with strong local autonomy under the broader suzerainty framework of the French crown.

socialStructure.zh: 布列塔尼社会以公爵及地方贵族为上层，骑士、教士与城市精英构成中间阶层。广大农村人口由自由农、小佃农与附庸农组成，沿海地区则有渔民、盐工和海贸商人。布列塔尼语地区与加洛语地区在习俗和法律实践上也存在差异。
socialStructure.en: Breton society was headed by the duke and local nobility, with knights, clergy, and urban elites forming the middle strata. The broad rural population consisted of free peasants, small tenants, and dependent cultivators, while coastal regions supported fishermen, salt workers, and maritime traders. Breton-speaking and Gallo-speaking areas also differed in custom and legal practice.

rulingClass.zh: 统治阶层包括德勒家族的公爵宫廷、主要伯爵与男爵家族，以及高阶主教和修道院长。其权力基础在于封地、城堡、教会赞助和对地方法庭的控制。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class included the ducal court of the House of Dreux, major comital and baronial families, and senior bishops and abbots. Their power rested on fiefs, castles, ecclesiastical patronage, and control over local courts.

succession.zh: 继承以家族世袭为主，但常受婚姻安排、法国国王认可与地方贵族支持影响。若出现继承争议，宗主权因素可能强化法王干预。
succession.en: Succession was principally hereditary, but was often shaped by marriage arrangements, recognition by the king of France, and support from local nobles. In disputed cases, suzerain rights could increase royal French intervention.

structure.zh: 布列塔尼由公爵及其宫廷统治，中央机构规模不大，但通过巡回司法、财政官和封臣网络维持统治。各伯爵领、主教区与城市社群拥有较强地方性权力，因此统治更接近协商式封建管理。
structure.en: Brittany was governed by the duke and his court, with a modest central apparatus that ruled through itinerant justice, fiscal officers, and vassalic networks. Counties, bishoprics, and urban communities retained substantial local power, making rule more akin to negotiated feudal governance.

function.zh: 管理公爵领地收入、市场税、渡口税和封建贡赋。
function.en: Managed ducal domain revenues, market dues, ferry tolls, and feudal payments.

function.zh: 审理贵族争端、领地诉讼、治安案件与上诉事务。
function.en: Heard noble disputes, territorial suits, public order cases, and appeals.

function.zh: 协调封臣军役、城堡维修和边海防备。
function.en: Coordinated feudal military service, castle maintenance, and coastal defense.

localAdmin.zh: 地方治理主要由伯爵、男爵、主教、修道院领主和城镇官员共同执行。公爵常需通过特许状、审判巡回和婚姻联盟来巩固地方服从。
localAdmin.en: Local governance was carried out largely by counts, barons, bishops, monastic lords, and town officers. The duke often relied on charters, judicial circuits, and marriage alliances to secure local obedience.

legalSystem.zh: 法律以封建习惯法为主，受教会法和法国北部法域影响。不同地区保留本地惯例，司法统一性有限。
legalSystem.en: Law was based chiefly on feudal customary practice, shaped by canon law and the legal traditions of northern France. Different regions retained local customs, so legal uniformity was limited.

taxationSystem.zh: 财政收入来自公爵领地地租、市场与通行税、盐税、港口税和封建义务。直接普遍性征税能力较弱，需依赖领地收入和临时征收。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came from ducal rents, market and transit dues, salt taxes, port tolls, and feudal obligations. The capacity for broad direct taxation was weak, so the polity depended on domain income and extraordinary levies.

religion.zh: 天主教

culturalAchievements.zh: 布列塔尼保有鲜明的地方宗教传统、修道院文化和骑士贵族礼仪。其圣徒传说、地方编年史和石造教堂建筑体现了法兰西与不列颠传统的融合。
culturalAchievements.en: Brittany preserved strong local religious traditions, monastic culture, and knightly aristocratic ceremony. Its saintly legends, local chronicles, and stone church architecture reflected a blend of French and insular Breton traditions.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系：凯尔特语族布列塔尼语与罗曼语支加洛/古法语。
languageFamily.en: Indo-European: Celtic Breton and Romance Gallo/Old French.

philosophy.zh: 以拉丁基督教世界观、地方圣徒崇拜和凯尔特传统遗绪相结合为特点。
philosophy.en: It was marked by a combination of Latin Christian worldview, local saint cults, and surviving Celtic traditions.

writingSystem.zh: 主要使用拉丁字母，文书语言以拉丁语和古法语为主，民间通行布列塔尼语与加洛语。
writingSystem.en: The Latin alphabet was used, with Latin and Old French dominating documents, while Breton and Gallo were common vernaculars.

unit.zh: 银里弗尔图尔努瓦等值
银里弗尔图尔努瓦等值/人/年
unit.en: silver livre tournois equivalent per person/year

gdpDescription.zh: 布列塔尼经济以农业、盐业、渔业和沿海贸易为基础，整体富裕程度在法兰西西部属中上。其海岸线和港口使其在英吉利海峡与比斯开湾贸易中占有一席之地。
gdpDescription.en: Brittany’s economy rested on agriculture, salt, fisheries, and coastal trade, placing it in the upper-middle range of prosperity in western France. Its coastline and ports gave it a useful role in Channel and Bay of Biscay commerce.

mainIndustries.zh: 农业、畜牧、盐业、渔业、航运、麻布与毛织品加工
mainIndustries.en: agriculture, livestock, salt production, fisheries, shipping, linen and wool processing

tradeGoods.zh: 盐、鱼、谷物、亚麻布、毛织品、葡萄酒转运品、木材
tradeGoods.en: salt, fish, grain, linen, woolens, re-exported wine, timber

name.zh: 图尔里弗尔体系与地方银币
name.en: Livre tournois system and local silver coinage

householdWealth.zh: 沿海商人、盐田经营者和大领主家庭财富较高，内陆小农和佃户则以维持生计为主。
householdWealth.en: Coastal merchants, salt proprietors, and major lordly households held relatively high wealth, while inland small peasants and tenants lived mostly at subsistence levels.

unit.zh: 银里弗尔图尔努瓦等值/劳动者/年
unit.en: silver livre tournois equivalent per worker/year

unit.zh: 银里弗尔图尔努瓦等值/年

economicSystem.zh: 以封建土地关系为主、辅以市场交换和海岸贸易的区域性中世纪经济。
economicSystem.en: A regional medieval economy dominated by feudal land relations and supplemented by market exchange and coastal trade.

unit.zh: 银里弗尔图尔努瓦等值/年
银里弗尔图尔努瓦等值/年
银里弗尔图尔努瓦等值/年
