outlook.en: The Grand Duchy of Lithuania was in rapid expansion; if it could resist the Teutonic Knights and consolidate internally, it could become a major Eastern European power.

description.zh: 1280年前后的立陶宛大公国是欧洲最后的异教强国之一，在特莱德尼斯大公统治下快速扩张，以强大的骑兵力量抵御十字军并向罗斯地区东进。
description.en: Around 1280, the Grand Duchy of Lithuania was one of Europe's last pagan powers, rapidly expanding under Grand Duke Traidenis, resisting crusaders with powerful cavalry while pushing eastward into Rus' territories.

dynasty.zh: 丹多洛家族（选举制无固定王朝）
dynasty.en: Dandolo family (no fixed dynasty under elective system)

governmentForm.zh: 以总督为名义元首的贵族共和制，实权掌握在大议会和商人寡头手中，通过精密的选举程序和权力制衡维持运转。
governmentForm.en: An aristocratic republic with the Doge as nominal head of state, real power held by the Great Council and merchant oligarchs, sustained through elaborate electoral procedures and checks and balances.

socialStructure.zh: 社会由贵族（patricii）、富裕商人（cittadini）、手工业者（popolo）和底层劳工构成。贵族商人寡头垄断政治权力和海外贸易。
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of nobles (patricii), wealthy merchants (cittadini), artisans (popolo), and lower laborers. The noble merchant oligarchy monopolized political power and overseas trade.

rulingClass.zh: 统治阶层为登记在《金册》中的贵族家族，他们通过大议会和十人议会控制国家政治。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class comprised noble families registered in the Golden Book (Libro d'Oro), controlling state politics through the Great Council and Council of Ten.

succession.zh: 总督通过多轮抽签和投票的复杂选举程序产生，由大议会选出，终身任职但权力受制度制约。
succession.en: The Doge was chosen through an elaborate multi-round process of lots and ballots by the Great Council, serving for life but with power constrained by institutional checks.

structure.zh: 国家由总督、大议会、元老院和十人议会共同治理，分权制衡极为成熟。行政效率高，外交和商务管理尤为精密。
structure.en: The state was governed jointly by the Doge, Great Council, Senate, and Council of Ten, with highly mature checks and balances. Administrative efficiency was high, with especially refined diplomatic and commercial management.

function.zh: 立法机构，选举重要官员，制定国家大政。
function.en: Legislative body that elected key officials and set major state policies.

function.zh: 处理外交、贸易和军事等日常国务。
function.en: Handled daily affairs of diplomacy, trade, and military matters.

function.zh: 负责国家安全、情报和对内秘密警察事务。
function.en: Responsible for state security, intelligence, and internal secret police affairs.

function.zh: 管理造船厂、商船队和海军舰队。
function.en: Managed shipyards, merchant fleet, and naval forces.

localAdmin.zh: 本土由各教区和区域官员管理；海外领地（克里特、科孚等）由派遣总督和殖民官治理。
localAdmin.en: The homeland was administered by parish and district officials; overseas territories (Crete, Corfu, etc.) were governed by appointed governors and colonial officials.

legalSystem.zh: 法律以威尼斯市政法、罗马法和商法为基础，司法独立性较高，合同和海事法尤为发达。
legalSystem.en: Law was based on Venetian municipal law, Roman law, and commercial law, with relatively high judicial independence and especially developed contract and maritime law.

taxationSystem.zh: 收入主要来自关税、商业税、盐税、海外领地贡赋和国债利息。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came mainly from customs, commercial taxes, salt tax, overseas territory tribute, and state debt interest.

religion.zh: 天主教

culturalAchievements.zh: 威尼斯以圣马可大教堂、拜占庭与哥特式融合建筑、玻璃工艺（穆拉诺）、航海技术和精密的外交体系闻名于世。
culturalAchievements.en: Venice was world-renowned for St. Mark's Basilica, Byzantine-Gothic fusion architecture, glassmaking (Murano), maritime technology, and sophisticated diplomatic systems.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系罗曼语族（威尼斯方言），行政也用拉丁语。
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, Romance (Venetian dialect), with Latin also used in administration.

philosophy.zh: 以天主教信仰、古典人文学术和务实商业伦理相结合为特征。
philosophy.en: Characterized by a combination of Catholic faith, classical humanistic scholarship, and pragmatic commercial ethics.

writingSystem.zh: 使用拉丁字母书写威尼斯方言和拉丁语文书。
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet was used for Venetian dialect and Latin documents.

gdpDescription.zh: 威尼斯是地中海最富有的商业帝国之一，经济以远洋贸易、造船业、玻璃制造和金融业为支柱，掌控东地中海的香料和奢侈品贸易。
gdpDescription.en: Venice was one of the wealthiest commercial empires in the Mediterranean, with an economy built on long-distance trade, shipbuilding, glassmaking, and finance, controlling Eastern Mediterranean spice and luxury goods trade.

mainIndustries.zh: 远洋贸易、造船业、玻璃制造、丝绸纺织、盐业、金融
mainIndustries.en: Long-distance trade, shipbuilding, glassmaking, silk textiles, salt, finance

tradeGoods.zh: 香料、丝绸、玻璃制品、盐、木材、粮食、贵金属、奢侈品
tradeGoods.en: Spices, silk, glassware, salt, timber, grain, precious metals, luxury goods

householdWealth.zh: 贵族和商人家庭极为富有，拥有宫殿、船队和海外资产。普通市民生活水平在欧洲属于上等。
householdWealth.en: Noble and merchant families were extremely wealthy, possessing palaces, fleets, and overseas assets. Ordinary citizens enjoyed a standard of living among the highest in Europe.

economicSystem.zh: 高度发达的商业资本主义经济，以海洋贸易垄断、公共债券制度和成熟的合伙企业制度为特征。
economicSystem.en: A highly developed commercial capitalist economy characterized by maritime trade monopoly, public bond systems, and mature partnership enterprise systems.

treasuryDescription.zh: 威尼斯国库极为充裕，以金银储备和公共债券为基础，可支撑多年战争开支。成熟的公债制度为欧洲先驱。
treasuryDescription.en: Venice's treasury was extremely well-funded, based on gold and silver reserves and public bonds, capable of sustaining years of war expenditure. Its mature public debt system was a European pioneer.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 通过关税、盐税垄断和公共债券维持财政，同时积极投资海军和海外贸易基础设施。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy maintained finances through customs, salt tax monopoly, and public bonds, while actively investing in the navy and overseas trade infrastructure.

description.zh: 威尼斯海军是地中海最强大的海上力量之一，以战舰和桨帆船组成。
description.en: The Venetian navy was one of the most powerful maritime forces in the Mediterranean, composed of warships and galleys.

description.zh: 驻守克里特、科孚等海外领地的陆地守军。
description.en: Land garrisons stationed in overseas territories such as Crete and Corfu.

description.zh: 威尼斯本土防卫力量和雇佣的外国士兵。
description.en: Venice's homeland defense forces and hired foreign soldiers.

commanderInChief.zh: 威尼斯总督（名义）及元老院
commanderInChief.en: Doge of Venice (nominal) and the Senate

technology.zh: 军事技术以先进造船工艺、桨帆战船、弩炮和城堡防御为核心。阿森纳造船厂是当时世界上最大的工业设施之一。
technology.en: Military technology centered on advanced shipbuilding, galley warships, crossbows and artillery, and fortress defense. The Arsenal shipyard was one of the largest industrial facilities in the world.

threats.zh: 热那亚共和国是最主要的商业和军事竞争对手，奥斯曼势力正在东方崛起，拜占庭残余势力和意大利内陆城邦亦有摩擦。
threats.en: The Republic of Genoa was the main commercial and military rival, Ottoman power was rising in the east, and friction existed with Byzantine remnants and Italian inland city-states.

description.zh: 职业化训练，拥有成熟的操典
description.en: Professional training with established manuals

description.zh: 士气一般，作战意志不稳定
description.en: Mediocre morale, inconsistent fighting will

description.zh: 骑士标准双刃直剑，十字形护手
description.en: Knight's standard double-edged straight sword with cruciform guard

description.zh: 早期火铳与火箭（中国/伊斯兰世界传入）
description.en: Early firearms and rockets (introduced from China/Islamic world)

description.zh: 伊斯兰世界弯刀，轻便利于骑战劈斩
description.en: Islamic curved sword, light and ideal for mounted slashing

description.zh: 蒙古骑兵标志武器，射程远精度高
description.en: Signature Mongol cavalry weapon with great range and accuracy

populationDescription.zh: 威尼斯本城约有10万人口，是当时欧洲最大城市之一。加上海外领地总人口约80万。
populationDescription.en: Venice proper had about 100,000 inhabitants, one of the largest cities in Europe at the time. Including overseas territories, the total population was about 800,000.

description.zh: 中世纪海洋贸易帝国，水上之城
description.en: Medieval maritime trading empire, city on water

socialClasses.zh: 贵族（patricii）、公民商人（cittadini）、手工业行会成员（popolo）、水手与劳工、海外殖民地居民。
socialClasses.en: Nobles (patricii), citizen merchants (cittadini), artisan guild members (popolo), sailors and laborers, overseas colonial residents.

allies.zh: 与拜占庭帝国有复杂的贸易和政治关系，与部分十字军国家和教廷保持合作。
allies.en: Had complex trade and political relations with the Byzantine Empire, maintained cooperation with some Crusader states and the Papacy.

enemies.zh: 热那亚共和国是最大的海上贸易竞争对手，双方在东地中海多次爆发战争。
enemies.en: The Republic of Genoa was the greatest maritime trade rival, with multiple wars fought between them in the Eastern Mediterranean.

foreignPolicy.zh: 以商业利益为核心的务实外交，灵活结盟，利用外交手段和海军力量维护贸易垄断。
foreignPolicy.en: Pragmatic diplomacy centered on commercial interests, with flexible alliances, using diplomatic means and naval power to maintain trade monopoly.

era.zh: 中世纪晚期地中海商业帝国最高技术水平
era.en: Highest technological level of late medieval Mediterranean commercial empires

keyInnovations.zh: 阿森纳造船厂的流水线造船、穆拉诺玻璃工艺、先进航海术、银行和保险制度、公共债券制度。
keyInnovations.en: Arsenal assembly-line shipbuilding, Murano glassmaking, advanced navigation, banking and insurance systems, public bond system.

navalAndTrade.zh: 海运与贸易技术地中海领先：威尼斯兵工厂已成为地中海最大的造船设施。威尼斯商船队连接东西方贸易，马可·波罗正从中国归来（1295年回到威尼斯）。威尼斯玻璃制造（穆拉诺岛）和造船技术在地中海独占鳌头。
navalAndTrade.en: Mediterranean-leading maritime and trade technology: the Venice Arsenal is the Mediterranean's largest shipbuilding facility. Venetian merchant fleets connect East-West trade; Marco Polo is returning from China (arriving Venice 1295). Venetian glassmaking (Murano) and shipbuilding technology lead the Mediterranean.

overallAssessment.zh: 1280年的威尼斯是地中海贸易和造船技术的中心。兵工厂的标准化生产管理远超同时代任何欧洲国家。威尼斯的商业网络延伸至蒙古帝国和中国（马可·波罗）。但欧洲整体技术水平在此时仍远落后于中国和伊斯兰世界。
overallAssessment.en: Venice in 1280 is the center of Mediterranean trade and shipbuilding technology. The Arsenal's standardized production management far surpasses any contemporary European country. Venice's commercial network extends to the Mongol Empire and China (Marco Polo). But overall European technology still lags far behind China and the Islamic world.

strengths.zh: 世界级的海军和商业网络、高效的共和制政府、强大的金融体系、先进的造船和航海技术。
strengths.en: World-class navy and commercial network, efficient republican government, powerful financial system, advanced shipbuilding and navigation technology.

weaknesses.zh: 领土面积极小、陆军力量有限、过度依赖海上贸易、与热那亚的竞争消耗巨大。
weaknesses.en: Extremely small territory, limited land army, over-dependence on maritime trade, and enormous resource consumption from competition with Genoa.

outlook.zh: 威尼斯正处于商业霸权的鼎盛时期，但与热那亚的竞争和东方新兴势力的崛起将考验其持续繁荣的能力。
outlook.en: Venice was at the peak of its commercial hegemony, but competition with Genoa and the rise of new eastern powers would test its ability to sustain prosperity.

description.zh: 1280年前后的威尼斯共和国是地中海最强大的商业帝国之一，由总督乔瓦尼·丹多洛执政，以精密的贵族共和制、强大的海军和遍布东地中海的贸易网络著称。
description.en: Around 1280, the Republic of Venice was one of the most powerful commercial empires in the Mediterranean, governed by Doge Giovanni Dandolo, renowned for its sophisticated aristocratic republic, powerful navy, and trade networks spanning the Eastern Mediterranean.

dynasty.zh: 无固定王朝（寡头选举制）

governmentForm.zh: 以商人寡头为核心的共和制，政局常因贵族派系（圭尔夫与吉伯林）斗争而动荡不安。
governmentForm.en: A republic centered on merchant oligarchs, with politics frequently destabilized by noble faction (Guelph and Ghibelline) strife.

socialStructure.zh: 社会由贵族商人家族、普通商人、手工业行会成员、水手和底层劳工构成。家族派系斗争贯穿政治生活。
socialStructure.en: Society comprised noble merchant families, ordinary merchants, artisan guild members, sailors, and lower laborers. Family factional strife pervaded political life.

rulingClass.zh: 统治阶层为主要商人贵族家族，他们通过派系竞争轮流控制政府。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class consisted of major merchant noble families who alternately controlled government through factional competition.

succession.zh: 领导权通过贵族选举和派系谈判决定，政体频繁更换，从总督制到双执政制反复变动。
succession.en: Leadership was determined through noble elections and factional negotiations, with the form of government frequently changing between single-captain and dual-captain systems.

structure.zh: 政府由执政团和贵族议会管理，权力在各大家族间频繁转移。行政效率受派系斗争影响。
structure.en: Government was managed by the governing council and noble assembly, with power frequently transferring among major families. Administrative efficiency was affected by factional strife.

function.zh: 统筹外交、军事和商务决策。
function.en: Coordinated diplomatic, military, and commercial decisions.

function.zh: 管理船队、港口和海上贸易。
function.en: Managed fleets, ports, and maritime trade.

function.zh: 管理关税、贷款和国库。
function.en: Managed customs, loans, and the state treasury.

localAdmin.zh: 本土由区官员管理；海外殖民地（如加拉塔、卡法）由派遣总督治理。
localAdmin.en: The homeland was administered by district officials; overseas colonies (such as Galata and Caffa) were governed by appointed governors.

legalSystem.zh: 法律以热那亚市政法和商法为基础，海事法和贸易合同法尤为发达。
legalSystem.en: Law was based on Genoese municipal and commercial law, with especially developed maritime and trade contract law.

taxationSystem.zh: 收入主要来自关税、海外殖民地收入、盐税和金融收益。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came mainly from customs, overseas colonial income, salt tax, and financial returns.

religion.zh: 天主教

culturalAchievements.zh: 热那亚以航海探险、海事法发展、银行业创新和黑海贸易网络闻名。圣乔治银行是欧洲早期金融创新的典范。
culturalAchievements.en: Genoa was renowned for maritime exploration, maritime law development, banking innovation, and Black Sea trade networks. The Bank of Saint George was a model of early European financial innovation.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系罗曼语族（利古里亚方言），行政用拉丁语。
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, Romance (Ligurian dialect), with Latin used in administration.

philosophy.zh: 以天主教信仰、商业务实精神和海洋冒险传统相结合。
philosophy.en: Characterized by Catholic faith, commercial pragmatism, and maritime adventure tradition.

writingSystem.zh: 使用拉丁字母书写拉丁语和利古里亚方言文书。
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet was used for Latin and Ligurian dialect documents.

gdpDescription.zh: 热那亚是地中海西部最富有的商业城邦之一，以黑海贸易、银行业和海外殖民地收入为经济支柱。
gdpDescription.en: Genoa was one of the wealthiest commercial city-states in the western Mediterranean, with Black Sea trade, banking, and overseas colonial income as economic pillars.

mainIndustries.zh: 远洋贸易、银行业、造船业、丝绸纺织、海外殖民
mainIndustries.en: Long-distance trade, banking, shipbuilding, silk textiles, overseas colonialism

tradeGoods.zh: 香料、丝绸、明矾、奴隶、粮食、毛皮、贵金属
tradeGoods.en: Spices, silk, alum, slaves, grain, furs, precious metals

householdWealth.zh: 商人贵族家庭极为富有，拥有宫殿、船队和海外商站。普通市民从航海和手工业中获得较高收入。
householdWealth.en: Merchant noble families were extremely wealthy, possessing palaces, fleets, and overseas trading posts. Ordinary citizens earned relatively high incomes from seafaring and crafts.

economicSystem.zh: 高度发达的商业资本主义经济，以海上贸易、金融创新和殖民地剥削为特征。
economicSystem.en: A highly developed commercial capitalist economy characterized by maritime trade, financial innovation, and colonial exploitation.

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库以金银和金融资产为主，储备充裕，但派系斗争导致财政管理时有混乱。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury consisted mainly of gold, silver, and financial assets with ample reserves, though factional strife sometimes caused fiscal management confusion.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 以关税和殖民地收入为财政基础，银行业利润为重要补充，但派系更替导致政策连续性不佳。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy was based on customs and colonial income, supplemented by banking profits, but factional turnover undermined policy continuity.

description.zh: 热那亚海军在地中海西部和黑海具有强大实力。
description.en: The Genoese navy held powerful strength in the western Mediterranean and Black Sea.

description.zh: 热那亚弩手在欧洲享有盛誉，同时有本土防御部队和雇佣兵。
description.en: Genoese crossbowmen were renowned across Europe, alongside homeland defense forces and mercenaries.

description.zh: 驻守加拉塔、卡法等海外据点的守军。
description.en: Garrisons stationed at overseas outposts such as Galata and Caffa.

technology.zh: 军事技术以先进造船工艺、弩（热那亚弩手闻名欧洲）和海战战术为核心。
technology.en: Military technology centered on advanced shipbuilding, crossbows (Genoese crossbowmen were famous across Europe), and naval warfare tactics.

threats.zh: 威尼斯共和国是最大竞争对手，双方在东地中海和黑海多次交战。意大利内陆势力和北非海盗亦构成威胁。
threats.en: The Republic of Venice was the greatest rival, with multiple engagements in the Eastern Mediterranean and Black Sea. Italian inland powers and North African pirates also posed threats.

description.zh: 职业化训练，拥有成熟的操典
description.en: Professional training with established manuals

description.zh: 士气一般，作战意志不稳定
description.en: Mediocre morale, inconsistent fighting will

description.zh: 英格兰长弓手主力弓，射程可达300步
description.en: English longbow, effective range up to 300 paces

description.zh: 拜占庭海战秘密武器，水上不灭之火
description.en: Byzantine naval secret weapon, inextinguishable fire on water

description.zh: 绞盘上弦重弩，可破重甲
description.en: Windlass-drawn heavy crossbow capable of piercing heavy armor

description.zh: 早期火铳与火箭（中国/伊斯兰世界传入）
description.en: Early firearms and rockets (introduced from China/Islamic world)

populationDescription.zh: 热那亚本城约8万人口，加上利古里亚海岸和海外殖民地总人口约50万。
populationDescription.en: Genoa proper had about 80,000 inhabitants, with a total of about 500,000 including the Ligurian coast and overseas colonies.

description.zh: 中世纪海洋贸易强国
description.en: Medieval maritime trading power

socialClasses.zh: 贵族商人家族、普通商人、手工业行会成员、水手、殖民地居民、底层劳工。
socialClasses.en: Noble merchant families, ordinary merchants, artisan guild members, sailors, colonial residents, lower laborers.

allies.zh: 与蒙古汗国（尤其是金帐汗国）保持贸易合作，与拜占庭帝国有利益互换关系。
allies.en: Maintained trade cooperation with Mongol khanates (especially the Golden Horde), and had interest-exchange relations with the Byzantine Empire.

enemies.zh: 威尼斯是最大的敌对势力，比萨和其他意大利海洋城邦也是竞争者。
enemies.en: Venice was the greatest hostile power, with Pisa and other Italian maritime city-states also being competitors.

foreignPolicy.zh: 以商业利益为导向的灵活外交，积极在黑海和东地中海建立殖民据点以对抗威尼斯。
foreignPolicy.en: Flexible commerce-oriented diplomacy, actively establishing colonial outposts in the Black Sea and Eastern Mediterranean to counter Venice.

era.zh: 中世纪晚期地中海商业城邦最高技术水平
era.en: Highest technological level of late medieval Mediterranean commercial city-states

keyInnovations.zh: 先进造船工艺、弩的大规模应用、银行与金融创新、海事保险和航海制图。
keyInnovations.en: Advanced shipbuilding, large-scale crossbow deployment, banking and financial innovation, maritime insurance, and nautical cartography.

strengths.zh: 强大的海军、发达的银行业、广泛的黑海殖民贸易网络、享誉欧洲的弩手。
strengths.en: Powerful navy, developed banking sector, extensive Black Sea colonial trade network, crossbowmen renowned across Europe.

weaknesses.zh: 内部派系斗争严重、政局不稳、领土狭小、与威尼斯的竞争消耗巨大。
weaknesses.en: Severe internal factional strife, political instability, small territory, and enormous resource consumption from competition with Venice.

outlook.zh: 热那亚商业实力强大，但内部派系斗争和与威尼斯的持续竞争可能削弱其长期竞争力。
outlook.en: Genoa's commercial strength was formidable, but internal factional strife and continuous competition with Venice could undermine its long-term competitiveness.

description.zh: 1280年前后的热那亚共和国是地中海西部的商业强国，以强大的海军、发达的银行业和遍布黑海的殖民贸易网络著称，但内部派系斗争不断。
description.en: Around 1280, the Republic of Genoa was a commercial powerhouse of the western Mediterranean, renowned for its powerful navy, developed banking sector, and Black Sea colonial trade networks, though plagued by constant internal factional strife.

dynasty.zh: 奥尔西尼家族（教皇选举制无固定王朝）
dynasty.en: Orsini family (no fixed dynasty under papal election)

governmentForm.zh: 以教皇为最高世俗和宗教元首的神权政体，教廷枢机团参与决策，行政由教会官僚体系管理。
governmentForm.en: A theocratic polity with the Pope as supreme temporal and spiritual head, with the College of Cardinals participating in decisions, and administration managed by the ecclesiastical bureaucracy.

socialStructure.zh: 社会由教廷高级教士、枢机主教、地方贵族、城市商人和手工业者、农民构成。罗马贵族家族（奥尔西尼、科隆纳等）对教廷政治有深刻影响。
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of senior clergy, cardinals, local nobility, urban merchants and artisans, and peasants. Roman noble families (Orsini, Colonna, etc.) exerted profound influence on papal politics.

rulingClass.zh: 统治阶层为教皇、枢机主教团和罗马大贵族家族，他们共同控制教廷政治和领地管理。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class comprised the Pope, College of Cardinals, and great Roman noble families, jointly controlling papal politics and territorial administration.

succession.zh: 教皇由枢机主教团秘密投票选举产生，终身任职。选举常受欧洲各王国和罗马贵族家族影响。
succession.en: The Pope was elected by secret ballot of the College of Cardinals, serving for life. Elections were often influenced by European kingdoms and Roman noble families.

structure.zh: 教廷以教皇为中心，枢机团为最高顾问机构，各教廷部门（congregation）分管不同事务。领地由教皇使节和地方官治理。
structure.en: The curia centered on the Pope, with the College of Cardinals as the supreme advisory body, and various curial congregations managing different affairs. Territories were governed by papal legates and local officials.

function.zh: 处理教皇诏书、外交文书和教会法令。
function.en: Handled papal bulls, diplomatic correspondence, and church decrees.

function.zh: 管理教廷财政、什一税征收和领地收入。
function.en: Managed papal finances, tithe collection, and territorial revenues.

function.zh: 审理异端案件和维护教义纯正。
function.en: Tried heresy cases and maintained doctrinal orthodoxy.

function.zh: 负责教皇安全和教皇国领地防务。
function.en: Responsible for papal security and Papal States territorial defense.

localAdmin.zh: 教皇国各省由教皇使节或委派的总督管理，地方贵族和城市自治体保有一定自治权。
localAdmin.en: Papal States provinces were managed by papal legates or appointed governors, with local nobles and municipal authorities retaining certain autonomy.

legalSystem.zh: 法律以教会法（Canon Law）为核心，辅以罗马法传统和地方习惯法。教皇法庭为最高司法权威。
legalSystem.en: Law was based on Canon Law, supplemented by Roman legal traditions and local customary law. The papal court was the supreme judicial authority.

taxationSystem.zh: 收入来自什一税、圣彼得便士、教廷服务费、领地农业税和朝圣收入。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came from tithes, Peter's Pence, curial service fees, territorial agricultural taxes, and pilgrimage income.

religion.zh: 天主教（教廷所在地）

culturalAchievements.zh: 教皇国是欧洲天主教文化的中心，以罗马古迹、教堂建筑、经院哲学和教会法学闻名。大学和神学院培养了大量欧洲知识精英。
culturalAchievements.en: The Papal States were the center of European Catholic culture, renowned for Roman monuments, church architecture, scholastic philosophy, and canon law. Universities and seminaries trained numerous European intellectual elites.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系罗曼语族（意大利中部方言），教会和行政使用拉丁语。
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, Romance (central Italian dialects), with Latin used in ecclesiastical and administrative contexts.

philosophy.zh: 以经院哲学、托马斯主义和教会法学为核心，阿奎那的哲学体系正在深刻影响欧洲思想。
philosophy.en: Centered on scholastic philosophy, Thomism, and canon law, with Aquinas's philosophical system profoundly influencing European thought.

writingSystem.zh: 使用拉丁字母书写拉丁语和意大利方言文书。
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet was used for Latin and Italian dialect documents.

gdpDescription.zh: 经济依托教会收入、朝圣旅游、农业和罗马作为欧洲宗教中心的地位。什一税和各国教会缴款是重要收入来源。
gdpDescription.en: The economy relied on ecclesiastical income, pilgrimage tourism, agriculture, and Rome's status as Europe's religious center. Tithes and church payments from various countries were important revenue sources.

mainIndustries.zh: 农业、宗教服务、朝圣旅游、手工艺、金融
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture, religious services, pilgrimage tourism, crafts, finance

tradeGoods.zh: 谷物、葡萄酒、橄榄油、宗教艺术品、书籍、布匹
tradeGoods.en: Grain, wine, olive oil, religious artifacts, books, cloth

name.zh: 教皇银币与佛罗伦萨金币
name.en: Papal silver coins and Florentine gold florins

householdWealth.zh: 教会机构极为富有，拥有大量土地和建筑。罗马贵族与商人家庭财富丰厚。农村农民生活相对简朴。
householdWealth.en: Church institutions were extremely wealthy, possessing extensive lands and buildings. Roman noble and merchant families held substantial wealth. Rural peasants lived relatively simply.

economicSystem.zh: 以教会收入和封建农业为基础的神权国家经济，朝圣和宗教服务是独特的经济支柱。
economicSystem.en: A theocratic state economy based on ecclesiastical income and feudal agriculture, with pilgrimage and religious services as distinctive economic pillars.

treasuryDescription.zh: 教廷国库以来自全欧洲的什一税和捐献为基础，储备充裕，但大量资金用于政治斗争和建筑赞助。
treasuryDescription.en: The papal treasury was based on tithes and donations from all of Europe, with ample reserves, though large sums were spent on political struggles and building patronage.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 以全欧教会收入为财政基础，同时在意大利政治中运用财政手段维护教廷利益。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy was based on pan-European church income, while using fiscal means in Italian politics to protect papal interests.

description.zh: 教皇直属护卫和罗马城防部队。
description.en: Guard directly under the Pope and Rome city defense forces.

description.zh: 驻守教皇国各省要塞和城镇的部队。
description.en: Troops stationed at fortresses and towns across Papal States provinces.

description.zh: 战时雇用的外国士兵和地方征召武装。
description.en: Foreign soldiers hired in wartime and locally levied forces.

technology.zh: 军事技术在意大利城邦水平，以城堡防御、弩和步兵为主。教廷更依靠外交和宗教权威而非军事力量。
technology.en: Military technology was at the Italian city-state level, centered on fortress defense, crossbows, and infantry. The Papacy relied more on diplomacy and religious authority than military power.

threats.zh: 意大利各城邦的领土野心、神圣罗马帝国的干预、罗马贵族家族的内斗以及异端运动的蔓延。
threats.en: Territorial ambitions of Italian city-states, Holy Roman Empire intervention, internal strife among Roman noble families, and the spread of heretical movements.

description.zh: 初步正规化，有季节性操练
description.en: Semi-professional, seasonal drills

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: 铁环编织甲衣，灵活且防护可靠
description.en: Iron ring-linked armor, flexible and reliably protective

description.zh: 伊斯兰世界弯刀，轻便利于骑战劈斩
description.en: Islamic curved sword, light and ideal for mounted slashing

description.zh: 骑士标准双刃直剑，十字形护手
description.en: Knight's standard double-edged straight sword with cruciform guard

populationDescription.zh: 人口分布在罗马及其周边拉齐奥地区、翁布里亚、马尔凯和罗马涅等省份，以农业人口为主。
populationDescription.en: Population was distributed across Rome and surrounding Lazio, Umbria, Marche, and Romagna provinces, predominantly agricultural.

description.zh: 永恒之城，罗马帝国首都
description.en: Eternal City, capital of the Roman Empire

socialClasses.zh: 高级教士与枢机主教、罗马贵族家族、城市商人与手工业者、农民、朝圣者和流动人口。
socialClasses.en: Senior clergy and cardinals, Roman noble families, urban merchants and artisans, peasants, pilgrims, and transient populations.

allies.zh: 作为天主教世界精神领袖，与法国、英国等天主教王国保持复杂的政治宗教关系。
allies.en: As the spiritual leader of the Catholic world, maintained complex political-religious relations with Catholic kingdoms such as France and England.

enemies.zh: 与神圣罗马帝国长期争夺意大利控制权，罗马内部贵族派系斗争激烈。
enemies.en: Long-standing rivalry with the Holy Roman Empire for control of Italy, with fierce factional strife among Roman internal noble factions.

foreignPolicy.zh: 利用宗教权威和外交手段在欧洲列国间维持平衡，同时在意大利政治中维护教皇国世俗领土。
foreignPolicy.en: Used religious authority and diplomatic means to maintain balance among European powers, while protecting Papal States temporal territory in Italian politics.

era.zh: 中世纪晚期意大利神权国家技术水平
era.en: Late medieval Italian theocratic state technological level

keyInnovations.zh: 教会法学体系、大学教育制度、经院哲学方法论、教堂建筑（哥特式）、档案和文书管理。
keyInnovations.en: Canon law system, university education, scholastic philosophical methodology, church architecture (Gothic), and archive and document management.

strengths.zh: 拥有全欧洲范围的宗教权威和收入来源、深厚的文化学术传统、精密的外交网络。
strengths.en: Possessed pan-European religious authority and revenue sources, deep cultural and scholarly traditions, and sophisticated diplomatic networks.

weaknesses.zh: 军事力量薄弱、罗马贵族派系内斗不断、世俗领地管理效率不高、过度卷入意大利政治纷争。
weaknesses.en: Weak military power, constant Roman noble factional strife, inefficient temporal territory administration, and excessive entanglement in Italian political disputes.

outlook.zh: 教皇国凭借宗教权威在欧洲占据独特地位，但世俗政治纠葛和内部腐败可能逐渐削弱其影响力。
outlook.en: The Papal States occupied a unique position in Europe through religious authority, but secular political entanglements and internal corruption could gradually diminish their influence.

description.zh: 1280年前后的教皇国是天主教世界的精神和政治中心，由尼古拉三世执掌教廷，在意大利政治中维护世俗领地的同时行使全欧范围的宗教权威。
description.en: Around 1280, the Papal States were the spiritual and political center of the Catholic world, with Pope Nicholas III leading the curia, maintaining temporal territory in Italian politics while exercising pan-European religious authority.

governmentForm.zh: 以苏丹为核心的伊斯兰部族联盟，通过控制水源和贸易路线维持对索马里半岛内陆的统治。
governmentForm.en: An Islamic tribal confederation centered on the Sultan, maintaining rule over the Somali hinterland through control of water sources and trade routes.

socialStructure.zh: 社会由苏丹家族、部族酋长、宗教学者、牧民、农民和沿海商人构成。氏族制度是社会组织的基础。
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of the sultanic family, tribal chiefs, religious scholars, pastoralists, farmers, and coastal merchants. The clan system formed the basis of social organization.

rulingClass.zh: 统治阶层为加伦家族和主要部族酋长，通过水利控制和宗教权威维持统治。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class comprised the Gareen family and major tribal chiefs, maintaining rule through hydraulic control and religious authority.

succession.zh: 苏丹之位在加伦家族内世袭，部族长老对继承有影响力。
succession.en: The sultanate passed hereditarily within the Gareen family, with tribal elders exerting influence on succession.

structure.zh: 苏丹主持中央政务，各部族酋长在地方拥有广泛自治权。水利工程管理是国家行政的核心职能。
structure.en: The Sultan directed central affairs, with tribal chiefs holding extensive local autonomy. Hydraulic engineering management was a core state function.

function.zh: 处理外交、贡赋和司法事务。
function.en: Handled diplomacy, tribute, and judicial affairs.

function.zh: 管理水井、水渠和灌溉系统——国家权力的核心基础设施。
function.en: Managed wells, aqueducts, and irrigation systems — the core infrastructure of state power.

function.zh: 征收部族贡赋和贸易税。
function.en: Collected tribal tribute and trade taxes.

localAdmin.zh: 地方由部族酋长自治管理，苏丹通过控制水源和宗教裁判维持影响力。
localAdmin.en: Local governance was handled autonomously by tribal chiefs, with the Sultan maintaining influence through water source control and religious arbitration.

legalSystem.zh: 法律以伊斯兰教法为核心，辅以索马里习惯法（xeer）。部族争端由宗教学者和长老共同仲裁。
legalSystem.en: Law was based on Islamic sharia, supplemented by Somali customary law (xeer). Tribal disputes were arbitrated jointly by religious scholars and elders.

taxationSystem.zh: 收入来自牲畜税、水利使用费、贸易过境税和部族贡赋。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came from livestock levies, water usage fees, trade transit taxes, and tribal tribute.

religion.zh: 伊斯兰教（逊尼派）

culturalAchievements.zh: 阿朱兰以先进的水利工程、石灰石水渠和井系统闻名，这些基础设施在干旱的非洲之角具有关键意义。
culturalAchievements.en: The Ajuran were renowned for advanced hydraulic engineering, limestone aqueducts, and well systems, infrastructure of critical importance in the arid Horn of Africa.

languageFamily.zh: 亚非语系库施特语支（索马里语），宗教与行政用阿拉伯语。
languageFamily.en: Afro-Asiatic, Cushitic branch (Somali), with Arabic used in religious and administrative contexts.

philosophy.zh: 以逊尼派伊斯兰教法学和索马里部族习惯法传统相结合。
philosophy.en: Defined by a combination of Sunni Islamic jurisprudence and Somali tribal customary law traditions.

writingSystem.zh: 使用阿拉伯字母书写阿拉伯语宗教和行政文书，口语为索马里语。
writingSystem.en: Arabic script was used for Arabic-language religious and administrative documents, with Somali as the spoken language.

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以游牧畜牧业为主，辅以灌溉农业和与沿海港口的转口贸易。水利控制是经济命脉。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was based on nomadic pastoralism, supplemented by irrigated agriculture and transit trade with coastal ports. Hydraulic control was the economic lifeline.

mainIndustries.zh: 畜牧、灌溉农业、乳香与没药采集、转口贸易
mainIndustries.en: Pastoralism, irrigated agriculture, frankincense and myrrh collection, transit trade

tradeGoods.zh: 牲畜、乳香、没药、象牙、皮革、谷物
tradeGoods.en: Livestock, frankincense, myrrh, ivory, leather, grain

householdWealth.zh: 游牧家庭以骆驼、牛羊群为主要资产。农业区家庭拥有灌溉土地和粮仓。
householdWealth.en: Nomadic households held camels, cattle, and sheep as primary assets. Agricultural households possessed irrigated land and granaries.

economicSystem.zh: 以水利控制和游牧畜牧为核心的部族贡赋经济。
economicSystem.en: A tribal tribute economy centered on hydraulic control and nomadic pastoralism.

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库储备有限，主要以牲畜和实物形式存放，水利设施本身是最大的国家资产。
treasuryDescription.en: Treasury reserves were limited, stored mainly in livestock and kind, with hydraulic infrastructure itself being the greatest state asset.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 以水利控制为财政杠杆，对使用水源的部族征收贡赋，维持基础设施投入。
fiscalPolicy.en: Used hydraulic control as a fiscal lever, collecting tribute from tribes using water sources, and maintaining infrastructure investment.

description.zh: 苏丹直属武装力量，驻守都城和水利要塞。
description.en: Armed forces directly under the Sultan, garrisoning the capital and hydraulic fortifications.

description.zh: 骆驼和马匹骑兵，由各部族首领率领。
description.en: Camel and horse cavalry led by tribal chiefs.

description.zh: 战时征召的部族步兵。
description.en: Tribal infantry levied in wartime.

technology.zh: 军事技术以弓箭、矛盾、骆驼骑兵和简易工事为主。
technology.en: Military technology centered on bows, spears and shields, camel cavalry, and simple fortifications.

threats.zh: 邻近部族的袭扰、控制沿海港口的竞争、内部氏族叛乱。
threats.en: Raids from neighboring tribes, competition for control of coastal ports, and internal clan rebellions.

description.zh: 基础训练，民兵水平
description.en: Basic training, militia level

description.zh: 士气极低，厌战情绪蔓延
description.en: Very low morale, widespread war-weariness

description.zh: 骑兵冲锋长矛，骑士战核心武器
description.en: Cavalry charge lance, core weapon of knightly warfare

description.zh: 骑士标准双刃直剑，十字形护手
description.en: Knight's standard double-edged straight sword with cruciform guard

populationDescription.zh: 人口以游牧牧民为主，分散在索马里半岛内陆。水井和灌溉区附近有较密集的定居人口。
populationDescription.en: Population consisted mainly of nomadic pastoralists dispersed across the Somali hinterland. Denser settled populations existed near wells and irrigated areas.

socialClasses.zh: 苏丹家族与部族酋长、宗教学者、自由牧民、农民、奴隶。
socialClasses.en: Sultan's family and tribal chiefs, religious scholars, free pastoralists, farmers, slaves.

allies.zh: 与摩加迪沙苏丹国保持贸易合作，与其他索马里部族有松散联盟。
allies.en: Maintained trade cooperation with the Sultanate of Mogadishu and loose alliances with other Somali tribes.

enemies.zh: 与争夺水源和贸易路线的邻近部族有冲突，沿海城邦的独立倾向也是隐患。
enemies.en: Had conflicts with neighboring tribes competing for water sources and trade routes, with coastal city-state independence tendencies also a concern.

foreignPolicy.zh: 以水利控制为核心的地区霸权策略，同时通过宗教网络维持与印度洋商圈的联系。
foreignPolicy.en: A regional hegemony strategy centered on hydraulic control, while maintaining ties with the Indian Ocean trading sphere through religious networks.

era.zh: 中世纪东非伊斯兰水利国家技术水平
era.en: Medieval East African Islamic hydraulic state technological level

keyInnovations.zh: 石灰石水渠与井系统、灌溉农业、骆驼驯养与运输。
keyInnovations.en: Limestone aqueducts and well systems, irrigated agriculture, camel domestication and transport.

strengths.zh: 掌握关键水利基础设施、控制内陆贸易路线、伊斯兰宗教凝聚力。
strengths.en: Controlled critical hydraulic infrastructure, inland trade routes, and Islamic religious cohesion.

weaknesses.zh: 干旱环境脆弱、部族联盟松散、缺乏沿海直接控制。
weaknesses.en: Vulnerable to arid environment, loose tribal alliance, and lack of direct coastal control.

outlook.zh: 阿朱兰苏丹国凭借水利控制在非洲之角内陆占据主导地位，若能加强对沿海贸易的参与，可进一步繁荣。
outlook.en: The Ajuran Sultanate dominated the Horn of Africa hinterland through hydraulic control; if it could strengthen participation in coastal trade, further prosperity was possible.

description.zh: 1280年前后的阿朱兰苏丹国是非洲之角内陆的伊斯兰水利国家，通过控制水井和灌溉系统在干旱的索马里半岛建立霸权，以加伦王朝为统治核心。
description.en: Around 1280, the Ajuran Sultanate was an Islamic hydraulic state in the Horn of Africa hinterland, establishing hegemony in the arid Somali Peninsula through control of wells and irrigation systems, with the Gareen dynasty as its ruling core.

governmentForm.zh: 以奥巴（国王）为核心的神权世袭君主制，通过等级分明的酋长体系和宗教仪式维持统治。
governmentForm.en: A theocratic hereditary monarchy centered on the Oba (king), maintained through a hierarchical chieftaincy system and religious rituals.

socialStructure.zh: 社会由奥巴王室、贵族酋长（uzama）、行会手工业者、农民和奴隶构成。宫廷制度正在形成中。
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of the Oba's royal house, noble chiefs (uzama), guild artisans, farmers, and slaves. The court system was still forming.

rulingClass.zh: 统治阶层为奥巴王室和世袭酋长（uzama），他们通过宗教权威和土地控制维持权力。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class comprised the Oba's royal house and hereditary chiefs (uzama), maintaining power through religious authority and land control.

succession.zh: 奥巴之位在王室家族内世袭，长子优先继承，但酋长会议有确认权。
succession.en: The Oba's position passed hereditarily within the royal family with primogeniture preference, though the chiefs' council held confirmation authority.

structure.zh: 奥巴主持宫廷政务，世袭酋长（uzama）和宫廷官员共同参与治理。行政体系正在从部族制向宫廷制过渡。
structure.en: The Oba directed court affairs, with hereditary chiefs (uzama) and palace officials participating in governance. Administration was transitioning from tribal to court-based systems.

function.zh: 管理宫廷事务、仪式和对外使节。
function.en: Managed court affairs, rituals, and external envoys.

function.zh: 征收地方贡赋和管理王室财产。
function.en: Collected local tribute and managed royal property.

function.zh: 统筹王室卫队和地方军事力量。
function.en: Coordinated the royal guard and local military forces.

localAdmin.zh: 地方由世袭酋长和村社首领管理，奥巴通过贡赋制度和仪式权威维持对各地的控制。
localAdmin.en: Local governance was handled by hereditary chiefs and village headmen, with the Oba maintaining control through tribute systems and ritual authority.

legalSystem.zh: 法律以约鲁巴-埃多习惯法为基础，奥巴为最高司法权威，重大案件由宫廷裁决。
legalSystem.en: Law was based on Yoruba-Edo customary law, with the Oba as supreme judicial authority and major cases adjudicated at court.

taxationSystem.zh: 收入主要来自农业贡赋、手工业品征收和贸易税。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came mainly from agricultural tribute, artisan product levies, and trade taxes.

religion.zh: 埃多传统宗教（祖先崇拜与自然神灵崇拜）
religion.en: Edo traditional religion (ancestor and nature spirit worship)

culturalAchievements.zh: 贝宁正处于文化形成初期，青铜铸造工艺正在发展，城墙建设已经开始，将在后世成为非洲最伟大的文明之一。
culturalAchievements.en: Benin was in its early cultural formation, with bronze casting developing and city wall construction beginning, destined to become one of Africa's greatest civilizations in later centuries.

languageFamily.zh: 尼日尔-刚果语系贝努埃-刚果语支（埃多语）。
languageFamily.en: Niger-Congo, Benue-Congo branch (Edo language).

philosophy.zh: 以祖先崇拜、自然神灵信仰和奥巴的神圣王权思想为核心。
philosophy.en: Centered on ancestor worship, nature spirit beliefs, and the sacred kingship ideology of the Oba.

writingSystem.zh: 无文字系统，依靠口传传统和象征性符号。
writingSystem.en: No writing system, relying on oral traditions and symbolic signs.

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以热带农业和手工业为主，森林资源丰富，区域贸易正在发展。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was based on tropical agriculture and crafts, with rich forest resources and developing regional trade.

mainIndustries.zh: 农业、青铜铸造（初期）、棕榈油、纺织、木雕
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture, bronze casting (early), palm oil, textiles, wood carving

tradeGoods.zh: 棕榈油、胡椒、象牙、布匹、青铜器、木雕
tradeGoods.en: Palm oil, pepper, ivory, cloth, bronzework, wood carvings

householdWealth.zh: 普通家庭以耕地、棕榈树和家畜为主要资产。酋长和手工业行会成员财富较高。
householdWealth.en: Ordinary households held farmland, palm trees, and livestock as primary assets. Chiefs and artisan guild members held more wealth.

economicSystem.zh: 以贡赋制和行会手工业为核心的早期宫廷经济。
economicSystem.en: An early court economy centered on tribute and guild-based artisan production.

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库以象牙、青铜和实物储备为主，货币化程度很低。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury consisted mainly of ivory, bronze, and in-kind reserves, with very low monetization.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 以农业贡赋和手工业品征收维持宫廷运转，同时投入城墙和基础设施建设。
fiscalPolicy.en: Maintained court operations through agricultural tribute and artisan product levies, while investing in city wall and infrastructure construction.

description.zh: 奥巴直属精锐武装。
description.en: Elite forces directly under the Oba.

description.zh: 由各级酋长率领的地方武装。
description.en: Local forces led by chiefs at various levels.

description.zh: 战时从村社征召的步兵。
description.en: Infantry levied from villages in wartime.

technology.zh: 军事技术以铁制刀剑、矛盾、弓箭为主，城墙防御体系正在建设中。
technology.en: Military technology centered on iron swords, spears and shields, and bows, with city wall defense systems under construction.

threats.zh: 约鲁巴诸王国的竞争、邻近部族的领土冲突、内部酋长的离心倾向。
threats.en: Competition from Yoruba kingdoms, territorial conflicts with neighboring tribes, and centrifugal tendencies of internal chiefs.

description.zh: 基础训练，民兵水平
description.en: Basic training, militia level

description.zh: 士气极低，厌战情绪蔓延
description.en: Very low morale, widespread war-weariness

description.zh: 骑士标准双刃直剑，十字形护手
description.en: Knight's standard double-edged straight sword with cruciform guard

description.zh: 骑兵冲锋长矛，骑士战核心武器
description.en: Cavalry charge lance, core weapon of knightly warfare

populationDescription.zh: 人口分布在尼日尔河三角洲西部的热带森林和村落中，贝宁城正在发展成为区域中心。
populationDescription.en: Population was distributed across tropical forests and villages west of the Niger Delta, with Benin City developing into a regional center.

socialClasses.zh: 奥巴王室、世袭酋长、行会手工业者、自由农民、奴隶。
socialClasses.en: Oba's royal house, hereditary chiefs, guild artisans, free farmers, slaves.

allies.zh: 与部分埃多族群保持联盟关系，与伊费王国有文化联系。
allies.en: Maintained alliance relations with some Edo groups and had cultural ties with the Kingdom of Ife.

enemies.zh: 与约鲁巴诸王国和邻近部族有领土争端。
enemies.en: Had territorial disputes with Yoruba kingdoms and neighboring tribes.

foreignPolicy.zh: 以巩固核心领地和扩大贡赋网络为主要目标。
foreignPolicy.en: Focused primarily on consolidating core territory and expanding the tribute network.

era.zh: 中世纪西非森林王国初期技术水平
era.en: Early medieval West African forest kingdom technological level

keyInnovations.zh: 青铜失蜡铸造（初期发展）、铁器冶炼、夯土城墙建筑、棕榈油加工。
keyInnovations.en: Lost-wax bronze casting (early development), iron smelting, rammed-earth wall construction, palm oil processing.

strengths.zh: 宫廷制度正在建立、手工业行会发展、森林地形利于防御、文化传统深厚。
strengths.en: Court system being established, artisan guild development, forest terrain favoring defense, deep cultural traditions.

weaknesses.zh: 国家形成初期、中央集权有限、缺乏文字系统、与外部世界联系有限。
weaknesses.en: Early state formation, limited centralization, lack of writing system, limited external connections.

outlook.zh: 贝宁王国正处于建国初期，具有发展为西非重要政治和文化中心的潜力。
outlook.en: The Kingdom of Benin was in its founding phase, with potential to develop into an important West African political and cultural center.

description.zh: 1280年前后的贝宁王国是尼日尔河三角洲西部一个新兴的埃多人森林王国，以奥巴为最高统治者，正在建立宫廷制度和城墙防御体系。
description.en: Around 1280, the Kingdom of Benin was an emerging Edo forest kingdom west of the Niger Delta, with the Oba as supreme ruler, establishing court institutions and city wall defense systems.

dynasty.en: Each city-state had its own dynasty

governmentForm.zh: 由多个独立城邦组成的松散联盟，每个城邦以萨尔基为君主，通过贵族议会和伊斯兰学者参与治理。
governmentForm.en: A loose confederation of independent city-states, each ruled by a Sarki as monarch, governed with participation of noble councils and Islamic scholars.

socialStructure.zh: 社会由萨尔基王室、城市贵族、伊斯兰学者、长途商人、手工业行会、农民和奴隶构成。城市商业阶层影响力显著。
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of the Sarki's royal house, urban nobility, Islamic scholars, long-distance merchants, artisan guilds, farmers, and slaves. The urban commercial class held significant influence.

rulingClass.zh: 统治阶层为各城邦的萨尔基和贵族家族，伊斯兰学者在宫廷中担任顾问角色。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class comprised each city-state's Sarki and noble families, with Islamic scholars serving as court advisors.

succession.zh: 萨尔基之位在王室家族内世袭，但贵族议会对继承有重要影响力。
succession.en: The Sarki's position passed hereditarily within the royal family, though noble councils exerted significant influence on succession.

structure.zh: 各城邦独立治理，萨尔基主持政务，贵族会议和伊斯兰学者参与决策。城邦间无统一中央政府。
structure.en: Each city-state governed independently, with the Sarki directing affairs and noble councils and Islamic scholars participating in decisions. No unified central government existed among the city-states.

function.zh: 管理宫廷事务、外交和司法。
function.en: Managed court affairs, diplomacy, and justice.

function.zh: 管理城市市场、商税征收和贸易秩序。
function.en: Managed urban markets, commercial tax collection, and trade order.

function.zh: 统筹城邦军事力量和城墙防御。
function.en: Coordinated city-state military forces and wall defense.

localAdmin.zh: 城市由区官员管理，乡村由村社首领治理。各城邦间通过贸易和婚盟维持松散联系。
localAdmin.en: Cities were administered by district officials, and rural areas by village headmen. City-states maintained loose ties through trade and marriage alliances.

legalSystem.zh: 法律以伊斯兰教法与豪萨习惯法并行为基础，重大案件由萨尔基和学者裁决。
legalSystem.en: Law operated on parallel Islamic sharia and Hausa customary law, with major cases adjudicated by the Sarki and scholars.

taxationSystem.zh: 收入主要来自商税、市场税、农业贡赋和手工业品征收。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came mainly from commercial taxes, market dues, agricultural tribute, and artisan product levies.

religion.zh: 伊斯兰教（逊尼派）与豪萨传统信仰并存
religion.en: Islam (Sunni) coexisting with Hausa traditional beliefs

culturalAchievements.zh: 豪萨城邦以发达的城市文化、靛蓝染色工艺、皮革加工和跨撒哈拉商业网络闻名。卡诺和卡齐纳是西非重要的商业和学术中心。
culturalAchievements.en: Hausa city-states were renowned for developed urban culture, indigo dyeing, leatherworking, and trans-Saharan commercial networks. Kano and Katsina were important West African commercial and scholarly centers.

languageFamily.zh: 亚非语系乍得语族（豪萨语），宗教和学术用阿拉伯语。
languageFamily.en: Afro-Asiatic, Chadic branch (Hausa), with Arabic used in religious and scholarly contexts.

philosophy.zh: 以逊尼派伊斯兰教义与豪萨传统信仰体系并存为特征。
philosophy.en: Characterized by coexisting Sunni Islamic doctrine and Hausa traditional belief systems.

writingSystem.zh: 使用阿拉伯字母书写阿拉伯语和早期阿贾米文（阿拉伯字母书写豪萨语）。
writingSystem.en: Arabic script used for Arabic and early Ajami (Arabic script adapted for Hausa).

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以农业、手工业和跨撒哈拉转口贸易为支柱。卡诺的靛蓝布匹和皮革制品远销北非和中东。
gdpDescription.en: The economy rested on agriculture, crafts, and trans-Saharan transit trade. Kano's indigo cloth and leather goods were exported as far as North Africa and the Middle East.

mainIndustries.zh: 农业、靛蓝染布、皮革加工、铁器制造、长途贸易
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture, indigo dyeing, leatherworking, ironworking, long-distance trade

tradeGoods.zh: 靛蓝布匹、皮革制品、铁器、黄金、可乐果、盐、牲畜、奴隶
tradeGoods.en: Indigo cloth, leather goods, ironwork, gold, kola nuts, salt, livestock, slaves

householdWealth.zh: 城市商人和手工业者财富较高，拥有商铺、工坊和牲畜。农村家庭以耕地和粮仓为主要资产。
householdWealth.en: Urban merchants and artisans held higher wealth, possessing shops, workshops, and livestock. Rural households' primary assets were farmland and granaries.

economicSystem.zh: 以城市市场和跨撒哈拉贸易为核心的区域商业经济。
economicSystem.en: A regional commercial economy centered on urban markets and trans-Saharan trade.

treasuryDescription.zh: 各城邦国库以贸易收入和实物储备为主，卡诺国库最为充裕。
treasuryDescription.en: Each city-state's treasury relied on trade income and in-kind reserves, with Kano's being the most substantial.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 以商税为主要财源，各城邦独立管理财政，并投入城墙建设以防御外部威胁。
fiscalPolicy.en: Commercial taxes served as the primary revenue source, with each city-state managing finances independently and investing in wall construction against external threats.

description.zh: 各城邦萨尔基的精锐骑兵，是主要作战力量。
description.en: Elite cavalry of each city-state's Sarki, the primary fighting force.

description.zh: 驻守各城邦城墙的步兵守军。
description.en: Infantry garrisons manning each city-state's walls.

description.zh: 战时从农村和城市征召的步兵。
description.en: Infantry levied from rural and urban populations in wartime.

technology.zh: 军事技术以骑兵战术、铁制武器、城墙防御和弓箭为主。部分城邦拥有锁子甲装备的重骑兵。
technology.en: Military technology centered on cavalry tactics, iron weapons, wall defense, and bows. Some city-states possessed heavy cavalry equipped with chain mail.

threats.zh: 城邦间的相互竞争和战争、博尔努帝国的扩张压力、游牧部族的袭扰。
threats.en: Inter-city-state competition and warfare, expansionist pressure from the Bornu Empire, and nomadic tribal raiding.

description.zh: 初步正规化，有季节性操练
description.en: Semi-professional, seasonal drills

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: 伊斯兰世界弯刀，轻便利于骑战劈斩
description.en: Islamic curved sword, light and ideal for mounted slashing

description.zh: 骑士标准双刃直剑，十字形护手
description.en: Knight's standard double-edged straight sword with cruciform guard

description.zh: 骑兵冲锋长矛，骑士战核心武器
description.en: Cavalry charge lance, core weapon of knightly warfare

populationDescription.zh: 人口分布在西非萨赫勒地带的七个主要城邦及其腹地，城镇化水平在西非较高。
populationDescription.en: Population was distributed across seven major city-states and their hinterlands in the West African Sahel, with relatively high urbanization by West African standards.

socialClasses.zh: 萨尔基王室与贵族、伊斯兰学者、长途商人、手工业行会、自由农民、奴隶。
socialClasses.en: Sarki's royal house and nobles, Islamic scholars, long-distance merchants, artisan guilds, free farmers, slaves.

allies.zh: 各城邦间有松散的文化和贸易联盟，与跨撒哈拉商队网络保持合作。
allies.en: Loose cultural and trade alliances existed among city-states, with cooperation maintained with trans-Saharan caravan networks.

enemies.zh: 城邦间经常发生战争和领土争端，博尔努帝国和游牧势力从外部构成威胁。
enemies.en: Wars and territorial disputes frequently occurred among city-states, with the Bornu Empire and nomadic forces threatening from outside.

foreignPolicy.zh: 各城邦独立推行外交，以维护贸易路线安全和扩大影响范围为主要目标。
foreignPolicy.en: Each city-state conducted independent diplomacy, with securing trade routes and expanding influence as primary objectives.

era.zh: 中世纪西非萨赫勒城邦技术水平
era.en: Medieval West African Sahel city-state technological level

keyInnovations.zh: 靛蓝染色工艺、皮革鞣制、铁器冶炼、夯土城墙建筑、灌溉农业。
keyInnovations.en: Indigo dyeing techniques, leather tanning, iron smelting, rammed-earth wall construction, irrigated agriculture.

strengths.zh: 发达的城市商业、精湛的手工艺、跨撒哈拉贸易网络、高城墙防御。
strengths.en: Developed urban commerce, skilled craftsmanship, trans-Saharan trade networks, high wall defense.

weaknesses.zh: 各城邦分裂、缺乏统一指挥、相互战争消耗、易受外部帝国侵袭。
weaknesses.en: City-state fragmentation, lack of unified command, mutual warfare attrition, and vulnerability to external imperial aggression.

outlook.zh: 豪萨城邦凭借商业活力和手工业实力在西非占据重要地位，但分裂局面使其难以抵御统一帝国的威胁。
outlook.en: Hausa city-states held an important position in West Africa through commercial vitality and artisan strength, but fragmentation made them vulnerable to unified imperial threats.

description.zh: 1280年前后的豪萨城邦是西非萨赫勒地带一组以卡诺、卡齐纳为首的独立伊斯兰化商业城市国家，以靛蓝染布、皮革工艺和跨撒哈拉贸易闻名。
description.en: Around 1280, the Hausa city-states were a group of independent Islamized commercial urban states in the West African Sahel, led by Kano and Katsina, renowned for indigo dyeing, leatherwork, and trans-Saharan trade.

governmentForm.zh: 以麦（国王）为核心的伊斯兰世袭帝国，依靠部族贵族联盟、伊斯兰学者和商路控制维持统治。
governmentForm.en: An Islamic hereditary empire centered on the Mai (King), sustained through tribal noble alliances, Islamic scholars, and trade route control.

socialStructure.zh: 社会由麦的王室、部族贵族、伊斯兰学者、商人、农牧民和奴隶构成。赛法瓦王朝已有数百年历史。
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of the Mai's royal house, tribal nobles, Islamic scholars, merchants, agro-pastoralists, and slaves. The Sayfawa dynasty had already ruled for several centuries.

rulingClass.zh: 统治阶层为赛法瓦王室和主要部族贵族，伊斯兰学者为宫廷提供宗教合法性。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class comprised the Sayfawa royal house and major tribal nobles, with Islamic scholars providing religious legitimacy to the court.

succession.zh: 麦之位在赛法瓦家族内世袭，但母系血统和部族长老意见对继承有重要影响。
succession.en: The Mai's position passed hereditarily within the Sayfawa family, though maternal lineage and tribal elder opinions significantly influenced succession.

structure.zh: 麦主持中央政务，由宫廷贵族和伊斯兰学者组成的议会辅佐。地方由部族酋长和省级官员管理。
structure.en: The Mai directed central affairs, assisted by a council of court nobles and Islamic scholars. Provinces were managed by tribal chiefs and provincial officials.

function.zh: 管理宫廷事务、外交和王室财产。
function.en: Managed court affairs, diplomacy, and royal property.

function.zh: 征收贡赋、管理贸易税收和国库。
function.en: Collected tribute, managed trade taxes, and the state treasury.

function.zh: 统筹骑兵和步兵力量，管理边防。
function.en: Coordinated cavalry and infantry forces, managed frontier defense.

localAdmin.zh: 帝国各省由部族酋长和麦派遣的代理人管理，偏远地区以附庸部族形式间接统治。
localAdmin.en: Imperial provinces were managed by tribal chiefs and agents dispatched by the Mai, with remote areas indirectly ruled through vassal tribes.

legalSystem.zh: 法律以伊斯兰教法为核心框架，辅以加涅姆习惯法。重大案件由麦的宫廷裁决。
legalSystem.en: Law used Islamic sharia as its core framework, supplemented by Kanem customary law. Major cases were adjudicated by the Mai's court.

taxationSystem.zh: 收入来自部族贡赋、商队过境税、奴隶贸易利润和农牧产品征收。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came from tribal tribute, caravan transit taxes, slave trade profits, and agro-pastoral product levies.

religion.zh: 伊斯兰教（逊尼派，马利基法学派）

culturalAchievements.zh: 加涅姆是撒哈拉以南非洲最早接受伊斯兰教的帝国之一，以伊斯兰教育、经学传播和跨撒哈拉外交闻名。麦曾派遣使团前往开罗和麦加。
culturalAchievements.en: Kanem was one of the earliest empires south of the Sahara to adopt Islam, renowned for Islamic education, religious learning, and trans-Saharan diplomacy. The Mai had sent missions to Cairo and Mecca.

languageFamily.zh: 尼罗-撒哈拉语系（加涅姆布语），宗教和行政用阿拉伯语。
languageFamily.en: Nilo-Saharan (Kanembou), with Arabic used in religious and administrative contexts.

philosophy.zh: 以马利基派伊斯兰法学和撒哈拉以南伊斯兰学术传统为特征。
philosophy.en: Characterized by Maliki Islamic jurisprudence and sub-Saharan Islamic scholarly traditions.

writingSystem.zh: 使用阿拉伯字母书写阿拉伯语宗教和外交文书。
writingSystem.en: Arabic script used for Arabic-language religious and diplomatic documents.

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以农牧业和跨撒哈拉贸易为支柱，乍得湖区域是重要的农业区，奴隶贸易和盐贸易为重要收入来源。
gdpDescription.en: The economy rested on agro-pastoralism and trans-Saharan trade, with the Lake Chad region as an important agricultural zone and slave and salt trade as significant revenue sources.

mainIndustries.zh: 农牧业、奴隶贸易、盐贸易、皮革加工、编织
mainIndustries.en: Agro-pastoralism, slave trade, salt trade, leatherworking, weaving

tradeGoods.zh: 奴隶、盐、牲畜、皮革、棉布、象牙、鸵鸟羽毛
tradeGoods.en: Slaves, salt, livestock, leather, cotton cloth, ivory, ostrich feathers

householdWealth.zh: 普通家庭以耕地、牲畜和粮食储备为主要资产。贵族和商人拥有奴隶和商队。
householdWealth.en: Ordinary households held farmland, livestock, and grain stores as primary assets. Nobles and merchants possessed slaves and caravans.

economicSystem.zh: 以部族贡赋和跨撒哈拉贸易为核心的帝国经济。
economicSystem.en: An imperial economy centered on tribal tribute and trans-Saharan trade.

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库以实物和贸易品为主，储备尚可维持一至两年的军政开支，但面临内部叛乱和贸易波动的风险。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury consisted mainly of goods and trade items, with reserves sufficient for one to two years of military and state expenditure, though facing risks from internal rebellion and trade fluctuations.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 以部族贡赋和商路税收为核心财源，大量资源投入军事以维持帝国版图。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy centered on tribal tribute and trade route taxation, with substantial resources invested in military to maintain imperial territory.

description.zh: 加涅姆帝国的核心军事力量，以披甲骑兵闻名。
description.en: Core military force of the Kanem Empire, renowned for armored cavalry.

description.zh: 驻守城镇和边防据点的步兵力量。
description.en: Infantry forces garrisoning towns and frontier outposts.

description.zh: 战时由附庸部族动员的武装力量。
description.en: Armed forces mobilized from vassal tribes in wartime.

technology.zh: 军事技术以披甲骑兵、铁制武器、弓箭和简易防御工事为主。加涅姆骑兵在中非地区享有盛名。
technology.en: Military technology centered on armored cavalry, iron weapons, bows, and simple defensive works. Kanem cavalry was renowned in the central African region.

threats.zh: 布拉拉部族的叛乱和竞争（正在导致帝国重心西移）、撒哈拉游牧部族的袭扰、内部王位争夺。
threats.en: Bulala tribal rebellion and competition (driving the empire's center of gravity westward), Saharan nomadic raiding, and internal succession struggles.

description.zh: 初步正规化，有季节性操练
description.en: Semi-professional, seasonal drills

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: 骑士标准双刃直剑，十字形护手
description.en: Knight's standard double-edged straight sword with cruciform guard

description.zh: 英格兰长弓手主力弓，射程可达300步
description.en: English longbow, effective range up to 300 paces

description.zh: 铁环编织甲衣，灵活且防护可靠
description.en: Iron ring-linked armor, flexible and reliably protective

populationDescription.zh: 人口主要集中在乍得湖周边的农牧区域，帝国东部因布拉拉叛乱而人口流失严重。
populationDescription.en: Population was concentrated mainly in agro-pastoral areas around Lake Chad, with severe population loss in the eastern empire due to Bulala rebellion.

socialClasses.zh: 麦王室与部族贵族、伊斯兰学者、商人、自由农牧民、奴隶。
socialClasses.en: Mai's royal house and tribal nobles, Islamic scholars, merchants, free agro-pastoralists, slaves.

allies.zh: 与北非穆斯林国家和埃及马穆鲁克王朝保持外交和宗教联系。
allies.en: Maintained diplomatic and religious ties with North African Muslim states and the Egyptian Mamluk Sultanate.

enemies.zh: 布拉拉部族是最大的内部威胁，正在动摇帝国东部统治。周边部族和豪萨城邦也存在摩擦。
enemies.en: The Bulala tribe was the greatest internal threat, shaking eastern imperial rule. Friction also existed with surrounding tribes and Hausa city-states.

foreignPolicy.zh: 以维持跨撒哈拉贸易路线和伊斯兰外交联盟为核心，同时应对布拉拉叛乱导致的帝国危机。
foreignPolicy.en: Centered on maintaining trans-Saharan trade routes and Islamic diplomatic alliances, while responding to the imperial crisis caused by Bulala rebellion.

era.zh: 中世纪中非伊斯兰帝国技术水平
era.en: Medieval central African Islamic empire technological level

keyInnovations.zh: 披甲骑兵技术、铁器冶炼、乍得湖区灌溉农业、跨撒哈拉商路管理。
keyInnovations.en: Armored cavalry technology, iron smelting, Lake Chad area irrigation, trans-Saharan trade route management.

strengths.zh: 悠久的王朝传统、强大的骑兵力量、伊斯兰外交网络、乍得湖区农业基础。
strengths.en: Long dynastic tradition, powerful cavalry forces, Islamic diplomatic networks, Lake Chad area agricultural base.

weaknesses.zh: 布拉拉叛乱严重削弱东部控制、内部王位纷争、过度依赖奴隶贸易。
weaknesses.en: Bulala rebellion severely weakened eastern control, internal succession disputes, and over-dependence on slave trade.

outlook.zh: 加涅姆帝国正面临布拉拉叛乱的严峻挑战，帝国重心可能西移至博尔努地区，但赛法瓦王朝仍保有强大的政治和军事遗产。
outlook.en: The Kanem Empire faced a severe challenge from Bulala rebellion, with the imperial center of gravity potentially shifting westward to Bornu, but the Sayfawa dynasty still possessed a powerful political and military legacy.

description.zh: 1280年前后的加涅姆帝国是乍得湖地区由赛法瓦王朝统治的伊斯兰帝国，以强大的骑兵和跨撒哈拉贸易闻名，但正面临布拉拉叛乱的严重威胁。
description.en: Around 1280, the Kanem Empire was an Islamic empire in the Lake Chad region ruled by the Sayfawa dynasty, renowned for powerful cavalry and trans-Saharan trade, but facing serious threats from Bulala rebellion.

governmentForm.zh: 以苏丹为核心的伊斯兰港口城市国家，通过控制印度洋贸易和宗教权威维持统治。
governmentForm.en: An Islamic port city-state centered on the Sultan, maintaining rule through control of Indian Ocean trade and religious authority.

socialStructure.zh: 社会由苏丹家族、阿拉伯和波斯商人社群、索马里氏族首领、宗教学者、手工业者和奴隶构成。多元族群在贸易城市中共存。
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of the sultanic family, Arab and Persian merchant communities, Somali clan chiefs, religious scholars, artisans, and slaves. Multiple ethnic groups coexisted in this trading city.

rulingClass.zh: 统治阶层为苏丹家族和富裕的阿拉伯-波斯商人精英，他们控制海上贸易和港口收入。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class comprised the sultanic family and wealthy Arab-Persian merchant elites, controlling maritime trade and port revenues.

succession.zh: 苏丹之位在统治家族内世袭，商人寡头和宗教学者对继承有影响力。
succession.en: The sultanate passed hereditarily within the ruling family, with merchant oligarchs and religious scholars exerting influence on succession.

structure.zh: 苏丹主持城市政务，商人议会和宗教学者参与决策。港口管理和贸易监督是政府核心职能。
structure.en: The Sultan directed city affairs, with merchant councils and religious scholars participating in decisions. Port management and trade supervision were core government functions.

function.zh: 处理外交、司法和城市治理。
function.en: Handled diplomacy, justice, and urban governance.

function.zh: 管理港口运营、关税征收和外国商船事务。
function.en: Managed port operations, customs collection, and foreign merchant vessel affairs.

function.zh: 管理城市市场、度量衡标准和商业纠纷。
function.en: Managed urban markets, weights and measures standards, and commercial disputes.

localAdmin.zh: 城市各区由区官管理，郊外村落由氏族长老治理。港口区有专门的外国商人管理制度。
localAdmin.en: City districts were managed by ward officials, and suburban villages by clan elders. The port area had specialized management systems for foreign merchants.

legalSystem.zh: 法律以伊斯兰教法为核心，辅以商法和海事惯例。宗教法庭处理民事和商业纠纷。
legalSystem.en: Law was based on Islamic sharia, supplemented by commercial and maritime custom. Religious courts handled civil and commercial disputes.

taxationSystem.zh: 收入主要来自港口关税、商业税、市场费和锚泊税。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came mainly from port customs, commercial taxes, market fees, and anchorage dues.

religion.zh: 伊斯兰教（逊尼派）

culturalAchievements.zh: 摩加迪沙是东非最重要的伊斯兰港口城市之一，以清真寺建筑、伊斯兰教育、铸币和多元商业文化闻名。伊本·白图泰后来将其描述为繁华的商业大都市。
culturalAchievements.en: Mogadishu was one of East Africa's most important Islamic port cities, renowned for mosque architecture, Islamic education, minting, and diverse commercial culture. Ibn Battuta would later describe it as a prosperous commercial metropolis.

languageFamily.zh: 亚非语系库施特语支（索马里语），商业和宗教用阿拉伯语，也有波斯语和斯瓦希里语社群。
languageFamily.en: Afro-Asiatic, Cushitic (Somali), with Arabic for commerce and religion, and Persian and Swahili-speaking communities also present.

philosophy.zh: 以逊尼派伊斯兰教义、阿拉伯商业伦理和索马里部族传统相结合。
philosophy.en: Defined by Sunni Islamic doctrine, Arab commercial ethics, and Somali tribal traditions.

writingSystem.zh: 使用阿拉伯字母书写阿拉伯语宗教、商业和行政文书。
writingSystem.en: Arabic script used for Arabic-language religious, commercial, and administrative documents.

gdpDescription.zh: 经济高度依赖印度洋海上贸易，是连接东非、阿拉伯半岛和印度的重要商业枢纽。铸币和纺织也有重要地位。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was highly dependent on Indian Ocean maritime trade, serving as a vital commercial hub connecting East Africa, the Arabian Peninsula, and India. Minting and textiles also held important positions.

mainIndustries.zh: 海上贸易、铸币、纺织、造船修船、渔业
mainIndustries.en: Maritime trade, minting, textiles, shipbuilding and repair, fishing

tradeGoods.zh: 黄金、象牙、乳香、没药、奴隶、布匹、香料、陶瓷
tradeGoods.en: Gold, ivory, frankincense, myrrh, slaves, cloth, spices, ceramics

householdWealth.zh: 商人家庭极为富有，拥有船只、仓库和跨洋商业网络。普通市民从港口经济中获得较高收入。
householdWealth.en: Merchant families were extremely wealthy, possessing ships, warehouses, and cross-ocean commercial networks. Ordinary citizens earned relatively high incomes from the port economy.

economicSystem.zh: 以港口贸易为核心的伊斯兰海洋商业经济。
economicSystem.en: An Islamic maritime commercial economy centered on port trade.

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库以贵金属和商品储备为主，充裕的贸易收入确保了较健康的财政状况。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury consisted mainly of precious metals and commodity reserves, with ample trade income ensuring a relatively healthy fiscal condition.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 以港口关税为核心财源，同时通过铸币和商业监管维持城市经济秩序。
fiscalPolicy.en: Port customs served as the core revenue source, while minting and commercial regulation maintained urban economic order.

description.zh: 驻守城市和港口的常备军。
description.en: Standing troops garrisoning the city and port.

description.zh: 巡逻沿海和保护商船的海上力量。
description.en: Naval forces patrolling the coast and protecting merchant vessels.

description.zh: 战时动员的城市居民武装。
description.en: Urban citizen forces mobilized in wartime.

technology.zh: 军事技术以弓箭、刀剑和海上巡逻船为主，城防以石质城墙和塔楼为核心。
technology.en: Military technology centered on bows, swords, and coastal patrol vessels, with city defense based on stone walls and towers.

threats.zh: 海盗袭扰、内陆部族的威胁、与其他东非港口城市的贸易竞争。
threats.en: Pirate raids, inland tribal threats, and trade competition with other East African port cities.

description.zh: 基础训练，民兵水平
description.en: Basic training, militia level

description.zh: 士气极低，厌战情绪蔓延
description.en: Very low morale, widespread war-weariness

description.zh: 骑兵冲锋长矛，骑士战核心武器
description.en: Cavalry charge lance, core weapon of knightly warfare

description.zh: 英格兰长弓手主力弓，射程可达300步
description.en: English longbow, effective range up to 300 paces

populationDescription.zh: 人口高度集中在摩加迪沙城及其近郊，以多元族群的商业都市为特征。
populationDescription.en: Population was highly concentrated in Mogadishu city and its immediate surroundings, characterized as a multi-ethnic commercial metropolis.

socialClasses.zh: 苏丹家族与商人精英、阿拉伯与波斯商人、宗教学者、手工业者、渔民、奴隶。
socialClasses.en: Sultan's family and merchant elites, Arab and Persian merchants, religious scholars, artisans, fishermen, slaves.

allies.zh: 与也门、阿曼等阿拉伯商人网络保持密切贸易联系，与印度西海岸有商业合作。
allies.en: Maintained close trade ties with Arab merchant networks in Yemen and Oman, and commercial cooperation with India's west coast.

enemies.zh: 与其他东非港口城市（基尔瓦等）有贸易竞争，内陆部族偶尔构成安全威胁。
enemies.en: Had trade competition with other East African port cities (Kilwa, etc.), with inland tribes occasionally posing security threats.

foreignPolicy.zh: 以维护贸易网络和港口安全为核心的商业外交，通过宗教纽带加强与阿拉伯世界的联系。
foreignPolicy.en: Commercial diplomacy centered on maintaining trade networks and port security, strengthening ties with the Arab world through religious bonds.

era.zh: 中世纪东非伊斯兰港口城市技术水平
era.en: Medieval East African Islamic port city technological level

keyInnovations.zh: 铸币技术、石质建筑与清真寺建设、航海导航、季风贸易航线利用。
keyInnovations.en: Minting technology, stone architecture and mosque construction, maritime navigation, monsoon trade route utilization.

strengths.zh: 印度洋贸易的关键枢纽位置、多元文化商业环境、铸币能力、发达的港口基础设施。
strengths.en: Key hub position in Indian Ocean trade, multicultural commercial environment, minting capability, developed port infrastructure.

weaknesses.zh: 领土极小、陆军力量有限、过度依赖海上贸易、缺乏腹地资源。
weaknesses.en: Extremely small territory, limited land forces, over-dependence on maritime trade, and lack of hinterland resources.

outlook.zh: 摩加迪沙凭借印度洋贸易枢纽地位持续繁荣，只要海上贸易路线安全，城市将继续保持商业活力。
outlook.en: Mogadishu would continue to prosper through its Indian Ocean trade hub status; as long as maritime trade routes remained secure, the city would maintain its commercial vitality.

description.zh: 1280年前后的摩加迪沙苏丹国是东非海岸最繁华的伊斯兰港口城市国家之一，作为印度洋贸易的关键枢纽，连接非洲、阿拉伯和印度的商业网络。
description.en: Around 1280, the Sultanate of Mogadishu was one of the most prosperous Islamic port city-states on the East African coast, serving as a key hub of Indian Ocean trade connecting African, Arab, and Indian commercial networks.

governmentForm.zh: 游猎营地为基础的分散部族。
governmentForm.en: Dispersed tribes based on mobile hunting camps.

socialStructure.zh: 高度平等，以扩展家庭为单位。
socialStructure.en: Highly egalitarian, organized in extended families.

rulingClass.zh: 部族首领与长老
rulingClass.en: Tribal chiefs and elders

succession.zh: 继承主要依亲属血统与长老推举，个人威望与军事才能亦起作用。
succession.en: Succession depended on kinship, elder selection, and personal prestige or martial ability.

structure.zh: 松散的酋邦或部族联合体，由首领与长老协商决策。
structure.en: A loose chiefdom or tribal confederation in which chiefs and elders made decisions by consultation.

function.zh: 协调部族事务、纠纷调解与仪式安排。
function.en: Coordinated tribal affairs, settled disputes, and organized rituals.

function.zh: 管理食物储备、劳役调配与对外交换物资。
function.en: Managed food stores, labor allocation, and goods for external exchange.

localAdmin.zh: 地方治理由家族长者与营地首领执行，各聚落在日常事务上享有高度自治。
localAdmin.en: Local governance was carried out by family elders and camp leaders, with settlements enjoying broad autonomy in daily affairs.

legalSystem.zh: 法律以习惯规范、长老裁决与公开调解为基础。
legalSystem.en: Law was based on customary norms, elder adjudication, and public mediation.

taxationSystem.zh: 无正式税制，资源通过贡礼、集体劳役和仪式再分配集中。
taxationSystem.en: There was no formal tax system; resources were concentrated through tribute, collective labor, and ritual redistribution.

religion.zh: 万物有灵信仰

culturalAchievements.zh: 桦皮独木舟与雪鞋工艺成熟，口述传统丰富。
culturalAchievements.en: Mature birch-bark canoe and snowshoe crafts, rich oral traditions.

languageFamily.zh: 阿萨巴斯卡语系与阿尔冈昆语系
languageFamily.en: Athabaskan and Algonquian language families

philosophy.zh: 万物有灵与祖灵崇敬构成核心世界观，强调与自然的和谐共存。
philosophy.en: Animism and ancestor reverence formed the core worldview, emphasizing harmony with nature.

writingSystem.zh: 无成熟文字，知识通过口述传统、歌谣与仪式传承。
writingSystem.en: No developed writing system; knowledge was transmitted through oral tradition, songs, and ritual.

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per person-year

gdpDescription.zh: 以驯鹿狩猎、捕鱼和毛皮采集为主。
gdpDescription.en: Based on caribou hunting, fishing, and fur collecting.

mainIndustries.zh: 狩猎、捕鱼、毛皮加工、独木舟制造
mainIndustries.en: Hunting, fishing, fur processing, canoe building

tradeGoods.zh: 毛皮、肉干、桦皮、骨角工具
tradeGoods.en: Furs, dried meat, birch bark, bone and antler tools

householdWealth.zh: 财富体现在独木舟、雪鞋、猎具和毛皮储备上。
householdWealth.en: Wealth embodied in canoes, snowshoes, hunting gear, and fur stores.

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per person-year
grams of silver equivalent per year

economicSystem.zh: 以家庭自给生产和部族内部再分配为主的经济体系。
economicSystem.en: An economy based on household subsistence production and intra-tribal redistribution.

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per year

treasuryDescription.zh: "国库"主要为首领控制的食物与工具储备。
treasuryDescription.en: The "treasury" consisted mainly of chiefly controlled stores of food and tools.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政以维持储备和仪式再分配为目标。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal practice aimed to maintain reserves and support ritual redistribution.

description.zh: 由青壮年组成，使用石器、木矛和弓箭进行防御与突袭。
description.en: Composed of able-bodied men using stone tools, wooden spears, and bows for defense and raids.

technology.zh: 以石器、木骨武器和弓箭为主，无金属冶炼。
technology.en: Based on stone, wood, and bone weapons with bows; no metal smelting.

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per year

threats.zh: 冬季饥荒、猎物迁徙变化。
threats.en: Winter famine, prey migration shifts.

description.zh: 几乎无正规训练，依靠部落传承
description.en: Virtually untrained, relying on tribal traditions

description.zh: 士气崩溃，大规模逃亡
description.en: Morale collapsed, mass desertion

description.zh: 伊斯兰世界弯刀，轻便利于骑战劈斩
description.en: Islamic curved sword, light and ideal for mounted slashing

description.zh: 骑士标准双刃直剑，十字形护手
description.en: Knight's standard double-edged straight sword with cruciform guard

populationDescription.zh: 人口分散于加拿大亚寒带森林中。
populationDescription.en: Population dispersed across the Canadian boreal forest.

socialClasses.zh: 首领家族、长老、自由成员、依附者。
socialClasses.en: Chiefly families, elders, free members, dependents.

allies.zh: 无固定盟国，依赖亲缘和交换伙伴形成临时联盟。
allies.en: No fixed allies; temporary alliances formed through kin ties and exchange partners.

enemies.zh: 无持久性敌国，但邻近群体间常有资源争夺。
enemies.en: No permanent enemies, though resource competition with neighboring groups was common.

foreignPolicy.zh: 以维护领地安全与交换关系为先。
foreignPolicy.en: Policy prioritized territorial security and exchange relationships.

era.zh: 新石器至早期部族阶段
era.en: Neolithic to early tribal stage

keyInnovations.zh: 改进的雪鞋、桦皮独木舟、高效陷阱。
keyInnovations.en: Improved snowshoes, birch-bark canoes, efficient traps.

strengths.zh: 极端环境适应力强，机动性高。
strengths.en: Excellent extreme environment adaptation, high mobility.

weaknesses.zh: 人口密度极低，政治松散。
weaknesses.en: Extremely low density, loose politics.

outlook.zh: 游猎生活将延续数百年。
outlook.en: Mobile hunting would persist for centuries.

description.zh: 13世纪加拿大亚寒带森林中依赖驯鹿狩猎的游猎部族。
description.en: Mobile hunting peoples of the 13th-century Canadian boreal forest, dependent on caribou.

name.zh: 北美太平洋沿岸采集者
北美太平洋沿岸采集者

governmentForm.zh: 复合采集社会，世袭首领治理。
governmentForm.en: Complex foraging societies with hereditary leaders.

socialStructure.zh: 社会分为贵族、自由民和奴隶，夸富宴强化等级。
socialStructure.en: Divided into nobles, commoners, and slaves; potlatch reinforced hierarchy.

rulingClass.zh: 部族首领与长老
rulingClass.en: Tribal chiefs and elders

succession.zh: 继承主要依亲属血统与长老推举，个人威望与军事才能亦起作用。
succession.en: Succession depended on kinship, elder selection, and personal prestige or martial ability.

structure.zh: 松散的酋邦或部族联合体，由首领与长老协商决策。
structure.en: A loose chiefdom or tribal confederation in which chiefs and elders made decisions by consultation.

function.zh: 协调部族事务、纠纷调解与仪式安排。
function.en: Coordinated tribal affairs, settled disputes, and organized rituals.

function.zh: 管理食物储备、劳役调配与对外交换物资。
function.en: Managed food stores, labor allocation, and goods for external exchange.

localAdmin.zh: 地方治理由家族长者与营地首领执行，各聚落在日常事务上享有高度自治。
localAdmin.en: Local governance was carried out by family elders and camp leaders, with settlements enjoying broad autonomy in daily affairs.

legalSystem.zh: 法律以习惯规范、长老裁决与公开调解为基础。
legalSystem.en: Law was based on customary norms, elder adjudication, and public mediation.

taxationSystem.zh: 无正式税制，资源通过贡礼、集体劳役和仪式再分配集中。
taxationSystem.en: There was no formal tax system; resources were concentrated through tribute, collective labor, and ritual redistribution.

religion.zh: 万物有灵信仰

culturalAchievements.zh: 图腾柱和夸富宴鼎盛期。
culturalAchievements.en: Peak of totem pole carving and potlatch ceremony.

languageFamily.zh: 萨利希语系、瓦卡什语系等
languageFamily.en: Salishan, Wakashan, and other families

philosophy.zh: 万物有灵与祖灵崇敬构成核心世界观，强调与自然的和谐共存。
philosophy.en: Animism and ancestor reverence formed the core worldview, emphasizing harmony with nature.

writingSystem.zh: 无成熟文字，知识通过口述传统、歌谣与仪式传承。
writingSystem.en: No developed writing system; knowledge was transmitted through oral tradition, songs, and ritual.

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per person-year

gdpDescription.zh: 以鲑鱼捕捞和海洋资源为基础的富裕社会。
gdpDescription.en: A wealthy society based on salmon fishing and marine resources.

mainIndustries.zh: 鲑鱼捕捞、海产采集、木工、编织
mainIndustries.en: Salmon fishing, seafood gathering, woodworking, weaving

tradeGoods.zh: 鲑鱼干、鲸油、贝壳、雪松制品
tradeGoods.en: Dried salmon, whale oil, shells, cedar products

householdWealth.zh: 财富集中在独木舟、铜器和毯子上。
householdWealth.en: Wealth concentrated in canoes, coppers, and blankets.

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per person-year
grams of silver equivalent per year

economicSystem.zh: 以家庭自给生产和部族内部再分配为主的经济体系。
economicSystem.en: An economy based on household subsistence production and intra-tribal redistribution.

technology.zh: 以石器、木骨武器和弓箭为主，无金属冶炼。

threats.en: Intertribal raiding and warfare.

description.zh: 几乎无正规训练，依靠部落传承

populationDescription.zh: 人口沿太平洋西北海岸定居。
populationDescription.en: Population settled along the Pacific Northwest coast.

socialClasses.zh: 首领家族、长老、自由成员、依附者。
socialClasses.en: Chiefly families, elders, free members, dependents.

allies.zh: 无固定盟国，依赖亲缘和交换伙伴形成临时联盟。
allies.en: No fixed allies; temporary alliances formed through kin ties and exchange partners.

enemies.zh: 无持久性敌国，但邻近群体间常有资源争夺。
enemies.en: No permanent enemies, though resource competition with neighboring groups was common.

foreignPolicy.zh: 以维护领地安全与交换关系为先。
foreignPolicy.en: Policy prioritized territorial security and exchange relationships.

era.zh: 新石器至早期部族阶段
era.en: Neolithic to early tribal stage

keyInnovations.zh: 高级木工、鲑鱼保存、大型独木舟。
keyInnovations.en: Advanced woodworking, salmon preservation, large canoes.

strengths.zh: 资源极丰富，文化复杂度高。
strengths.en: Extremely rich resources, high cultural complexity.

weaknesses.zh: 政治分散，各村社独立。
weaknesses.en: Politically fragmented, villages independent.

outlook.zh: 太平洋沿岸文化将持续繁荣。
outlook.en: Pacific coast cultures would continue to flourish.

description.zh: 13世纪太平洋西北海岸以鲑鱼捕捞为核心的复合社会。
description.en: Complex 13th-century Pacific Northwest societies centered on salmon fishing.

governmentForm.zh: 渔猎村社为基础的部族社会。
governmentForm.en: Tribal society based on fishing-hunting villages.

socialStructure.zh: 相对平等，首领依赖捕鱼技能。
socialStructure.en: Relatively egalitarian, leadership based on fishing skill.

rulingClass.zh: 部族首领与长老
rulingClass.en: Tribal chiefs and elders

succession.zh: 继承主要依亲属血统与长老推举，个人威望与军事才能亦起作用。
succession.en: Succession depended on kinship, elder selection, and personal prestige or martial ability.

structure.zh: 松散的酋邦或部族联合体，由首领与长老协商决策。
structure.en: A loose chiefdom or tribal confederation in which chiefs and elders made decisions by consultation.

function.zh: 协调部族事务、纠纷调解与仪式安排。
function.en: Coordinated tribal affairs, settled disputes, and organized rituals.

function.zh: 管理食物储备、劳役调配与对外交换物资。
function.en: Managed food stores, labor allocation, and goods for external exchange.

localAdmin.zh: 地方治理由家族长者与营地首领执行，各聚落在日常事务上享有高度自治。
localAdmin.en: Local governance was carried out by family elders and camp leaders, with settlements enjoying broad autonomy in daily affairs.

legalSystem.zh: 法律以习惯规范、长老裁决与公开调解为基础。
legalSystem.en: Law was based on customary norms, elder adjudication, and public mediation.

taxationSystem.zh: 无正式税制，资源通过贡礼、集体劳役和仪式再分配集中。
taxationSystem.en: There was no formal tax system; resources were concentrated through tribute, collective labor, and ritual redistribution.

religion.zh: 万物有灵信仰

culturalAchievements.zh: 河鱼捕捞和编篮工艺发达。
culturalAchievements.en: Developed river fishing and basket weaving.

languageFamily.zh: 萨利希语系内陆支、萨哈普廷语系
languageFamily.en: Interior Salishan, Sahaptian

philosophy.zh: 万物有灵与祖灵崇敬构成核心世界观，强调与自然的和谐共存。
philosophy.en: Animism and ancestor reverence formed the core worldview, emphasizing harmony with nature.

writingSystem.zh: 无成熟文字，知识通过口述传统、歌谣与仪式传承。
writingSystem.en: No developed writing system; knowledge was transmitted through oral tradition, songs, and ritual.

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per person-year

gdpDescription.en: Based on salmon fishing and root gathering.

mainIndustries.en: Fishing, root gathering, hunting, basket weaving

tradeGoods.zh: 鲑鱼干、卡马斯根、毛皮、黑曜石
tradeGoods.en: Dried salmon, camas root, furs, obsidian

householdWealth.zh: 财富体现在鱼干储备和工具上。
householdWealth.en: Wealth embodied in dried fish stores and tools.

tradeGoods.en: Leather, rhea feathers, stone tools

householdWealth.zh: 帐篷、猎具和毛皮。
householdWealth.en: Tents, hunting gear, and furs.

grams of silver equivalent per year

economicSystem.en: An economy based on household subsistence production and intra-tribal redistribution.
