treasuryDescription.zh: "国库"主要为首领控制的食物与工具储备。
treasuryDescription.en: The "treasury" consisted mainly of chiefly controlled stores of food and tools.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政以维持储备和仪式再分配为目标。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal practice aimed to maintain reserves and support ritual redistribution.

description.zh: 由青壮年组成，使用石器、木矛和弓箭进行防御与突袭。
description.en: Composed of able-bodied men using stone tools, wooden spears, and bows for defense and raids.

technology.zh: 以石器、木骨武器和弓箭为主，无金属冶炼。
technology.en: Based on stone, wood, and bone weapons with bows; no metal smelting.

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per year

threats.zh: 严冬、猎物匮乏。
threats.en: Harsh winters, game scarcity.

description.zh: 几乎无正规训练，依靠部落传承
description.en: Virtually untrained, relying on tribal traditions

description.zh: 士气崩溃，大规模逃亡
description.en: Morale collapsed, mass desertion

description.zh: 骑兵冲锋长矛，骑士战核心武器
description.en: Cavalry charge lance, core weapon of knightly warfare

description.zh: 英格兰长弓手主力弓，射程可达300步
description.en: English longbow, effective range up to 300 paces

populationDescription.zh: 分散于巴塔哥尼亚草原。
populationDescription.en: Dispersed across the Patagonian steppe.

socialClasses.zh: 首领家族、长老、自由成员、依附者。
socialClasses.en: Chiefly families, elders, free members, dependents.

allies.zh: 无固定盟国，依赖亲缘和交换伙伴形成临时联盟。
allies.en: No fixed allies; temporary alliances formed through kin ties and exchange partners.

enemies.zh: 无持久性敌国，但邻近群体间常有资源争夺。
enemies.en: No permanent enemies, though resource competition with neighboring groups was common.

foreignPolicy.zh: 以维护领地安全与交换关系为先。
foreignPolicy.en: Policy prioritized territorial security and exchange relationships.

era.zh: 新石器至早期部族阶段
era.en: Neolithic to early tribal stage

keyInnovations.zh: 流星锤、皮革帐篷。
keyInnovations.en: Boleadoras, leather tents.

strengths.zh: 环境适应力强。
strengths.en: Strong environmental adaptation.

weaknesses.zh: 人口极少。
weaknesses.en: Very small population.

outlook.zh: 游猎延续。
outlook.en: Hunting would persist.

description.zh: 巴塔哥尼亚草原上追猎原驼的游猎部族。
description.en: Mobile hunting peoples of the Patagonian steppe living by guanaco pursuit.

governmentForm.zh: 长屋村社部族。
governmentForm.en: Longhouse village tribes.

socialStructure.zh: 以扩展家庭为核心的村社组织。
socialStructure.en: Village organization centered on extended families.

rulingClass.zh: 部族首领与长老
rulingClass.en: Tribal chiefs and elders

succession.zh: 继承主要依亲属血统与长老推举，个人威望与军事才能亦起作用。
succession.en: Succession depended on kinship, elder selection, and personal prestige or martial ability.

structure.zh: 松散的酋邦或部族联合体，由首领与长老协商决策。
structure.en: A loose chiefdom or tribal confederation in which chiefs and elders made decisions by consultation.

function.zh: 协调部族事务、纠纷调解与仪式安排。
function.en: Coordinated tribal affairs, settled disputes, and organized rituals.

function.zh: 管理食物储备、劳役调配与对外交换物资。
function.en: Managed food stores, labor allocation, and goods for external exchange.

localAdmin.zh: 地方治理由家族长者与营地首领执行，各聚落在日常事务上享有高度自治。
localAdmin.en: Local governance was carried out by family elders and camp leaders, with settlements enjoying broad autonomy in daily affairs.

legalSystem.zh: 法律以习惯规范、长老裁决与公开调解为基础。
legalSystem.en: Law was based on customary norms, elder adjudication, and public mediation.

taxationSystem.zh: 无正式税制，资源通过贡礼、集体劳役和仪式再分配集中。
taxationSystem.en: There was no formal tax system; resources were concentrated through tribute, collective labor, and ritual redistribution.

religion.zh: 万物有灵信仰

culturalAchievements.zh: 长屋建筑和羽饰工艺鼎盛。
culturalAchievements.en: Longhouse architecture and featherwork at peak.

languageFamily.zh: 图皮-瓜拉尼语系
languageFamily.en: Tupí-Guaraní language family

philosophy.zh: 万物有灵与祖灵崇敬构成核心世界观，强调与自然的和谐共存。
philosophy.en: Animism and ancestor reverence formed the core worldview, emphasizing harmony with nature.

writingSystem.zh: 无成熟文字，知识通过口述传统、歌谣与仪式传承。
writingSystem.en: No developed writing system; knowledge was transmitted through oral tradition, songs, and ritual.

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per person-year

gdpDescription.zh: 以木薯和玉米种植为主的热带农业。
gdpDescription.en: Tropical agriculture based on manioc and maize.

mainIndustries.zh: 木薯、玉米种植、渔业、陶器
mainIndustries.en: Manioc, maize cultivation, fishing, pottery

tradeGoods.zh: 木薯饼、陶器、羽饰
tradeGoods.en: Manioc cakes, pottery, featherwork

householdWealth.zh: 长屋和园圃。
householdWealth.en: Longhouses and gardens.

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per person-year
grams of silver equivalent per year

description.en: English longbow, effective range up to 300 paces

populationDescription.en: Widely across eastern South America.

socialClasses.en: Chiefly families, elders, free members, dependents.

allies.zh: 无固定盟国，依赖亲缘和交换伙伴形成临时联盟。
allies.en: No fixed allies; temporary alliances formed through kin ties and exchange partners.

enemies.zh: 无持久性敌国，但邻近群体间常有资源争夺。

foreignPolicy.zh: 以维护领地安全与交换关系为先。
foreignPolicy.en: Policy prioritized territorial security and exchange relationships.

era.zh: 新石器至早期部族阶段
era.en: Neolithic to early tribal stage

keyInnovations.zh: 热带农业、长屋建造、陶器。
keyInnovations.en: Tropical farming, longhouse construction, pottery.

strengths.zh: 人口众多，分布广泛。
strengths.en: Large population, wide distribution.

weaknesses.zh: 政治高度分散。
weaknesses.en: Highly fragmented politically.

outlook.zh: 继续沿河流扩展。
outlook.en: Would continue expanding along rivers.

description.zh: 13世纪南美东部以木薯农业和长屋文化著称的广泛部族群体。
description.en: Widespread tribal peoples of 13th-century eastern South America known for manioc agriculture and longhouse culture.

governmentForm.zh: 以两大酋长为核心的酋邦联合体，统辖哥伦比亚高地。
governmentForm.en: A chiefdom confederation centered on two paramount chiefs, ruling the Colombian highlands.

socialStructure.zh: 酋长家族、祭司、战士、农民和依附者。
socialStructure.en: Chiefly families, priests, warriors, farmers, and dependents.

rulingClass.zh: 穆伊斯卡大酋长和祭司
rulingClass.en: Muisca paramount chiefs and priests

succession.zh: 继承主要依亲属血统与长老推举，个人威望与军事才能亦起作用。
succession.en: Succession depended on kinship, elder selection, and personal prestige or martial ability.

structure.zh: 松散的酋邦或部族联合体，由首领与长老协商决策。
structure.en: A loose chiefdom or tribal confederation in which chiefs and elders made decisions by consultation.

function.zh: 协调部族事务、纠纷调解与仪式安排。
function.en: Coordinated tribal affairs, settled disputes, and organized rituals.

function.zh: 管理食物储备、劳役调配与对外交换物资。
function.en: Managed food stores, labor allocation, and goods for external exchange.

localAdmin.zh: 地方治理由家族长者与营地首领执行，各聚落在日常事务上享有高度自治。
localAdmin.en: Local governance was carried out by family elders and camp leaders, with settlements enjoying broad autonomy in daily affairs.

legalSystem.zh: 法律以习惯规范、长老裁决与公开调解为基础。
legalSystem.en: Law was based on customary norms, elder adjudication, and public mediation.

taxationSystem.zh: 无正式税制，资源通过贡礼、集体劳役和仪式再分配集中。
taxationSystem.en: There was no formal tax system; resources were concentrated through tribute, collective labor, and ritual redistribution.

religion.zh: 万物有灵信仰

culturalAchievements.zh: 精美金器工艺和翡翠贸易。
culturalAchievements.en: Exquisite goldwork and emerald trade.

languageFamily.zh: 穆伊斯卡语（奇布查语系）
languageFamily.en: Muisca (Chibchan family)

philosophy.zh: 太阳神和黄金仪式崇拜。
philosophy.en: Sun worship and gold ritual.

writingSystem.zh: 无成熟文字，知识通过口述传统、歌谣与仪式传承。
writingSystem.en: No developed writing system; knowledge was transmitted through oral tradition, songs, and ritual.

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per person-year

gdpDescription.zh: 以高原农业、盐矿和金器贸易为基础。
gdpDescription.en: Based on highland agriculture, salt mining, and gold trade.

mainIndustries.zh: 农业、盐矿、金工、翡翠贸易
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture, salt mining, goldwork, emerald trade

tradeGoods.zh: 金器、翡翠、盐、棉布
tradeGoods.en: Gold artifacts, emeralds, salt, cotton cloth

householdWealth.zh: 集中在酋长，体现在金器和盐上。
householdWealth.en: Concentrated in chiefs, in gold and salt.

threats.en: Competing neighboring chiefdoms.

description.zh: 基础训练，民兵水平
description.en: Basic training, militia level

description.zh: 士气极低，厌战情绪蔓延
description.en: Very low morale, widespread war-weariness

description.zh: 骑兵冲锋长矛，骑士战核心武器
description.en: Cavalry charge lance, core weapon of knightly warfare

description.zh: 铁环编织甲衣，灵活且防护可靠
description.en: Iron ring-linked armor, flexible and reliably protective

populationDescription.zh: 哥伦比亚中部安第斯高地。
populationDescription.en: Colombian central Andean highlands.

socialClasses.zh: 首领家族、长老、自由成员、依附者。
socialClasses.en: Chiefly families, elders, free members, dependents.

allies.zh: 无固定盟国，依赖亲缘和交换伙伴形成临时联盟。
allies.en: No fixed allies; temporary alliances formed through kin ties and exchange partners.

enemies.zh: 无持久性敌国，但邻近群体间常有资源争夺。
enemies.en: No permanent enemies, though resource competition with neighboring groups was common.

foreignPolicy.zh: 以维护领地安全与交换关系为先。
foreignPolicy.en: Policy prioritized territorial security and exchange relationships.

era.zh: 新石器至早期部族阶段
era.en: Neolithic to early tribal stage

keyInnovations.zh: 精密金工、盐矿开采、高原灌溉。
keyInnovations.en: Precision goldwork, salt mining, highland irrigation.

strengths.zh: 金和盐资源丰富，贸易广泛。
strengths.en: Rich gold and salt, extensive trade.

weaknesses.zh: 多酋邦分裂。
weaknesses.en: Split among chiefdoms.

outlook.zh: 将繁荣至西班牙征服。
outlook.en: Would prosper until Spanish conquest.

description.zh: 穆伊斯卡酋邦是哥伦比亚高地以金器和盐矿闻名的酋邦联合体。
description.en: The Muisca Chiefdoms were a highland Colombian confederation famous for goldwork and salt mines.

governmentForm.zh: 以村社和季节性聚落为核心的多样化部族群体。
governmentForm.en: Diverse tribal groups centered on villages and seasonal settlements.

socialStructure.zh: 以氏族为核心，酋长和议事会联合治理。
socialStructure.en: Clan-based, governed jointly by chiefs and councils.

rulingClass.zh: 部族首领与长老
rulingClass.en: Tribal chiefs and elders

succession.zh: 继承主要依亲属血统与长老推举，个人威望与军事才能亦起作用。
succession.en: Succession depended on kinship, elder selection, and personal prestige or martial ability.

structure.zh: 松散的酋邦或部族联合体，由首领与长老协商决策。
structure.en: A loose chiefdom or tribal confederation in which chiefs and elders made decisions by consultation.

function.zh: 协调部族事务、纠纷调解与仪式安排。
function.en: Coordinated tribal affairs, settled disputes, and organized rituals.

function.zh: 管理食物储备、劳役调配与对外交换物资。
function.en: Managed food stores, labor allocation, and goods for external exchange.

localAdmin.zh: 地方治理由家族长者与营地首领执行，各聚落在日常事务上享有高度自治。
localAdmin.en: Local governance was carried out by family elders and camp leaders, with settlements enjoying broad autonomy in daily affairs.

legalSystem.zh: 法律以习惯规范、长老裁决与公开调解为基础。
legalSystem.en: Law was based on customary norms, elder adjudication, and public mediation.

taxationSystem.zh: 无正式税制，资源通过贡礼、集体劳役和仪式再分配集中。
taxationSystem.en: There was no formal tax system; resources were concentrated through tribute, collective labor, and ritual redistribution.

religion.zh: 万物有灵信仰

culturalAchievements.zh: 密西西比文化衰落后的多元部族文化继续发展。
culturalAchievements.en: Diverse tribal cultures continued developing after Mississippian decline.

languageFamily.zh: 阿尔冈昆语系、易洛魁语系、苏语系等
languageFamily.en: Algonquian, Iroquoian, Siouan, and other families

philosophy.zh: 万物有灵与祖灵崇敬构成核心世界观，强调与自然的和谐共存。
philosophy.en: Animism and ancestor reverence formed the core worldview, emphasizing harmony with nature.

writingSystem.zh: 无成熟文字，知识通过口述传统、歌谣与仪式传承。
writingSystem.en: No developed writing system; knowledge was transmitted through oral tradition, songs, and ritual.

gdpDescription.en: Based on maize agriculture, hunting, gathering, and regional trade.

mainIndustries.en: Maize cultivation, hunting, fishing, fur processing

tradeGoods.zh: 玉米、毛皮、烟草、贝壳串珠
tradeGoods.en: Maize, furs, tobacco, shell beads (wampum)

householdWealth.zh: 体现在耕地、毛皮和贝壳串珠上。
householdWealth.en: Embodied in farmland, furs, and wampum.

era.zh: 新石器至早期部族阶段
era.en: Neolithic to early tribal stage

keyInnovations.zh: 玉米农业、弓箭、贝壳串珠贸易体系。
keyInnovations.en: Maize agriculture, bows, wampum trade system.

strengths.zh: 人口较多，农业基础好。
strengths.en: Relatively large population, good agricultural base.

weaknesses.zh: 政治分散，缺乏统一。
weaknesses.en: Politically fragmented, lacking unity.

outlook.zh: 将发展出易洛魁联盟等更复杂的政治组织。
outlook.en: Would develop more complex organizations like the Iroquois Confederacy.

description.zh: 13世纪北美东部以玉米农业和林地文化为特征的多元部族群体。
description.en: Diverse tribal groups of 13th-century eastern North America characterized by maize agriculture and woodland culture.

governmentForm.zh: 图勒文化海猎营地。
governmentForm.en: Thule culture marine hunting camps.

socialStructure.zh: 高度平等，猎人地位由技能决定。
socialStructure.en: Highly egalitarian, status by hunting skill.

rulingClass.zh: 部族首领与长老
rulingClass.en: Tribal chiefs and elders

succession.zh: 继承主要依亲属血统与长老推举，个人威望与军事才能亦起作用。
succession.en: Succession depended on kinship, elder selection, and personal prestige or martial ability.

structure.zh: 松散的酋邦或部族联合体，由首领与长老协商决策。
structure.en: A loose chiefdom or tribal confederation in which chiefs and elders made decisions by consultation.

function.zh: 协调部族事务、纠纷调解与仪式安排。
function.en: Coordinated tribal affairs, settled disputes, and organized rituals.

function.zh: 管理食物储备、劳役调配与对外交换物资。
function.en: Managed food stores, labor allocation, and goods for external exchange.

localAdmin.zh: 地方治理由家族长者与营地首领执行，各聚落在日常事务上享有高度自治。
localAdmin.en: Local governance was carried out by family elders and camp leaders, with settlements enjoying broad autonomy in daily affairs.

legalSystem.zh: 法律以习惯规范、长老裁决与公开调解为基础。
legalSystem.en: Law was based on customary norms, elder adjudication, and public mediation.

taxationSystem.zh: 无正式税制，资源通过贡礼、集体劳役和仪式再分配集中。
taxationSystem.en: There was no formal tax system; resources were concentrated through tribute, collective labor, and ritual redistribution.

religion.zh: 万物有灵信仰

culturalAchievements.zh: 图勒文化鼎盛，精密捕鲸技术。
culturalAchievements.en: Peak Thule culture, sophisticated whaling.

languageFamily.zh: 爱斯基摩-阿留申语系
languageFamily.en: Eskimo-Aleut language family

philosophy.zh: 万物有灵与祖灵崇敬构成核心世界观，强调与自然的和谐共存。
philosophy.en: Animism and ancestor reverence formed the core worldview, emphasizing harmony with nature.

writingSystem.zh: 无成熟文字，知识通过口述传统、歌谣与仪式传承。
writingSystem.en: No developed writing system; knowledge was transmitted through oral tradition, songs, and ritual.

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per person-year

gdpDescription.zh: 以捕鲸和海兽猎为核心。
gdpDescription.en: Centered on whaling and marine mammal hunting.

mainIndustries.zh: 捕鲸、海猎、捕鱼、骨雕
mainIndustries.en: Whaling, marine hunting, fishing, ivory carving

tradeGoods.zh: 海象牙、鲸油、毛皮
tradeGoods.en: Walrus ivory, whale oil, furs

householdWealth.zh: 大型皮船和储备。
householdWealth.en: Umiaks and stored provisions.

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per person-year
grams of silver equivalent per year

economicSystem.zh: 以家庭自给生产和部族内部再分配为主的经济体系。
economicSystem.en: An economy based on household subsistence production and intra-tribal redistribution.

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per year

treasuryDescription.zh: "国库"主要为首领控制的食物与工具储备。
treasuryDescription.en: The "treasury" consisted mainly of chiefly controlled stores of food and tools.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政以维持储备和仪式再分配为目标。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal practice aimed to maintain reserves and support ritual redistribution.

description.zh: 由青壮年组成，使用石器、木矛和弓箭进行防御与突袭。
description.en: Composed of able-bodied men using stone tools, wooden spears, and bows for defense and raids.

technology.zh: 以石器、木骨武器和弓箭为主，无金属冶炼。
technology.en: Based on stone, wood, and bone weapons with bows; no metal smelting.

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per year

threats.zh: 极端严寒、猎物变化。
threats.en: Extreme cold, prey shifts.

description.zh: 几乎无正规训练，依靠部落传承
description.en: Virtually untrained, relying on tribal traditions

description.zh: 士气崩溃，大规模逃亡
description.en: Morale collapsed, mass desertion

description.zh: 英格兰长弓手主力弓，射程可达300步
description.en: English longbow, effective range up to 300 paces

description.zh: 骑士标准双刃直剑，十字形护手
description.en: Knight's standard double-edged straight sword with cruciform guard

populationDescription.zh: 北极海岸线分散分布。
populationDescription.en: Dispersed along the Arctic coastline.

socialClasses.zh: 首领家族、长老、自由成员、依附者。
socialClasses.en: Chiefly families, elders, free members, dependents.

allies.zh: 无固定盟国，依赖亲缘和交换伙伴形成临时联盟。
allies.en: No fixed allies; temporary alliances formed through kin ties and exchange partners.

enemies.zh: 无持久性敌国，但邻近群体间常有资源争夺。
enemies.en: No permanent enemies, though resource competition with neighboring groups was common.

foreignPolicy.zh: 以维护领地安全与交换关系为先。
foreignPolicy.en: Policy prioritized territorial security and exchange relationships.

era.zh: 新石器至早期部族阶段
era.en: Neolithic to early tribal stage

keyInnovations.zh: 改进的捕鲸技术、皮划艇、雪屋。
keyInnovations.en: Improved whaling, kayaks, igloos.

strengths.zh: 捕鲸技术先进。
strengths.en: Advanced whaling technology.

weaknesses.zh: 人口极少。
weaknesses.en: Very small population.

outlook.zh: 图勒文化正向东扩展。
outlook.en: Thule culture expanding eastward.

description.zh: 13世纪北极海岸以捕鲸为核心的图勒文化猎人。
description.en: Thule culture hunters of the 13th-century Arctic coast, centered on whaling.

governmentForm.zh: 法兰西式封建君主制，融合诺曼-霍亨斯陶芬行政遗产与安茹新体系
governmentForm.en: A Frankish-style feudal monarchy, blending Norman-Hohenstaufen administrative legacies with the new Angevin system

socialStructure.zh: 社会由法兰西裔贵族、意大利与西西里地方领主、拉丁教会高级神职人员、城市商人与手工业者、农民及穆斯林遗存社群构成。安茹统治引入大量法国封臣，加剧了岛屿本地精英与外来统治者之间的紧张。
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of Frankish-origin nobles, Italo-Sicilian local lords, senior Latin clergy, urban merchants and artisans, peasants, and remnant Muslim communities. Angevin rule introduced many French vassals, heightening tension between native island elites and foreign rulers.

rulingClass.zh: 安茹王族与法兰西封臣、意大利官僚及教会高层
rulingClass.en: The Angevin royal house and Frankish vassals, Italian bureaucrats, and senior churchmen

succession.zh: 王位由安茹王族世袭继承，须教皇认可。
succession.en: The throne was inherited within the Angevin house, requiring papal recognition.

structure.zh: 中央以国王宫廷为核心，继承诺曼-霍亨斯陶芬官僚机构，设有大法官、财政署、法院与地方行省系统。安茹统治后行政重心从巴勒莫迁往那不勒斯。
structure.en: The center was the royal court, inheriting the Norman-Hohenstaufen bureaucratic apparatus with a grand justiciars office, fiscal chamber, courts, and provincial system. Under Angevin rule the administrative center shifted from Palermo to Naples.

function.zh: 最高司法与行政协调机构，监督各省行政长官与法院。
function.en: Supreme judicial and administrative coordination body, overseeing provincial justiciars and courts.

function.zh: 管理税收、关税、王室领地收入与军需拨款。
function.en: Managed taxes, customs, crown estate revenues, and military appropriations.

function.zh: 起草与保管王室诏令、外交文书及官员任命状。
function.en: Drafted and preserved royal edicts, diplomatic correspondence, and official appointments.

localAdmin.zh: 地方通过行省行政长官、城堡守将与封建领主网络治理。西西里岛内各城镇保有一定自治权，但安茹官员的强力介入引发不满。
localAdmin.en: The realm was governed locally through provincial justiciars, castellans, and feudal lordships. Sicilian towns retained some autonomy, but aggressive Angevin officialdom generated resentment.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系承袭梅尔菲宪章与霍亨斯陶芬法典传统，结合教会法、封建习惯法与安茹王室法令。
legalSystem.en: The legal system inherited the Constitutions of Melfi and Hohenstaufen legal traditions, combining canon law, feudal custom, and Angevin royal decrees.

taxationSystem.zh: 税制以土地税、市场税、港口关税、盐税与封建服务金折算为主，对西西里岛征税尤重。
taxationSystem.en: Taxation rested on land taxes, market dues, port customs, salt duties, and commuted feudal obligations, with especially heavy impositions on the island of Sicily.

religion.zh: 天主教

culturalAchievements.zh: 继承诺曼-阿拉伯-拜占庭文化融合遗产，那不勒斯成为意大利南部重要学术与艺术中心。建筑方面延续哥特与罗马风混合风格。
culturalAchievements.en: Inheriting the Norman-Arab-Byzantine cultural synthesis, Naples became a significant scholarly and artistic center in southern Italy. Architecture continued the Romanesque-Gothic hybrid style.

languageFamily.zh: 罗曼语系（西西里方言、那不勒斯方言、法语）
languageFamily.en: Romance languages (Sicilian, Neapolitan, and French)

philosophy.zh: 经院哲学与亚里士多德主义在那不勒斯大学传播，托马斯·阿奎那曾在此求学。
philosophy.en: Scholasticism and Aristotelianism spread through the University of Naples, where Thomas Aquinas had studied.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（拉丁文为官方语言，意大利俗语和法语日益使用）
writingSystem.en: Latin script (Latin as official language, with growing use of Italian vernacular and French)

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per person

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以农业（小麦、葡萄酒、橄榄油）为基础，地中海贸易发达，那不勒斯与巴勒莫为重要商港。纺织、造船与盐业也是支柱产业。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was agriculturally based on wheat, wine, and olive oil, with active Mediterranean trade centered on Naples and Palermo. Textiles, shipbuilding, and salt were also major industries.

mainIndustries.zh: 谷物种植、葡萄酒酿造、橄榄油生产、纺织业、造船业、渔业、盐业、地中海转口贸易
mainIndustries.en: Grain cultivation, winemaking, olive oil production, textiles, shipbuilding, fishing, salt production, Mediterranean transit trade

tradeGoods.zh: 小麦、葡萄酒、橄榄油、丝绸、盐、木材、香料转运
tradeGoods.en: Wheat, wine, olive oil, silk, salt, timber, spice redistribution

householdWealth.zh: 贵族家庭拥有庄园、城堡与土地；城市商人积累贸易资本与不动产；农民主要以土地耕作权、牲畜与粮食储备为资产。
householdWealth.en: Noble households possessed estates, castles, and land; urban merchants accumulated trade capital and property; peasants held mainly cultivation rights, livestock, and grain stores.

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per year

economicSystem.zh: 封建土地经济与地中海商业贸易结合，国家通过税收、关税与王室专卖控制经济命脉。
economicSystem.en: A feudal land economy combined with Mediterranean commercial trade, with the state controlling key economic levers through taxation, customs, and royal monopolies.

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库因查理一世对拜占庭的远征计划和对意大利半岛的军事野心而承受持续压力，赤字频繁。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was under constant pressure from Charles I's projected campaigns against Byzantium and his military ambitions in the Italian peninsula, with frequent deficits.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策偏向军事扩张，大量收入用于筹备远征与维持舰队，对岛屿臣民课以重税引发民怨。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy heavily favored military expansion, with much revenue devoted to preparing expeditions and maintaining the fleet, while heavy taxation of island subjects generated resentment.

description.zh: 安茹王国军事精锐，由法国骑士与意大利封臣骑兵组成。
description.en: The military elite of the Angevin realm, composed of French knights and Italian vassal cavalry.

description.zh: 主力步兵，由当地征召兵与雇佣兵混合组成。
description.en: The main infantry, a mix of local levies and mercenary troops.

description.zh: 地中海舰队，配备桨帆战船，用于控制海路与远征作战。
description.en: The Mediterranean fleet, equipped with galleys, used for controlling sea lanes and expeditionary warfare.

commanderInChief.zh: 查理一世兼任最高统帅，日常军务由大元帅与舰队司令分掌
commanderInChief.en: Charles I served as supreme commander, with daily operations managed by the Grand Constable and Admiral

technology.zh: 军备以法兰西重骑兵战术、城堡防御工事与地中海桨帆船技术为主，继承霍亨斯陶芬的城防体系。
technology.en: Military technology featured Frankish heavy cavalry tactics, castle fortifications, and Mediterranean galley warfare, inheriting the Hohenstaufen defensive system.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自西西里岛本地反叛情绪（即将于1282年爆发西西里晚祷事件）、阿拉贡王国的争夺以及拜占庭的外交反制。
threats.en: Principal threats came from anti-Angevin resentment in Sicily (the Sicilian Vespers would erupt in 1282), Aragonese contestation, and Byzantine diplomatic counter-measures.

description.zh: 职业化训练，拥有成熟的操典
description.en: Professional training with established manuals

description.zh: 士气一般，作战意志不稳定
description.en: Mediocre morale, inconsistent fighting will

description.zh: 早期火铳与火箭（中国/伊斯兰世界传入）
description.en: Early firearms and rockets (introduced from China/Islamic world)

description.zh: 骑士标准双刃直剑，十字形护手
description.en: Knight's standard double-edged straight sword with cruciform guard

description.zh: 拜占庭海战秘密武器，水上不灭之火
description.en: Byzantine naval secret weapon, inextinguishable fire on water

description.zh: 骑兵冲锋长矛，骑士战核心武器
description.en: Cavalry charge lance, core weapon of knightly warfare

populationDescription.zh: 人口分布在西西里岛、卡拉布里亚和那不勒斯周边地区。岛上人口包括拉丁裔基督徒、希腊裔社区和少量残存穆斯林。
populationDescription.en: Population was distributed across Sicily, Calabria, and the Neapolitan region. Island inhabitants included Latin Christians, Greek-rite communities, and small remnant Muslim populations.

description.zh: 诺曼-阿拉伯文化交融之城
description.en: City of Norman-Arab cultural fusion

socialClasses.zh: 上层为安茹王族、法兰西封臣贵族与教会高层；中层包括意大利地方贵族、城市商人与法律专业人士；下层为农民、渔民、手工业者与残存的穆斯林群体。
socialClasses.en: Upper strata comprised the Angevin royals, Frankish vassal nobles, and senior clergy; the middle included Italian local nobles, urban merchants, and legal professionals; lower groups were peasants, fishermen, artisans, and remnant Muslim communities.

allies.zh: 教皇国（安茹王朝的主要支持者）、法兰西王国以及部分圭尔夫派意大利城市
allies.en: The Papacy (chief backer of the Angevin dynasty), the Kingdom of France, and some Italian Guelph cities

enemies.zh: 阿拉贡王国、拜占庭帝国、霍亨斯陶芬残余势力以及西西里岛上反安茹派
enemies.en: The Crown of Aragon, the Byzantine Empire, Hohenstaufen remnants, and anti-Angevin factions in Sicily

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交政策以维护教皇同盟、压制霍亨斯陶芬残余、准备对拜占庭的十字军远征并控制地中海航路为核心。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy centered on maintaining the papal alliance, suppressing Hohenstaufen remnants, preparing a crusade against Byzantium, and controlling Mediterranean sea lanes.

era.zh: 中世纪盛期地中海
era.en: High Medieval Mediterranean

keyInnovations.zh: 城堡建筑技术、桨帆船造船术、灌溉农业体系与成熟的行政文书制度。
keyInnovations.en: Castle-building techniques, galley construction, irrigated agriculture, and a mature administrative documentary system.

strengths.zh: 强大的军事力量、教皇支持的政治合法性、富庶的南意大利农业基地与地中海贸易枢纽地位。
strengths.en: Powerful military forces, papal-backed political legitimacy, a wealthy southern Italian agricultural base, and a strategic Mediterranean trade position.

weaknesses.zh: 对西西里岛的过度征税引发民怨、法国外来统治者与本地精英的矛盾、财政因军事野心而持续紧张。
weaknesses.en: Overtaxation of Sicily generating resentment, tensions between foreign French rulers and native elites, and finances strained by military ambitions.

outlook.zh: 短期内面临严峻危机：西西里岛上的反安茹情绪即将在1282年引发西西里晚祷起义，安茹王朝将失去对西西里岛的控制。
outlook.en: Severe crisis loomed in the short term: anti-Angevin sentiment in Sicily was about to trigger the Sicilian Vespers uprising in 1282, which would cost the Angevins control of the island.

description.zh: 安茹王朝统治下的西西里王国，地中海重要势力，但岛上民怨即将爆发。
description.en: The Angevin Kingdom of Sicily, a major Mediterranean power, but island resentment was about to erupt.

ruler.zh: 爱德华一世（兼爱尔兰领主）

governmentForm.zh: 英格兰国王兼任的封建领地，由驻爱尔兰总督代行治理，盎格鲁-诺曼封建制与盖尔部族体系并存
governmentForm.en: A feudal lordship held by the English crown, governed by a resident justiciar, with Anglo-Norman feudalism and Gaelic tribal systems coexisting

socialStructure.zh: 社会由盎格鲁-诺曼贵族、英语城镇居民、盖尔爱尔兰酋长与氏族、教会神职人员、农民与劳工构成。英格兰法律区（'佩尔'）与盖尔爱尔兰区之间存在显著的法律与社会分界。
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of Anglo-Norman lords, English townspeople, Gaelic Irish chiefs and clans, clergy, peasants, and laborers. A sharp legal and social divide existed between the English-law zone (the 'Pale') and Gaelic Ireland.

rulingClass.zh: 盎格鲁-诺曼封建贵族（如德·伯格、菲茨杰拉德、巴特勒家族）与英格兰王室官员
rulingClass.en: Anglo-Norman feudal magnates (such as the de Burghs, Fitzgeralds, and Butlers) and English royal officials

succession.zh: 爱尔兰领地随英格兰王位世袭；驻爱尔兰总督由国王任命。盖尔区域仍由各氏族内部推选酋长。
succession.en: The Lordship passed with the English crown; the justiciar was appointed by the king. Gaelic areas continued to select chiefs through clan election.

structure.zh: 都柏林设有驻爱尔兰总督署、财政署与法院，模仿英格兰行政结构。但英格兰的有效控制仅覆盖东部沿海'佩尔'及若干封建领地飞地，广大西部和北部仍由盖尔酋长实际统治。
structure.en: Dublin hosted a justiciar's office, exchequer, and courts modeled on the English administration. However, effective English control covered only the eastern coastal 'Pale' and scattered feudal enclaves, while the west and north remained under Gaelic chiefs.

function.zh: 代表英格兰国王行使爱尔兰最高司法与行政权力。
function.en: Exercised supreme judicial and administrative authority in Ireland on behalf of the English king.

function.zh: 征收税赋、管理王室领地收入与军饷拨付。
function.en: Collected taxes, managed crown estate income, and disbursed military funding.

function.zh: 依据英格兰普通法审理案件，但管辖范围限于英格兰法律适用区。
function.en: Tried cases under English common law, but jurisdiction was limited to areas under English legal authority.

localAdmin.zh: 英格兰控制区内设郡长与地方法官；在盖尔地区，传统氏族首领、布雷亨法官和地方集会维持着独立的治理体系。
localAdmin.en: English-controlled areas had sheriffs and local justices; in Gaelic regions, traditional clan chiefs, Brehon judges, and local assemblies maintained an independent governance system.

legalSystem.zh: 二元法律体系：英格兰普通法适用于'佩尔'及盎格鲁-诺曼地区；盖尔爱尔兰广泛使用布雷亨法。两套体系并行，彼此不完全承认。
legalSystem.en: A dual legal system: English common law applied in the Pale and Anglo-Norman areas; Gaelic Ireland widely used Brehon law. The two systems coexisted without fully recognizing each other.

taxationSystem.zh: 税制在英格兰区域以封建税、关税与城镇税为主；盖尔区域采用贡赋、牲畜征收与劳役义务制。
taxationSystem.en: Taxation in English areas relied on feudal levies, customs, and town taxes; Gaelic areas used tribute, cattle renders, and labor obligations.

religion.zh: 天主教

culturalAchievements.zh: 爱尔兰在宗教建筑、手抄本艺术、盖尔诗歌与音乐传统方面有悠久积累。盎格鲁-诺曼入侵带来城堡建筑与城镇规划的新发展。
culturalAchievements.en: Ireland had a long heritage in religious architecture, manuscript art, Gaelic poetry, and musical traditions. The Anglo-Norman arrival brought new developments in castle building and town planning.

languageFamily.zh: 盖尔语（凯尔特语族）与盎格鲁-诺曼法语/英语并用
languageFamily.en: Gaelic (Celtic) and Anglo-Norman French/English coexisted

philosophy.zh: 修道院学术传统与盖尔文化中的诗歌法律哲学并存，欧洲经院哲学通过教会渠道传入。
philosophy.en: Monastic scholarly traditions and Gaelic poetic-legal philosophy coexisted, with European scholasticism filtering in through ecclesiastical channels.

writingSystem.zh: 盖尔文字（欧甘文遗存已极少）、拉丁字母与盎格鲁-诺曼文书并用
writingSystem.en: Gaelic script, Latin alphabet, and Anglo-Norman documentary forms were all in use

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per person

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以畜牧业（尤其是养牛）和农业为基础，都柏林等港口城市从事羊毛、皮革和鱼类贸易。盖尔地区更加倚重牧业经济。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was based on pastoralism (especially cattle) and agriculture, with port cities like Dublin trading wool, hides, and fish. Gaelic areas relied more heavily on pastoral economics.

mainIndustries.zh: 养牛、谷物种植、羊毛生产、渔业、皮革加工、港口贸易
mainIndustries.en: Cattle rearing, grain cultivation, wool production, fishing, leatherwork, port trade

tradeGoods.zh: 羊毛、牛皮、鱼类、谷物、木材
tradeGoods.en: Wool, cattle hides, fish, grain, timber

householdWealth.zh: 盎格鲁-诺曼领主拥有庄园与城堡；盖尔酋长以牛群和土地为财富衡量；城镇居民积累贸易资本和房产；农民仅有基本耕作资源。
householdWealth.en: Anglo-Norman lords held manors and castles; Gaelic chiefs measured wealth in cattle and land; townspeople accumulated trade capital and property; peasants held only basic farming resources.

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per year

economicSystem.zh: 英格兰区域推行封建庄园经济与城市市场，盖尔区域以氏族共有与牧业交换为主的混合经济并存。
economicSystem.en: English areas operated feudal manorial economies and urban markets, while Gaelic areas maintained a mixed economy based on clan-held pastures and pastoral exchange.

category.zh: 教会资助与向英格兰上缴
category.en: Church support and remittances to England

treasuryDescription.zh: 财政紧张，因需同时维持边境防御与向英格兰国王输送资金，常入不敷出。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was strained, as it had to maintain frontier defenses while also remitting funds to the English crown, frequently running deficits.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政优先维持军事控制与行政运转，对英格兰区域课税较重，但收益相当部分被转移至英格兰王室。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy prioritized military control and administrative operations, with heavy taxation in English areas, but much revenue was siphoned to the English crown.

description.zh: 封建骑士与侍从，是英格兰控制区的军事核心。
description.en: Feudal knights and men-at-arms, the military core of the English-controlled areas.

description.zh: 由城镇市民与领地农民征召，负责驻防与地方防御。
description.en: Levied from town citizens and estate tenants for garrison duty and local defense.

description.zh: 从盖尔爱尔兰雇用的轻步兵和弓箭手，作战机动灵活。
description.en: Light infantry and archers hired from Gaelic Ireland, mobile and flexible in combat.

commanderInChief.zh: 驻爱尔兰总督代行军事指挥权，地方封建领主各自统领所属武力
commanderInChief.en: The justiciar exercised military command in the king's name, while local feudal lords commanded their own forces

technology.zh: 军事技术与同时期英格兰相当，包括重骑兵、城堡防御和弓弩兵。但在盖尔地区作战时需适应地形限制与轻步兵游击战术。
technology.en: Military technology matched contemporary England, including heavy cavalry, castle defenses, and crossbowmen. But campaigning in Gaelic areas required adaptation to terrain limitations and light-infantry guerrilla tactics.

threats.zh: 盖尔爱尔兰酋长的持续抵抗、盎格鲁-诺曼封建领主的独立倾向、苏格兰势力对北部爱尔兰的潜在干预。
threats.en: Continued resistance from Gaelic Irish chiefs, independent tendencies of Anglo-Norman magnates, and potential Scottish interference in northern Ireland.

description.zh: 初步正规化，有季节性操练
description.en: Semi-professional, seasonal drills

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: 伊斯兰世界弯刀，轻便利于骑战劈斩
description.en: Islamic curved sword, light and ideal for mounted slashing

description.zh: 铁环编织甲衣，灵活且防护可靠
description.en: Iron ring-linked armor, flexible and reliably protective

description.zh: 骑兵冲锋长矛，骑士战核心武器
description.en: Cavalry charge lance, core weapon of knightly warfare

populationDescription.zh: 人口以东部沿海英格兰区域与南部较肥沃农业区较为集中。盖尔西部和北部人口密度较低，以散居牧业社区为主。
populationDescription.en: Population was more concentrated in the eastern English-controlled coastal zones and the more fertile southern agricultural areas. The Gaelic west and north had lower density, with scattered pastoral communities.

socialClasses.zh: 盎格鲁-诺曼区域：大封建领主、教会高层、城镇商人、庄园佃农；盖尔区域：酋长、自由民、工匠与诗人、附属民与奴隶。两套社会体系之间存在复杂的互动与融合。
socialClasses.en: Anglo-Norman areas: great feudal lords, senior clergy, town merchants, manorial tenants; Gaelic areas: chiefs, freemen, artisan and poetic classes, dependents and bondsmen. Complex interaction and blending occurred between the two social systems.

allies.zh: 作为英格兰王室领地，其外交从属于英格兰。盎格鲁-诺曼领主与英格兰和威尔士的亲族保持联系。
allies.en: As a dominion of the English crown, its diplomacy was subordinate to England. Anglo-Norman lords maintained ties with kin in England and Wales.

enemies.zh: 名义上无正式敌国，但内部盖尔爱尔兰酋长联盟构成持续军事对手。
enemies.en: Nominally no formal external enemies, but internal Gaelic Irish chiefly alliances constituted persistent military opponents.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交政策服从英格兰王廷：维持对爱尔兰的殖民控制、遏制盖尔酋长扩张、保障都柏林等港口与英格兰的贸易联系。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy served the English court: maintaining colonial control over Ireland, containing Gaelic chiefly expansion, and securing trade links between ports like Dublin and England.

era.zh: 中世纪盛期西北欧
era.en: High Medieval northwestern Europe

keyInnovations.zh: 城堡建筑、水力磨坊、盎格鲁-诺曼农业技术引进与盖尔冶金工艺。
keyInnovations.en: Castle construction, water mills, imported Anglo-Norman agricultural techniques, and Gaelic metallurgical craftsmanship.

strengths.zh: 都柏林等港口的贸易资源、与英格兰的行政和军事联系、盎格鲁-诺曼城堡网络提供的防御支撑。
strengths.en: Trade resources of ports like Dublin, administrative and military links with England, and the defensive support provided by the Anglo-Norman castle network.

weaknesses.zh: 有效控制范围有限、盖尔爱尔兰的持续军事抵抗、大封建领主渐趋独立与盖尔化、财政对英格兰依赖严重。
weaknesses.en: Limited effective territorial control, persistent Gaelic military resistance, great magnates trending toward autonomy and Gaelicization, and heavy fiscal dependence on England.

outlook.zh: 英格兰对爱尔兰的控制在14世纪将持续萎缩，盎格鲁-诺曼大封建领主日益盖尔化，'佩尔'范围逐渐缩小。
outlook.en: English control over Ireland would continue to shrink through the 14th century, as Anglo-Norman magnates became increasingly Gaelicized and the Pale contracted.

description.zh: 英格兰王室统治下的爱尔兰领地，盎格鲁-诺曼殖民区与盖尔爱尔兰并存。
description.en: The English-ruled Lordship of Ireland, with Anglo-Norman colonial zones coexisting alongside Gaelic Ireland.

governmentForm.zh: 以阿拉芬为最高统治者的约鲁巴王权制，受奥约梅西长老会议制约
governmentForm.en: A Yoruba monarchy headed by the Alaafin, checked by the Oyo Mesi council of elders

socialStructure.zh: 社会由王族、城镇首领与氏族长老、自由民农牧者、工匠、商人与依附人口构成。约鲁巴城镇社会组织较为复杂，兼具等级性与氏族民主协商特征。
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of royalty, town chiefs and clan elders, free farmer-pastoralists, artisans, merchants, and dependent populations. Yoruba urban society was relatively complex, combining hierarchy with clan-based consultation.

rulingClass.zh: 阿拉芬王族、奥约梅西贵族、各城镇酋长及宗教祭司
rulingClass.en: The Alaafin's royal house, Oyo Mesi nobles, town chiefs, and religious priests

succession.zh: 阿拉芬由王族成员中选出，须经奥约梅西确认；若统治失当，长老会可迫使其退位。
succession.en: The Alaafin was selected from the royal lineage and confirmed by the Oyo Mesi; if rule was deemed unfit, the council could force abdication.

structure.zh: 中央以阿拉芬宫廷与奥约梅西七长老委员会为核心，地方通过城镇首领与氏族长老网络治理。1280年前后奥约仍处于早期扩张阶段，制度尚未完全成熟。
structure.en: The center comprised the Alaafin's court and the Oyo Mesi council of seven chiefs, with local governance through a network of town heads and lineage elders. Around 1280 Oyo was still in its early expansionary phase, with institutions not yet fully mature.

function.zh: 处理王国政务、裁决争端、接待使者与协调军事行动。
function.en: Handled state affairs, adjudicated disputes, received envoys, and coordinated military actions.

function.zh: 七位世袭首领组成的顾问机构，对王权形成制衡，参与重大决策。
function.en: An advisory body of seven hereditary chiefs that checked royal power and participated in major decisions.

function.zh: 监管地方市场秩序、征收贸易税与维护商路安全。
function.en: Supervised local market order, collected trade levies, and maintained caravan security.

localAdmin.zh: 地方治理通过各城镇的巴勒（首领）与氏族长老实施，他们向阿拉芬负责但在本地事务上享有自主权。
localAdmin.en: Local governance operated through the baale (town heads) and lineage elders in each settlement, who were responsible to the Alaafin but enjoyed autonomy in local matters.

legalSystem.zh: 法律以约鲁巴习惯法为主，由酋长裁决与长老调解并行，宗教禁忌和神谕在司法中发挥重要作用。
legalSystem.en: Law was based on Yoruba customary norms, administered through chiefly adjudication and elder mediation, with religious taboos and oracles playing important judicial roles.

taxationSystem.zh: 税收以市场税、农业贡赋、劳役义务与附庸城镇进贡为主。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came from market taxes, agricultural tribute, labor obligations, and tribute from subordinate towns.

religion.zh: 约鲁巴传统宗教（奥里沙信仰）

culturalAchievements.zh: 约鲁巴文化以精美的铜铸与陶塑艺术（继承伊费传统）、口述史诗、鼓乐传统和城镇规划闻名。
culturalAchievements.en: Yoruba culture was renowned for fine bronze casting and terracotta sculpture (inheriting the Ife tradition), oral epics, drumming traditions, and urban planning.

languageFamily.zh: 尼日尔-刚果语系约鲁巴语
languageFamily.en: Yoruba, Niger-Congo language family

philosophy.zh: 约鲁巴哲学强调命运（奥里）、社区和谐、祖灵崇拜与神意沟通。
philosophy.en: Yoruba philosophy emphasized destiny (ori), communal harmony, ancestral veneration, and communication with the divine.

writingSystem.zh: 无文字系统，依赖口述传统、鼓语和符号记录
writingSystem.en: No writing system; relied on oral tradition, drum language, and symbolic records

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以农业（薯蓣、粟米、棕榈油）和地区性贸易为基础。铁匠、织工与陶工的手工业较发达。处于跨撒哈拉贸易网络南端边缘。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was based on agriculture (yams, millet, palm oil) and regional trade. Ironworking, weaving, and pottery crafts were well developed. It lay at the southern edge of the trans-Saharan trade network.

mainIndustries.zh: 薯蓣与粟米种植、棕榈油生产、铁器制造、纺织、陶器、地方贸易
mainIndustries.en: Yam and millet cultivation, palm oil production, ironworking, weaving, pottery, regional trade

tradeGoods.zh: 可乐果、棕榈油、铁器、纺织品、牲畜
tradeGoods.en: Kola nuts, palm oil, iron tools, textiles, livestock

householdWealth.zh: 普通家庭以农田、牲畜和粮仓为主要财产；首领和贵族拥有更大的土地、随从和工匠。
householdWealth.en: Ordinary households held farmland, livestock, and granaries as main assets; chiefs and nobles commanded larger lands, retainers, and artisans.

economicSystem.zh: 以村社农业、市场交换和贡赋体系为核心的混合经济。王室通过控制关键市场节点获取额外收入。
economicSystem.en: A mixed economy centered on village agriculture, market exchange, and the tribute system. The crown gained extra income through control of key market nodes.

treasuryDescription.zh: 王室财富以贡物、牲畜、金属器与贝壳货币形式积累，尚无集中化金银库存。
treasuryDescription.en: Royal wealth was accumulated in the form of tribute goods, livestock, metal objects, and cowrie reserves, without a centralized gold-silver treasury.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政以维持王室尊严与军事力量为优先，同时通过市场保护和贸易促进吸引区域商业流量。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy prioritized royal prestige and military strength while promoting regional commerce through market protection and trade facilitation.

description.zh: 阿拉芬直属精锐武力，包括早期的骑兵力量，是奥约军事优势的关键。
description.en: The Alaafin's personal elite, including early cavalry forces that would become key to Oyo's military advantage.

description.zh: 从各城镇征召的步兵，装备矛、盾与弓箭，战时集结，平时务农。
description.en: Infantry levied from subordinate towns, armed with spears, shields, and bows, assembling in wartime but farming in peace.

commanderInChief.zh: 阿拉芬为最高统帅，奥约梅西首席成员巴绍伦担任行政军事协调者
commanderInChief.en: The Alaafin served as supreme commander, with the Bashorun (head of the Oyo Mesi) as administrative-military coordinator

technology.zh: 武器以铁矛、剑、弓箭和皮盾为主。骑兵正处于发展初期，马匹通过与北方萨赫勒贸易获得。
technology.en: Weaponry centered on iron spears, swords, bows, and hide shields. Cavalry was in its early development phase, with horses obtained through trade with the northern Sahel.

threats.zh: 周边约鲁巴城邦竞争、努佩王国的压力以及北方草原部族的骑兵袭扰。
threats.en: Competition from neighboring Yoruba city-states, pressure from the Nupe kingdom, and cavalry raids from northern savanna peoples.

description.zh: 初步正规化，有季节性操练
description.en: Semi-professional, seasonal drills

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: 伊斯兰世界弯刀，轻便利于骑战劈斩
description.en: Islamic curved sword, light and ideal for mounted slashing

description.zh: 英格兰长弓手主力弓，射程可达300步
description.en: English longbow, effective range up to 300 paces

description.zh: 骑兵冲锋长矛，骑士战核心武器
description.en: Cavalry charge lance, core weapon of knightly warfare

populationDescription.zh: 人口集中在旧奥约城及周边约鲁巴城镇和农业腹地。城镇人口比例在西非属较高水平。
populationDescription.en: Population was concentrated in Old Oyo city and surrounding Yoruba towns and agricultural hinterlands. The urban share was relatively high by West African standards.

socialClasses.zh: 上层为阿拉芬王族与奥约梅西贵族；中层包括城镇首领、商人、工匠与自由农民；下层为附属民与战俘奴隶。
socialClasses.en: Upper strata included the Alaafin's royal house and Oyo Mesi nobles; middle groups comprised town chiefs, merchants, artisans, and free farmers; lower groups included dependents and enslaved war captives.

allies.zh: 与伊费保持宗教文化上的联系；与若干周边约鲁巴城镇建立附庸关系
allies.en: Maintained religious-cultural ties with Ile-Ife; established tributary relations with several surrounding Yoruba towns

enemies.zh: 努佩王国是主要竞争对手；北方草原势力构成军事威胁
enemies.en: The Nupe kingdom was a major rival; northern savanna powers posed military threats

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交目标是扩大对约鲁巴城邦的宗主权、确保马匹贸易通道并抵御努佩与北方势力
foreignPolicy.en: Diplomatic goals centered on expanding suzerainty over Yoruba city-states, securing horse-trade routes, and resisting Nupe and northern powers

era.zh: 中世纪西非铁器时代
era.en: Medieval West African Iron Age

keyInnovations.zh: 成熟的冶铁技术、铜铸艺术、城镇防御工事、早期骑兵组织与区域市场网络。
keyInnovations.en: Mature ironworking, bronze-casting art, town fortifications, early cavalry organization, and regional market networks.

strengths.zh: 约鲁巴城镇文明的深厚传统、发展中的骑兵力量、丰富的农业基础与区域贸易网络。
strengths.en: Deep traditions of Yoruba urban civilization, developing cavalry forces, a rich agricultural base, and regional trade networks.

weaknesses.zh: 尚处于早期扩张阶段，制度未完全成熟；面临努佩等北方势力的军事压力；远离跨撒哈拉贸易主干道。
weaknesses.en: Still in the early expansion phase with immature institutions; facing military pressure from Nupe and other northern powers; distant from the main trans-Saharan trade arteries.

outlook.zh: 奥约将在此后数百年逐步扩大影响力，骑兵力量的发展将使其成为约鲁巴兰最强大的政治实体。
outlook.en: Oyo would gradually expand its influence over the following centuries, with cavalry development making it the most powerful polity in Yorubaland.

description.zh: 约鲁巴兰的早期奥约王国，正处于扩张初期。
description.en: The early Oyo Kingdom in Yorubaland, in its initial expansion phase.

dynasty.en: Various hereditary ruling families per city

governmentForm.zh: 印度洋贸易型伊斯兰城邦联合体，各城邦由苏丹或谢赫统治，彼此独立但文化经济联系密切
governmentForm.en: An Indian Ocean trading Islamic city-state network, each governed by its own sultan or sheikh, politically independent but culturally and economically interlinked

socialStructure.zh: 社会由城邦统治家族、穆斯林商人精英、阿拉伯和波斯裔侨民、斯瓦希里本地商人与工匠、农民、渔民及奴隶构成。城市社会分层较明显，贸易财富决定社会地位。
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of ruling city families, Muslim merchant elites, Arab and Persian diaspora communities, Swahili local traders and artisans, farmers, fishermen, and enslaved persons. Urban social stratification was pronounced, with trade wealth determining status.

rulingClass.zh: 各城邦世袭苏丹家族、穆斯林商贾望族与阿拉伯裔宗教领袖
rulingClass.en: Hereditary sultanic families in each city, Muslim merchant grandees, and Arab-descended religious leaders

succession.zh: 苏丹位通常在统治家族内部世袭继承，受城市商人精英和长老的支持或反对影响。
succession.en: The sultanate typically passed hereditarily within the ruling family, influenced by the support or opposition of merchant elites and city elders.

structure.zh: 各城邦独立治理，中心城市如基尔瓦、蒙巴萨由苏丹主持宫廷与市政。无统一中央政府，城邦间通过贸易、联姻和外交松散联结。
structure.en: Each city-state governed itself independently, with central cities like Kilwa and Mombasa headed by sultans presiding over courts and municipal affairs. No unified central government existed; cities were loosely linked through trade, marriage, and diplomacy.

function.zh: 各城邦核心决策机构，处理政务、贸易纠纷与外交。
function.en: The core decision-making body in each city, handling governance, trade disputes, and diplomacy.

function.zh: 管理港口船舶、货物、关税征收与商舶登记。
function.en: Managed port shipping, cargoes, customs collection, and merchant vessel registration.

function.zh: 依伊斯兰法审理民事、商事与家事案件。
function.en: Adjudicated civil, commercial, and family cases under Islamic law.

localAdmin.zh: 城市内部由苏丹任命的区长和市场监督官管理，城市周边的农村由地方首领管辖。
localAdmin.en: City interiors were managed by sultan-appointed ward heads and market supervisors; surrounding rural areas were administered by local chiefs.

legalSystem.zh: 以伊斯兰法（沙斐仪学派为主）为框架，结合斯瓦希里习惯法与商人社群的贸易惯例。
legalSystem.en: Based on Islamic law (primarily Shafi'i school), combined with Swahili customary norms and merchant-community trade conventions.

taxationSystem.zh: 税收以港口关税、商业税、市场摊位费和对内陆贸易的过境税为主。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came primarily from port customs, commercial taxes, market stall fees, and transit duties on hinterland trade.

religion.zh: 逊尼派伊斯兰教（沙斐仪学派），部分地区保留班图传统信仰元素
religion.en: Sunni Islam (Shafi'i school), with some regions retaining Bantu traditional belief elements

culturalAchievements.zh: 斯瓦希里文化在珊瑚石建筑、海洋航运技术、口头文学与诗歌、伊斯兰学术以及印度洋贸易文化方面成就显著。基尔瓦大清真寺是东非最宏伟的中世纪建筑之一。
culturalAchievements.en: Swahili culture excelled in coral-stone architecture, maritime technology, oral literature and poetry, Islamic scholarship, and Indian Ocean trade culture. The Great Mosque of Kilwa was among the most impressive medieval buildings in East Africa.

languageFamily.zh: 斯瓦希里语（尼日尔-刚果语系班图语支），并广泛使用阿拉伯语
languageFamily.en: Swahili (Bantu branch, Niger-Congo family), with Arabic widely used

philosophy.zh: 伊斯兰法学与伦理思想与斯瓦希里海洋商业文化价值观并存，强调商贸信誉、虔诚与社区团结。
philosophy.en: Islamic jurisprudence and ethical thought coexisted with Swahili maritime-commercial cultural values, emphasizing trade reputation, piety, and communal solidarity.

writingSystem.zh: 阿拉伯字母（用于阿拉伯语和斯瓦希里语书写）
writingSystem.en: Arabic script (used for both Arabic and Swahili writing)

gdpDescription.zh: 经济高度依赖印度洋贸易，是连接东非内陆资源与阿拉伯、波斯、印度市场的关键中转站。基尔瓦控制索法拉黄金贸易，各城邦出口象牙、奴隶、木材并进口奢侈品。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was highly dependent on Indian Ocean trade, serving as a critical transit between East African interior resources and Arabian, Persian, and Indian markets. Kilwa controlled the Sofala gold trade, and the cities exported ivory, slaves, and timber while importing luxury goods.

mainIndustries.zh: 转口贸易、造船修船、渔业、珊瑚石建筑、沿海农业、象牙与黄金转运
mainIndustries.en: Entrepôt trade, shipbuilding and repair, fishing, coral-stone construction, coastal agriculture, ivory and gold redistribution

tradeGoods.zh: 黄金、象牙、奴隶、木材、龙涎香、贝壳；进口瓷器、丝绸、棉布、珠饰、铁器
tradeGoods.en: Gold, ivory, slaves, timber, ambergris, shells; imports of porcelain, silk, cotton cloth, beads, iron goods

name.zh: 基尔瓦铜币与外来金银币
name.en: Kilwa copper coins and imported gold-silver coinage

householdWealth.zh: 商人家庭积累瓷器、贵金属、丝绸与房产；普通居民以渔船、农田和手工工具为资产；统治家族拥有宫殿、仓库与贸易船队。
householdWealth.en: Merchant households accumulated porcelain, precious metals, silk, and real estate; commoners held fishing boats, farmland, and tools; ruling families owned palaces, warehouses, and trading fleets.

economicSystem.zh: 高度商业化的城市贸易经济，国家通过关税和市场管控参与经济，基层生产依赖渔业、农业和内陆物资交换网络。
economicSystem.en: A highly commercialized urban trading economy, with the state participating through customs and market regulation, while basic production relied on fishing, agriculture, and hinterland exchange networks.

treasuryDescription.zh: 各城邦苏丹分别积累财富，主要以黄金、象牙储备、进口瓷器与贵金属形式保存。基尔瓦苏丹国库最为充裕。
treasuryDescription.en: Each city sultan accumulated wealth separately, mainly in gold, ivory reserves, imported porcelain, and precious metals. The Kilwa sultanic treasury was the most substantial.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政以维护港口设施、保障贸易畅通和维持统治家族权威为优先，避免过度征税以免商人转向其他港口。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy prioritized maintaining port facilities, ensuring trade flows, and sustaining ruling-family authority, while avoiding overtaxation that might drive merchants to rival ports.

description.zh: 各城邦维持的武装卫队，负责城防、治安与苏丹安全。
description.en: Armed guards maintained by each city-state for city defense, policing, and sultanic security.

description.zh: 轻型战船与武装商船，用于保护航路、打击海盗和支援城市防御。
description.en: Light warships and armed merchantmen used to protect trade routes, combat piracy, and support city defense.

description.zh: 从沿海周边班图部族中招募的辅助兵力。
description.en: Auxiliary forces recruited from Bantu-speaking peoples in the coastal hinterland.

commanderInChief.zh: 各城邦苏丹为本城最高军事指挥，城邦间无统一军事指挥体系
commanderInChief.en: Each city sultan served as supreme military commander for their city, with no unified military command across the city-states

technology.zh: 军备以矛、剑、弓箭、盾牌为主，海上使用单桅帆船。城防工事采用珊瑚石砌筑，坚固但城邦军力有限。
technology.en: Weaponry consisted of spears, swords, bows, and shields, with single-masted dhows at sea. City fortifications used coral-stone construction, sturdy but city military forces remained limited.

threats.zh: 城邦间商业竞争引发的冲突、内陆部族侵扰、海盗活动以及来自也门与阿曼的海洋势力竞争。
threats.en: Conflicts arising from inter-city commercial rivalry, hinterland tribal raiding, piracy, and maritime competition from Yemeni and Omani powers.

description.zh: 基础训练，民兵水平
description.en: Basic training, militia level

description.zh: 士气极低，厌战情绪蔓延
description.en: Very low morale, widespread war-weariness

description.zh: 英格兰长弓手主力弓，射程可达300步
description.en: English longbow, effective range up to 300 paces

description.zh: 骑兵冲锋长矛，骑士战核心武器
description.en: Cavalry charge lance, core weapon of knightly warfare

populationDescription.zh: 人口分散在东非海岸沿线数十个大小城镇中，基尔瓦和蒙巴萨为最大聚落。城市人口以斯瓦希里人、阿拉伯裔和波斯裔混合群体为主，内陆腹地为班图农耕人口。
populationDescription.en: Population was distributed across dozens of towns along the East African coast, with Kilwa and Mombasa as the largest settlements. Urban populations were mainly mixed Swahili, Arab, and Persian communities, while the hinterland held Bantu farming populations.

description.zh: 东非斯瓦希里海岸贸易中心
description.en: Swahili Coast trading center of East Africa

socialClasses.zh: 上层为苏丹家族、大商人与宗教学者；中层包括普通商人、船长、工匠与渔民头领；下层为普通劳工、渔民和奴隶。外来商人根据其财富和宗教地位享有特殊待遇。
socialClasses.en: Upper strata included sultanic families, great merchants, and religious scholars; middle groups comprised ordinary merchants, ship captains, artisans, and fishing leaders; lower groups were common laborers, fishermen, and slaves. Foreign merchants received special treatment based on their wealth and religious standing.

allies.zh: 与阿拉伯和波斯商人社群保持密切合作；部分城邦与也门拉苏里王朝有外交关系；与内陆班图首领维持贸易同盟
allies.en: Maintained close cooperation with Arab and Persian merchant communities; some cities had diplomatic ties with the Rasulid dynasty of Yemen; trade alliances with hinterland Bantu chiefs

enemies.zh: 城邦间偶有商业冲突；海盗势力和内陆部族袭扰是持续威胁
enemies.en: Occasional commercial conflicts between city-states; pirate forces and hinterland tribal raiding posed persistent threats

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交以维护贸易通道、吸引外来商人、确保内陆原料供应和维持城邦间和平竞争为目标。
foreignPolicy.en: Diplomacy aimed at maintaining trade routes, attracting foreign merchants, securing hinterland raw materials, and sustaining peaceful competition among city-states.

era.zh: 中世纪印度洋贸易时代
era.en: Medieval Indian Ocean trade era

keyInnovations.zh: 独桅三角帆船（达乌帆船）航海术、珊瑚石建筑技术、季风航路知识、铸币技术与印度洋贸易网络组织。
keyInnovations.en: Lateen-rigged dhow navigation, coral-stone building techniques, monsoon route knowledge, minting technology, and Indian Ocean trade network organization.

strengths.zh: 印度洋贸易的关键中转地位、多元文化交融带来的商业活力、基尔瓦对索法拉黄金贸易的控制。
strengths.en: Critical transit position in the Indian Ocean trade, commercial dynamism from multicultural blending, and Kilwa's control over the Sofala gold trade.

weaknesses.zh: 城邦分散无统一防御、军事力量有限、高度依赖外部贸易、内陆控制薄弱。
weaknesses.en: Scattered city-states with no unified defense, limited military strength, high dependence on external trade, and weak hinterland control.

outlook.zh: 14至15世纪斯瓦希里城邦将迎来商业繁荣高峰，但16世纪初葡萄牙人的到来将根本改变这一贸易体系。
outlook.en: The Swahili city-states would reach their commercial peak in the 14th–15th centuries, but the arrival of the Portuguese in the early 16th century would fundamentally transform this trading system.

description.zh: 东非沿海伊斯兰城邦网络，印度洋贸易的关键中转站。
description.en: A network of Islamic city-states along the East African coast, a critical hub of Indian Ocean trade.

governmentForm.zh: 蒙古金帐汗国统治下的附庸公国，1237年遭蒙古毁灭后重建
governmentForm.en: A vassal principality under Golden Horde rule, rebuilt after Mongol destruction in 1237

socialStructure.zh: 大公和波雅尔在蒙古监督下治理。
socialStructure.en: Prince and boyars governed under Mongol oversight.

rulingClass.zh: 留里克大公（需获金帐汗册封）
rulingClass.en: Rurikid prince (requiring Golden Horde confirmation)

succession.zh: 需获金帐汗颁发的统治诏书（雅尔力克）。
succession.en: Required a patent (yarlyk) from the Golden Horde Khan.

structure.zh: 表面上保留罗斯政治传统，实际受蒙古八思哈监督。
structure.en: Nominally preserved Rus' political traditions, but actually supervised by Mongol basqaq officials.

function.zh: 行政
function.en: Administration

localAdmin.zh: 波雅尔和蒙古征税官共治。
localAdmin.en: Boyars and Mongol tax collectors co-governed.

legalSystem.zh: 罗斯法典（受蒙古扎撒补充）。
legalSystem.en: Rus' law code (supplemented by Mongol yasa).

taxationSystem.zh: 向金帐汗国缴纳人头税和贡赋。
taxationSystem.en: Paid poll tax and tribute to the Golden Horde.

religion.zh: 东正教

culturalAchievements.zh: 蒙古入侵后的文化重建。
culturalAchievements.en: Cultural reconstruction after Mongol invasion.

languageFamily.zh: 古罗斯语
languageFamily.en: Old Rus'

philosophy.zh: 东正教信仰
philosophy.en: Eastern Orthodox faith

writingSystem.zh: 西里尔文字
writingSystem.en: Cyrillic script

treasuryDescription.en: Treasury held cash, grain, salt, textiles, and military supplies, sufficient for approximately 4 months of regular expenditure.

fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy centered on maintaining military and bureaucratic systems, with land tax as the primary revenue source; war and court expenses frequently exceeded regular income.

populationDescription.en: About 450,000, greatly reduced from pre-Mongol levels.

militaryTechnology.zh: 锁子甲、蒙古式骑射影响
militaryTechnology.en: Chain mail, Mongol-style mounted archery influence

governmentForm.en: A small principality split from Vladimir-Suzdal, about to begin its rise

description.en: English longbow, effective range up to 300 paces

diplomaticStatus.zh: 蒙古和立陶宛之间的缓冲。
diplomaticStatus.en: A buffer between the Mongols and Lithuania.

title.zh: 元军第二次入侵日本失败
title.en: Second Mongol Invasion of Japan Fails

description.zh: 忽必烈汗派遣约十四万大军第二次入侵日本。蒙元联合舰队在博多湾遭遇猛烈台风（「神风」）重创，损失惨重被迫撤退，日本再次幸免于蒙古征服。
description.en: Kublai Khan sent approximately 140,000 troops in a second invasion of Japan. The Mongol-Yuan fleet was devastated by a typhoon ('kamikaze') in Hakata Bay, suffering catastrophic losses and forcing retreat. Japan was again spared Mongol conquest.

description.zh: 西西里岛爆发反对法国安茹王朝统治的大规模起义。巴勒莫民众在复活节晚祷时屠杀法国人，起义迅速蔓延全岛，最终将安茹势力驱逐出西西里。
description.en: A massive uprising erupted in Sicily against French Angevin rule. Palermo citizens massacred the French during Easter Vespers, and the revolt quickly spread across the island, ultimately expelling Angevin forces from Sicily.

description.zh: 忽必烈派遣元军南下入侵缅甸蒲甘王国。蒙古骑兵在战象面前起初受挫，但最终击败缅军，蒲甘王朝从此走向衰落和分裂。
description.en: Kublai Khan sent Yuan forces south to invade the Pagan Kingdom of Burma. Mongol cavalry initially struggled against war elephants but ultimately defeated the Burmese army, sending the Pagan dynasty into decline and fragmentation.

title.zh: 大越击退元军第二次入侵
title.en: Đại Việt Repels Second Yuan Invasion

description.zh: 陈朝名将陈兴道率领越军，运用游击战术和焦土策略，成功击退了元朝的第二次入侵。白藤江之战中越军用木桩阵大破元朝水师。
description.en: Trần Hưng Đạo led Vietnamese forces using guerrilla tactics and scorched-earth strategy to repel the second Yuan invasion. At the Battle of Bạch Đằng, Vietnamese forces destroyed the Yuan fleet using submerged wooden stakes.

description.zh: 忽必烈派遣两万大军远征爪哇，讨伐据称侮辱元使的国王。然而当地王子罗丹·韦查亚利用元军击败对手后反戈一击，驱逐元军并建立了满者伯夷王国。
description.en: Kublai Khan dispatched 20,000 troops to invade Java to punish its king. However, local prince Raden Wijaya used the Yuan forces to defeat his rival, then turned on the Mongols, expelling them and founding the Majapahit Kingdom.

title.zh: 十字军最后据点阿卡陷落
title.en: Fall of Acre: Last Crusader Stronghold

description.zh: 马穆鲁克苏丹哈利勒率大军攻陷十字军在圣地的最后主要据点阿卡城。圣殿骑士团和医院骑士团的残余力量被迫撤往塞浦路斯，十字军国家正式终结。
description.en: Mamluk Sultan Khalil captured Acre, the last major Crusader stronghold in the Holy Land. Remnants of the Templars and Hospitallers were forced to retreat to Cyprus, formally ending the Crusader states.

description.zh: 乌里、施维茨和下瓦尔登三个山地州缔结永久同盟，组成瑞士邦联的雏形。这一联盟旨在抵御哈布斯堡家族的扩张，成为后来瑞士联邦的基础。
description.en: The three forest cantons of Uri, Schwyz, and Unterwalden formed an eternal alliance, creating the nucleus of the Swiss Confederation. This alliance aimed to resist Habsburg expansion and became the foundation of modern Switzerland.

description.zh: 罗丹·韦查亚巩固了满者伯夷王国的统治，奠定了东南亚海上帝国的基础。满者伯夷将在此后一个多世纪成为马来群岛最强大的政治力量。
description.en: Raden Wijaya consolidated the Majapahit Kingdom, laying the foundation for a Southeast Asian maritime empire. Majapahit would become the most powerful political force in the Malay Archipelago for over a century.

title.zh: 伊尔汗国改宗伊斯兰教

description.zh: 伊尔汗合赞汗正式皈依伊斯兰教并宣布伊斯兰教为国教。这标志着蒙古统治者在波斯的文化融合，加速了伊尔汗国的伊斯兰化和波斯化进程。
description.en: Ilkhan Ghazan officially converted to Islam and declared it the state religion. This marked the cultural assimilation of Mongol rulers in Persia, accelerating the Islamization and Persianization of the Ilkhanate.

description.zh: 威尼斯商人马可·波罗在元朝宫廷服务近二十年后返回家乡。他后来在狱中口述的游记《马可·波罗游记》，激发了欧洲人对东方的向往和探索欲望。
description.en: Venetian merchant Marco Polo returned home after nearly twenty years of service in the Yuan court. His later account, 'The Travels of Marco Polo,' dictated in prison, inspired European fascination with and desire to explore the East.

title.zh: 威尼斯与热那亚争夺地中海霸权

description.zh: 威尼斯和热那亚在库尔佐拉海战中激烈交锋。热那亚海军取得大胜，俘获马可·波罗等大批威尼斯人。两大海上共和国的竞争深刻影响了地中海贸易格局。
description.en: Venice and Genoa clashed at the Battle of Curzola. The Genoese navy won a major victory, capturing many Venetians including Marco Polo. The rivalry between these two maritime republics profoundly shaped Mediterranean trade patterns.

title.zh: 奥斯曼贝伊建立奥斯曼侯国
title.en: Osman I Founds the Ottoman Beylik

description.zh: 奥斯曼一世在安纳托利亚西北部建立独立的突厥侯国，脱离衰落的塞尔柱鲁姆苏丹国。这个小小的边疆侯国将在未来几个世纪成长为横跨三大洲的庞大帝国。
description.en: Osman I established an independent Turkic beylik in northwestern Anatolia, breaking away from the declining Seljuk Sultanate of Rum. This small frontier principality would grow over the coming centuries into a vast empire spanning three continents.

title.zh: 德里苏丹国阿拉丁·卡尔吉的扩张
title.en: Expansion of Alauddin Khalji's Delhi Sultanate

description.zh: 德里苏丹阿拉丁·卡尔吉发动大规模南征，征服了德干高原的大片地区。他击败了卡卡提亚、潘地亚等南方王国，使德里苏丹国的疆域达到历史最大。
description.en: Delhi Sultan Alauddin Khalji launched massive southern campaigns, conquering large parts of the Deccan Plateau. He defeated the Kakatiya, Pandya, and other southern kingdoms, expanding the Delhi Sultanate to its greatest territorial extent.

title.zh: 金马刺战役：佛兰德市民击败法军
title.en: Battle of the Golden Spurs: Flemish Citizens Defeat France

description.zh: 佛兰德城市民兵在科特赖克战役中以步兵方阵击败了法国骑士军队。这场胜利打破了重骑兵不可战胜的神话，被视为步兵复兴的标志性事件。
description.en: Flemish city militia defeated the French knights at the Battle of Courtrai using infantry formations. This victory shattered the myth of heavy cavalry invincibility and is regarded as a landmark event in the revival of infantry warfare.

title.zh: 法国国王逮捕圣殿骑士团
title.en: French King Arrests the Knights Templar

description.zh: 法国国王腓力四世以异端罪名逮捕了境内所有圣殿骑士团成员。这一行动旨在夺取骑士团的巨额财富，最终导致圣殿骑士团在1312年被教皇正式解散。
description.en: French King Philip IV arrested all Knights Templar in France on charges of heresy. This action aimed to seize the order's vast wealth and ultimately led to the formal dissolution of the Knights Templar by the Pope in 1312.

description.zh: 在法国国王腓力四世的压力下，教皇克莱门特五世将教廷从罗马迁至法国阿维尼翁。开始了所谓的「阿维尼翁之囚」时期，教皇权威受到严重损害。
description.en: Under pressure from French King Philip IV, Pope Clement V moved the papal court from Rome to Avignon in France. This began the so-called 'Avignon Captivity,' severely damaging papal authority and independence.

title.zh: 马里帝国曼萨·穆萨的黄金时代
title.en: Golden Age of Mansa Musa's Mali Empire

description.zh: 马里帝国在曼萨·穆萨统治下进入鼎盛时期。帝国控制着西非黄金和食盐贸易的命脉，廷巴克图成为伊斯兰世界重要的学术和商业中心。
description.en: The Mali Empire entered its golden age under Mansa Musa. The empire controlled the vital West African gold and salt trade, and Timbuktu became an important center of Islamic scholarship and commerce.

title.zh: 曼萨·穆萨即位为马里皇帝
title.en: Mansa Musa Ascends to the Mali Throne

description.zh: 曼萨·穆萨正式即位为马里帝国皇帝，他将成为中世纪世界最富有的人之一。他后来的麦加朝圣之旅因沿途大量散金而闻名于世。
description.en: Mansa Musa formally ascended to the throne of the Mali Empire, becoming one of the wealthiest individuals of the medieval world. His later pilgrimage to Mecca became legendary for the vast quantities of gold he distributed along the route.

description.zh: 英格兰国王爱德华一世企图控制苏格兰王位继承，引发苏格兰独立战争。威廉·华莱士等苏格兰将领奋起抵抗英格兰的统治，为苏格兰独立而战。
description.en: English King Edward I's attempt to control the Scottish succession sparked the Scottish Wars of Independence. William Wallace and other Scottish leaders rose up to resist English domination, fighting for Scottish sovereignty.

title.zh: 班诺克本战役：苏格兰大胜英格兰
title.en: Battle of Bannockburn: Scotland's Great Victory

description.zh: 苏格兰国王罗伯特·布鲁斯在班诺克本战役中大败英格兰军队。这场决定性的胜利确保了苏格兰的实际独立，是苏格兰历史上最重要的军事胜利。
description.en: Scottish King Robert the Bruce decisively defeated the English army at the Battle of Bannockburn. This decisive victory secured Scotland's de facto independence and remains the most important military victory in Scottish history.

description.zh: 忽必烈在中国推行行省制度，将全国划分为多个行中书省进行管理。这一行政体制深刻影响了中国后世的地方行政区划，为明清行省制度奠定了基础。
description.en: Kublai Khan implemented the provincial system in China, dividing the realm into multiple provinces for governance. This administrative framework profoundly influenced later Chinese territorial administration, laying the foundation for the Ming and Qing provincial systems.

title.zh: 卡卡提亚王朝修建瓦朗加尔要塞

description.zh: 卡卡提亚女王鲁达马·德维在位期间加强了瓦朗加尔城的防御工事。卡卡提亚王朝是德干高原最强大的印度王国之一，其独特的建筑和雕塑风格影响深远。
description.en: Queen Rudrama Devi of the Kakatiya dynasty strengthened the fortifications of Warangal. The Kakatiya dynasty was one of the most powerful Indian kingdoms of the Deccan Plateau, with a distinctive architectural and sculptural style of lasting influence.

description.zh: 欧洲从1315年开始遭受持续多年的大饥荒。极端恶劣的天气导致农作物大面积歉收，数百万人死于饥饿和疾病，这是中世纪欧洲最严重的粮食危机之一。
description.en: Europe suffered a devastating multi-year Great Famine beginning in 1315. Extreme weather caused widespread crop failures, killing millions through starvation and disease in one of the worst food crises of medieval Europe.

description.zh: 兰甘亨大帝统治下的素可泰王国达到鼎盛。他创制了泰文字母，推广上座部佛教，与中国和邻国建立外交关系，被视为泰国文明的奠基者。
description.en: The Sukhothai Kingdom reached its zenith under King Ramkhamhaeng the Great. He created the Thai alphabet, promoted Theravada Buddhism, and established diplomatic relations with China and neighboring states, being regarded as the founder of Thai civilization.

title.zh: 伊尔汗国合赞汗的行政改革

description.zh: 伊尔汗合赞汗推行全面的行政和税收改革，统一度量衡，建立邮政驿站网络。宰相拉施德丁编纂了《史集》，成为中世纪最重要的世界史著作之一。
description.en: Ilkhan Ghazan implemented comprehensive administrative and tax reforms, standardized weights and measures, and established a postal relay network. His vizier Rashid al-Din compiled the Jami' al-Tawarikh, one of the most important world histories of the medieval era.
